content.text: Mana ishobora byose turagushimira yuko waduhaye umwana wawe w’ikinege ngo abe umuntu nkatwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabyarwa n’umwari utunganye, nk’uko twibuka uyu munsi. Nuko turakwinginze, ubwo twabyawe ubwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kabiri, tugahindurwa abana bawe n’uko watwemeranye imbabazi. Uduhe kujya duhindurwa bashya

content.speaker: all
content.text: iminsi yose n’umwuka wawe wera. Tubisabye mu izina ry’umwami wacu yesu kristo.amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko       Abaheburayo 1:1-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kera imana yavuganiye na ba sogokuruza mu kanwa k'abahanuzi mu bihe byinshi no mu buryo bwinshi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: naho muri iyi minsi y'imperuka yavuganiye natwe mu kanwa k'umwana wayo, uwo yashyiriyeho kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuragwa wa byose ari we yaremesheje isi.uwo kuko ari ukurabagirana k'ubwiza bwayo n'ishusho ya

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere yayo, kandi akaba ari we uramiza byose ijambo ry'imbaraga ze, amaze kweza no gukuraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha byacu yicara iburyo bw'ikomeye cyane yo mu ijuru.amaze kurusha abamarayika icyubahiro,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk'uko n'izina yarazwe riruta ayabo. Mbese ni nde wo mu bamarayika imana yigeze kubwira it"uri

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwana wanjye, uyu munsi ndakubyaye"? Cyangwa ngo ivuge iti"nzaba se, na we azaba umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: wanjye"? Kandi ubwo izongera kuzana impfura yayo mu isi, izavuga iti "abamarayika b'imana bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamuramye." iby'abamarayika yarabivuze iti"ihindura abamarayika bayo imiyaga, n'abagaragu bayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibahindura ibirimi by'umuriro." ariko iby'umwana wayo byo yarabyeruye iti"intebe yawe mana, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: iy'iteka ryose, inkoni y'ubugabe bwawe ni inkoni yo gukiranuka. Kuko wakunze gukiranuka ukanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugome, ni cyo cyatumye imana, ari yo mana yawe, igusiga amavuta yo kwishima, ikakurutisha bagenzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bawe." yongera kuvuga iby'umwana wayo iti"uwiteka, mbere na mbere, ni wowe washyizeho urufatiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: rw'isi, n'ijuru na ryo ni umurimo w'intoki zawe. Ibyo bizashiraho ariko wowe ho uzahoraho,ibyo byose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bizasaza nk'umwenda, kandi uzabizinga nk'umwitero,bihindurwe ukundi.ariko wowe ho uri uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wahoze,imyaka y'ubugingo bwawe ntizagira iherezo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza       Yohana 1.1-14

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mbere na mbere hariho jambo; jambo uwo yahoranye n'imana kandi jambo yari imana.  Uwo yahoranye

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'imana mbere na mbere. Ibintu byose ni we wabiremye, ndetse mu byaremwe byose nta na kimwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kitaremwe na we. Muri we harimo ubugingo, kandi ubwo bugingo bwari umucyo w'abantu. Uwo mucyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: uvira mu mwijima, ariko umwijima ntiwawumenya. Hariho umuntu watumwe n'imana witwaga yohana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwo yazanywe no guhamya iby'umucyo, ngo atume bose bizera.  Icyakora uwo si we uwo mucyo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo ni we wahamije ibyawo. Uwo mucyo ni we mucyo nyakuri, kandi ubwo ni bwo yatangiraga kuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu isi ngo amurikire umuntu wese. Yari mu isi ndetse ni we wayiremye, nyamara ab'isi ntibamumenya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yaje mu bye, ariko abe ntibamwemera.  Icyakora abamwemeye bose bakizera izina rye, yabahaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubushobozi bwo kuba abana b'imana.  Abo ntibabyawe n'amaraso cyangwa n'ubushake bw'umubiri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa n'ubushake bw'umugabo, ahubwo babyawe n'imana. Jambo uwo yabaye umuntu abana natwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: (tubona ubwiza bwe busa n'ubw'umwana w'ikinege wa se), yuzuye ubuntu n'ukuri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Sitefano Wera (December 26)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, turakwinginze kugirango, iyo duca mu karengane k’iyi si baduhora ukuri kwawe, udufashe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubura amaso dutumbire mu ijuru tubone ubwiza bwawe buzahishurwa; kandi ujye utwuzuza umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe wera, tubone gukunda abaturenganya no kubasabira umugisha, dukurikije umugaragu wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: sitefano wishwe bamuguhora, ubwo yasabiraga abamwishe, akaba akwitwaraho, wowe uhora uri iburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’imana, utabara abarengenywa wa ku bwawe, kandi umurengezi wacu ushimwa utuburanira. Amina

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyo Mu Cyimbo Cy’urwandiko         Ibyakozwe 7, 55-60

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko sitefano yuzuye umwuka wera arararama, atumbira mu ijuru abona ubwiza bw'imana na yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahagaze iburyo bw'imana,  aravuga ati "dore mbonye ijuru rikingutse, n'umwana w'umuntu ahagaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: iburyo bw'imana."barasakuza cyane biziba amatwi, bamugwirira icyarimwe, baramukurubana bamuvana

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu murwa, bamwicisha amabuye. Abagabo bamushinje bashyira imyenda yabo ku birenge by'umusore

content.speaker: all
content.text: witwaga sawuli.  Bakimutera amabuye, arambaza aravuga ati "mwami yesu, akira umwuka wanjye."

content.speaker: all
content.text: arapfukama avuga ijwi rirenga ati "mwami, ntubabareho iki cyaha." amaze kuvuga atyo arasinzira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutumwa bwiza                 matayo 23, 34-39

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero ku bw'ibyo, ngiye kubatumaho abahanuzi n'abanyabwenge n'abanditsi: bamwe muri bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzabica muzababamba, abandi muzabakubitira mu masinagogi yanyu, muzabirukana mu midugudu

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose bajyamo, muhereko mugibweho n'amaraso yose y'abakiranutsi yaviriye ku isi, uhereye ku maraso

content.speaker: all
content.text: ya abeli umukiranutsi, ukageza ku maraso ya zakariya mwene berekiya, mwiciye hagati y'ahera

content.speaker: all
content.text: h'urusengero n'igicaniro.  Ndababwira ukuri yuko ibyo byose bizasohora ku b'iki gihe.yerusalemu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: yerusalemu, wica abahanuzi ugatera amabuye abagutumweho, ni kangahe nshaka kubundikira abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bawe, nk'uko inkoko ibundikira imishwi yayo mu mababa yayo ntimunkundire?  Dore inzu yanyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: muyisigiwe ari umusaka.  Ndababwira yuko mutazambona uhereye none ukageza ubwo muzavuga muti

content.speaker: all
content.text: 'hahirwa uje mu izina ry'uwiteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Ibya Yohana. Uwanditse Ubutumwa (December 27)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami wacu w’imbabazi, turakwinginze umurikishirize itorero umucyo, uzatuma iryo torero, ubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: riyobowe n’imyigishirize y’ntumwa yawe yohana wanditse ubutumwa, rigenda rivirwa n’umucyo w’ukuri

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwawe, ugez’ ubwo hanyuma rizaba rigeze mu mucyo utazazima w’ubugingo buhoraho. Tubisabye mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: all
content.text: Urwandiko     1 Yohana 1, 1-10

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwahozeho uhereye mbere na mbere, uwo twumvise, uwo twiboneye n'amaso yacu, kandi uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: twitegereje intoki zacu zikamukoraho, ari we jambo ry'ubugingo  kandi ubwo bugingo bwarerekanywe

content.speaker: all
content.text: turabubona, turabuhamya kandi none turababwira iby'ubwo bugingo buhoraho, bwahoranye na data

content.speaker: all
content.text: wa twese tukabwerekwa. Ibyo twabonye tukabyumva ni byo tubabwira kugira ngo namwe mufatanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: natwe, kuko ubwacu dufatanije na data wa twese n'umwana we yesu kristo.  Ibyo ni byo tubandikiye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo umunezero wanyu ube mwinshi. Ubu ni bwo butumwa twumvise buvuye kuri we

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukabubabwira, yuko imana ari umucyo kandi ko muri yo hatari umwijima na muke.  Nituvuga yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: dufatanije na yo tukagendera mu mwijima, tuba tubeshye tudakurikiza ukuri,  ariko rero iyo tugendeye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu mucyo nk'uko na yo iri mu mucyo, tuba dufatanije ubwacu kandi amaraso ya yesu umwana wayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: atwezaho ibyaha byose.nituvuga yuko ari nta cyaha dufite tuba twishutse, ukuri kuba kutari muri twe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko nitwatura ibyaha byacu, ni yo yo kwizerwa kandi ikiranukira kutubabarira ibyaha byacu no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kutwezaho gukiranirwa kose.  Nituvuga yuko ari nta cyaha twakoze tuba tuyise umunyabinyoma, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ijambo ryayo ntiriba riri muri twe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza     Yohana 21, 19-25

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyatumye avuga atyo ni ukwerekana urupfu azubahisha imana. Amaze kuvuga atyo aramubwira ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "nkurikira."petero arakebuka, abona umwigishwa yesu yakundaga na we abakurikiye, ari we wari

content.speaker: all
content.text: wariseguye igituza cya yesu basangira nijoro akamubaza ati "databuja, ni nde ugiye kukugambanira?"

content.speaker: all
content.text: petero abonye uwo abaza yesu ati "mwami, uyu se azamera ate?"yesu aramusubiza ati "niba nshaka ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: agumaho kugeza aho nzazira, upfa iki? Nkurikira." ni cyo cyatumye iryo jambo ryamamara muri bene

content.speaker: all
content.text: data ngo uwo mwigishwa ntazapfa. Ariko yesu ntiyabwiye petero yuko uwo atazapfa, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yaramubwiye ngo "niba nshaka ko agumaho kugeza aho nzazira, upfa iki?" uyu ni we wa mwigishwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhamya ibyo, ni na we wabyanditse kandi tuzi yuko ibyo ahamya ari iby'ukuri. Ariko hariho n'ibindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: byinshi yesu yakoze, byakwandikwa byose ngira ngo ibitabo byakwandikwa ntibyakwirwa mu isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kuvuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho Ni Rimwe N’iry’umunsi Wo Kuvuka (Paji Ya 41)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Urwandiko    Abagalatiya 4, 1-7

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko ndavuga yuko umuragwa iyo akiri umwana atagira icyo atandukanaho n'imbata, nubwo yaba ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: nyir'ibintu byose. Ahubwo ategekwa n'abamurera n'ibisonga, kugeza igihe cyategetswe na se. Natwe ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko turi. Tukiri bato twari imbata, dutegekwa n'amategeko ya mbere yahoze mu isi. Maze igihe gikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gisohoye imana yohereza umwana wayo wabyawe n'umugore, kandi wavutse atwarwa n'amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo acungure abatwarwa na yo, biduheshe guhinduka abana b'imana.kandi kuko muri abana bayo, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo cyatumye imana yohereza umwuka w'umwana wayo mu mitima yacu avuga ati "aba, data."  ni cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gituma utakiri imbata ahubwo uri umwana, kandi rero ubwo uri umwana, uri n'umuragwa ubihawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Matayo 1, 18-25

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuvuka kwa yesu kristo kwagenze gutya. Nyina mariya yari yarasabwe na yosefu, ariko yari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ataramurongora, babona afite inda y'umwuka wera. Umugabo we yosefu kuko yari umukiranutsi kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: adashaka kumukoza isoni ku mugaragaro, yigira inama yo kumubenga rwihishwa.  Akibitekereza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: marayika w'umwami imana amubonekera mu nzozi ati "yosefu mwene dawidi, witinya kurongora

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugeni wawe mariya, kuko imbuto imurimo ari iy'umwuka wera.  Azabyara umuhungu uzamwite yesu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko ari we uzakiza abantu be ibyaha byabo."nuko ibyo byose byabereyeho kugira ngo ibyo umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: imana yavugiye mu kanwa k'umuhanuzi bisohore ngo "dore umwari azasama inda kandi azabyara

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuhungu,azitwa imanweli",risobanurwa ngo "imana iri kumwe natwe". Yosefu akangutse abigenza uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: marayika w'umwami imana yamutegetse, arongora umugeni we. Ariko ntibaryamana arinda ageza igihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabyariye umuhungu, amwita yesu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Twibukiraho Gukebwa Kwa Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: (Janvier 1)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose, tuzi yuko wemeye ko umwana wawe ushimwa akebwa. None turagusaba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugirango uduhe gukebwa nyakuri guheshwa n’umwuka; maze imitima yacu n’ingingo zacu zose, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: bimara gupfa ku irari ry’isi no kwifuza kose k’umubiri, tujye tukuyoboka muri byose udushakaho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu izina ry’umwana wawe yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko Abaroma 4:8-14

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hahirwa umuntu uwiteka atazabaraho icyaha." mbese ayo mahirwe yasezeranijwe abakebwe bonyine,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa n'abatakebwe na bo? Ko tuvuga tuti "kwizera kwa aburahamu kwamuhwanirijwe no

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukiranuka"?  Kwamuhwanirijwe ryari? Ni ubwo yari yarakebwe, cyangwa ni ubwo yari atarakebwa? Si

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo yari amaze gukebwa, ahubwo yari atarakebwa. Bukeye ahabwa ikimenyetso cyo gukebwa, kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikimenyetso cyo gukiranuka kwavuye kuri kwa kwizera yari afite atarakebw, akugira ngo abe sekuruza

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'abizera bose, nubwo baba batakebwe ngo na bo babone kubarwaho gukiranuka, na we abone kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: sekuruza w'abakebwe. Nyamara si abakebwe gusa, ahubwo ni abagera ikirenge mu cya sogokuruza

content.speaker: all
content.text: aburahamu ku bw'uko kwizera yari afite atarakebwa, kuko amategeko atari yo yahesheje aburahamu

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa urubyaro rwe isezerano ry'uko azaragwa isi yose, ahubwo yariheshejwe no gukiranuka kuva ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwizera. Abiringira amategeko iyaba ari bo baragwa, kwizera kuba guhindutse ubusa n'iryo sezerano na

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryo rikaba ripfuye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza   Luka 2.15-21

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abamarayika bamaze gusubira mu ijuru abungeri baravugana bati "nimuze tujye i betelehemu turebe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyabayeyo, ibyo umwami imana itumenyesheje." bagenda bihuta, basanga mariya na yosefu n'umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'uruhinja aryamishijwe mu muvure w'inka. Babibonye babatekerereza iby'uwo mwana nk'uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: babibwiwe. Ababumvise bose batangazwa n'ibyo abungeri bababwiye.  Ariko mariya abika ayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: magambo yose mu mutima we, akajya ayatekereza.  Maze abungeri basubirayo bahimbaza, bashima

content.speaker: all
content.text: imana ku byo bumvise byose no ku byo babonye nk'uko babibwiwe. Nuko iminsi munani ishize

content.speaker: all
content.text: arakebwa bamwita yesu, rya zina ryari ryaravuzwe na marayika, nyina atarasama inda ye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa K’umwami Wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: (Janvier 6)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, turagushimira yuko wayoboresheje ba banyabwenge inyenyeri, ukabereka umwana wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’ikinege. Natwe waduhaye kumumenya, naho ubu tumumenyeshwa no kwizera gusa; ariko, mana

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’imbabazi, turakwinginze, uzaduhe kumumenya rwose mu bugingo bwacu buzaza, aho tuzamubonera

content.speaker: all
content.text: afite ubwiza bw’ubumana bwe. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko       Abefeso 3:1-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo gituma jyewe pawulo ndi imbohe ya kristo yesu, mbohewe mwebwe abanyamahanga. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: namwe mwumvise iby'ubutware bwo kugabura ubuntu bw'imana nahawe ku bwanyu, ko mpishurirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwiru bwayo mu iyerekwa nk'uko nabanje kwandika mu magambo make. Namwe nimuyasoma

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzirebera ubwanyu uburyo menye ubwiru bwa kristo koko.  Ubwo ntibwamenyeshejwe abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: b'abantu mu bindi bihe, nk'uko muri iki gihe intumwa ze zera n'abahanuzi babuhishuriwe n'umwuka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko abanyamahanga ari abaraganwa natwe kandi bakaba ingingo z'umubiri umwe natwe, abaheshejwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ubutumwa bwiza kuzagabana natwe muri kristo yesu ibyasezeranijwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nanjye nahindutse umubwiriza wabwo nk'uko impano iri y'ubuntu bw'imana, iyo naheshejwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'imbaraga zayo zinkoreramo.  Nubwo noroheje cyane hanyuma y'abera bose, naherewe ubwo buntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo mbwirize abanyamahanga ubutumwa bwiza bw'ubutunzi bwa kristo butarondoreka, njijure

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose ngo bamenye uburyo iby'ubwiru bikwiriye kugenda, ari bwo bwahishwe n'imana yaremye byose

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhereye kera kose,  kugira ngo muri iki gihe abatware n'abafite ubushobozi bwo mu ijuru mu buryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw'umwuka, bamenyeshwe n'itorero ubwenge bw'imana bw'uburyo bwinshi  nk'uko yabigambiriye kera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kose muri kristo yesu umwami wacu.  Muri we ni mo duherwa ubushizi bw'amanga ngo twegere imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: dushize ubwoba, tubiheshejwe n'uko tumwizeye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Matayo 2.1-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu amaze kuvukira i betelehemu mu gihugu cy'i yudaya ku ngoma y'umwami herode, haza

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanyabwenge baturutse iburasirazuba bajya i yerusalemu, barabaza bati "umwami w'abayuda wavutse

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari hehe? Ko twabonye inyenyeri ye turi iburasirazuba, none tukaba tuje kumuramya." umwami herode

content.speaker: all
content.text: abyumvise ahagarikana umutima n'ab'i yerusalemu bose, ateranya abatambyi bakuru n'abanditsi bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: b'ubwo bwoko, ababaza aho kristo azavukira aho ari ho.bati "ni i betelehemu mu gihugu cy'i yudaya. Ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko byanditswe n'umuhanuzi ngo nawe betelehemu ho mu gihugu cya yuda ni ukuri nturi mutoya mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: midugudu ikomeye ya yuda, kuko muri wowe ari ho hazaturuka umutware,uzaragira ubwoko bwanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw'abisirayeli.' "

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko herode ahamagara abanyabwenge rwihishwa, abasobanuza neza igihe baboneye ya nyenyeri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abatuma i betelehemu ati "nimugende musobanuze neza iby'uwo mwana. Nimumubona muze

content.speaker: all
content.text: mubimbwire, nanjye njye kumuramya."bamaze kumva umwami baragenda, kandi ya nyenyeri babonye

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakiri iburasirazuba ibajya imbere, irinda igera aho uwo mwana ari ihagarara aho. Babonye iyo nyenyeri

content.speaker: all
content.text: baranezerwa cyane. Bageze mu nzu basangamo umwana hamwe na nyina mariya, barapfukama

content.speaker: all
content.text: baramuramya. Maze bahambura imitwaro yabo, bamutura amaturo y'izahabu n'icyome n'ishangi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baburizwa n'imana mu nzozi gusubira kwa herode, banyura iyindi nzira basubira iwabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya 1.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami imana, turakwinginze ku bw’imbabazi zawe kumva gusenga kw’abantu bawe bakwambaza;

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubahe kumenya ibyo bakwiriye gukora, kandi n’imbaraga n’ubuntu byo kubashoboza kubikoresha

content.speaker: all
content.text: umurava. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko    Abaroma 12.1-5

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko bene data, ndabinginga ku bw'imbabazi z'imana ngo mutange imibiri yanyu, ibe ibitambo bizima

content.speaker: all
content.text: byera bishimwa n'imana, ari ko kuyikorera kwanyu gukwiriye. Kandi ntimwishushanye n'ab'iki gihe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo muhinduke rwose mugize imitima mishya, kugira ngo mumenye neza ibyo imana ishaka, ari byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: byiza bishimwa kandi bitunganye rwose.ndababwira umuntu wese muri mwe, mbwirijwe n'ubuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nahawe, mwe kwifata uko mutari, ahubwo mutekereze mwitonze nk'uko imana yagereye umuntu wese

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwizera.  Nk'uko mu mubiri umwe dufite ingingo nyinshi, kandi ingingo zose zikaba zidafite umurimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwe, natwe ni ko turi kuko turi benshi, nyamara turi umubiri umwe muri kristo, umuntu wese ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: urugingo rwa mugenzi we.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Luka 2:41-52

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uko umwaka utashye, ababyeyi be bajyaga i yerusalemu mu minsi mikuru ya pasika. Nuko amaze imyaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: cumi n'ibiri avutse, barazamuka nk'uko umugenzo w'iyo minsi mikuru wari uri. Bamaze iyo minsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: basubirayo, uwo mwana yesu asigara i yerusalemu ababyeyi be batabizi. Icyakora bibwiraga yuko ari mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: itara ry'abantu bajyanye na bo, nuko bagenda urugendo rw'umunsi umwe maze bamushakira muri bene

content.speaker: all
content.text: wabo no mu ncuti zabo,  bamubuze basubira i yerusalemu bamushaka.  Hashize iminsi itatu bamubona

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu rusengero yicaye hagati y'abigisha, abateze amatwi kandi ababaza.  Abamwumvise bose batangazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ubwenge bwe n'ibyo abasubiza. Bamubonye baratangara nyina aramubaza ati "mwana wanjye, ni iki

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyatumye utugenza utya? Dore jye na so twagushatse dufite umutima uhagaze."arabasubiza ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "mwanshakiraga iki? Ntimuzi yuko binkwiriye kuba mu rugo rwa data?" ntibasobanukirwa n'iryo jambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ababwiye. Amanukana na bo ajya i nazareti, agahora abumvira. Ibyo byose nyina abibika mu mutima we.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu akomeza kugwiza ubwenge, abyiruka ashimwa n'imana n'abantu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya 2

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira, ni wowe utegeka ibyo mu ijuru no mu isi byose; turagusaba ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’imbabazi zawe, kugirango wumve ibyo abantu bawe tukwingingira; kandi uduhe amahoro yawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: iminsi yose tukiriho. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko           Abaroma 12.6-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko kuko dufite impano zitandukanye nk'uko ubuntu twahawe buri, niba twarahawe ubuhanuzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: duhanure uko kwizera kwacu kungana,  cyangwa niba twarahawe umurimo wo kugabura iby'imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: tugire umwete wo kubigabura, cyangwa uwigisha agire umwete wo kwigisha,cyangwa uhugura agire

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwete wo guhugura. Ugira ubuntu abugire atikanyiza, utwara atwarane umwete, ugira imbabazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azigire anezerewe.urukundo rwanyu rwe kugira uburyarya. Mwange ibibi urunuka muhorane n'ibyiza.ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: byo gukunda bene data mukundane rwose, ku by'icyubahiro umuntu wese ashyire imbere mugenzi we,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku by'umwete ntimube ibyangwe, muhirimbane mu mitima mukorere umwami wacu.  Mwishime mufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyiringiro mwihanganira amakuba, mukomeze gusenga mushikamye, mugabanye abera uko bakennye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: mushishikarire gucumbikira abashyitsi.ababarenganya mubasabire umugisha, mubasabire

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntimubavume. Mwishimane n'abishima, murirane n'abarira.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza        Yohana 2.1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wa gatatu hacyujijwe ubukwe i kana y'i galilaya, kandi na nyina wa yesu yari ahari. Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamutorana n'abigishwa be ngo batahe ubwo bukwe. Nuko vino ishize, nyina wa yesu aramubwira ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "nta vino bafite."yesu aramubwira ati "mubyeyi, tubigendanyemo dute? Igihe cyanjye ntikiragera." nyina

content.speaker: all
content.text: abwira abahereza ati "icyo ababwira cyose mugikore."hariho intango esheshatu zaremwe mu mabuye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: zashyiriweho kwiyeza nk'uko umugenzo w'abayuda wari uri, intango yose irimo incuro ebyiri cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: eshatu z'amazi. Yesu arababwira ati "mwuzuze intango amazi." barazuzuza bageza ku ngara. Arababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati "nimudahe noneho mushyire umusangwa mukuru." barayamushyira. Uwo musangwa mukuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: asogongeye amazi ahindutse vino ntiyamenya aho iturutse, keretse ba bahereza badashye amazi ni bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bari babizi. Umusangwa mukuru ahamagara umukwe  aramubwira ati "abandi bose babanza vino nziza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu bamara guhaga bakabona kuzana izitaryoshye, ariko wowe ho washyinguye inziza aba ari zo

content.speaker: all
content.text: uherutsa.” Icyo ni cyo kimenyetso cya mbere yesu yakoreye i kana y'i galilaya, yerekana icyubahiro cye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigishwa be baramwizera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya 3.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira, turagusaba ku bw’imbabazi zawe, kugira ngo urebe intege nke zacu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi uko tuzaba mu kaga kose, cg mu bukene bwose, ujye uramburira akaboko kwawe kw’iburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kudutabara no kudufasha. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu.amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko    Abaroma 12.16-21

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muhuze imitima, ntimukararikire ibikomeye ahubwo mwemere kubana n'ibyoroheje. Ntimukiyite

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanyabwenge.ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye. Mwirinde kugira ngo ibyo mukora bibonekere

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu bose ko ari byiza. Niba bishoboka, mu rwanyu ruhande mubane amahoro n'abantu bose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bakundwa, ntimwihoranire ahubwo mureke imana ihoreshe uburakari bwayo, kuko byanditswe ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: "guhora ni ukwanjye, ni jye uzitura, ni ko uwiteka avuga." ahubwo umwanzi wawe nasonza

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugaburire, nagira inyota umuhe icyo anywa, kuko nugira utyo uzaba umurunzeho amakara yaka ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutwe.ikibi cye kukunesha, ahubwo unesheshe ikibi icyiza.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza        Matayo 8.1-13

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amanutse kuri uwo musozi, abantu benshi baramukurikira. Maze haza umubembe aramwegera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramupfukamira aramubwira ati "mwami, washaka wabasha kunkiza."arambura ukuboko amukoraho ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "ndabishaka kira."  uwo mwanya ibibembe bye birakira. Yesu aramubwira ati "wirinde ntugire uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwira, ahubwo genda wiyereke umutambyi, uture n'ituro mose yategetse ribabere ikimenyetso cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubahamiriza." ageze i kaperinawumu, haza umutware utwara umutwe w'abasirikare aramwinginga ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "mwami, umugaragu wanjye aryamye mu nzu yararemaye, arababaye cyane."aramubwira ati "ndaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: mukize."umutware w'abasirikare aramusubiza ati "mwami, ntibinkwiriye yuko winjira mu nzu yanjye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo tegeka gusa, umugaragu wanjye arakira.  Kuko nanjye ndi umuntu utwarwa n'abandi, mfite

content.speaker: all
content.text: abasirikare ntwara. Iyo mbwiye umwe nti 'genda' aragenda, nabwira undi nti 'ngwino' akaza, nabwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugaragu wanjye nti 'kora iki' akagikora." yesu abyumvise aratangara, abwira abamukurikiye ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "ndababwira ukuri yuko ntabwo nari nabona kwizera kungana gutya, habe no mu bisirayeli. Ndababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko benshi bazaturuka iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba, bakicarana na aburahamu na isaka na yakobo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bwami bwo mu ijuru, ariko abana bo muri burya bwami bazirukanirwa mu mwijima hanze, ari ho

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazaririra bakahahekenyera amenyo." yesu abwira uwo mutware ati "nuko genda bikubere nk'uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wizeye."umugaragu we akira uwo mwanya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya 4

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, uzi yuko turi mu kaga kenshi gakomeye k’ibishaka kutugusha, bidutera kugira intege nke za

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere yacu, zituma tutabasha gukomeza iteka guhagarara dushikamye. Nuko rero turakwinginze

content.speaker: all
content.text: udukomereshe imbaraga zawe, zidutabare, kugira ngo zitumire, ukotugeze mu kaga kose, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ziducishe mu moshya yose. Tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko               Abaroma 13.1-7

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuntu wese agandukire abatware bamutwara, kuko ari nta butware butava ku mana, n'abatware

content.speaker: all
content.text: bariho bashyizweho n'imana. Ni cyo gituma ugandira umutware aba yanze itegeko ry'imana, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: abaryanga bazatsindwa n'urubanza. Abatware si abo gutinywa n'abakora ibyiza, keretse abakora nabi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mbese ushaka kudatinya umutware? Kora neza na we azagushima, kuko ari umukozi w'imana uguhesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyiza. Ariko nukora nabi utinye, kuko adatwarira inkota ubusa. Ni umukozi w'imana, uhoresha umujinya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukora nabi. Ni cyo gituma ukwiriye kuganduka utabiterwa no gutinya umujinya gusa, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubyemejwe n'umutima uhana.ni cyo gituma musora, kuko abatware ari abagaragu b'imana bitangiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukora uwo murimo.  Mwishyure bose ibibakwiriye: abasoresha mubasorere, abahinisha mubahinire,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abo gutinywa mubatinye n'abo kubahwa mububahe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza        Matayo 8.23-34

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yikira mu bwato, abigishwa be bajyana na we. Umuyaga uba mwinshi mu nyanja, ubwato bwabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: burengerwa n'umuraba wisuka muri bwo, ariko we yari asinziriye. Baraza baramukangura bati

content.speaker: all
content.text: "databuja, dukize turapfuye."arababaza ati "ni iki kibateye ubwoba, mwa bafite kwizera guke mwe?"

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: maze arabyuka acyaha umuyaga n'inyanja, biratuza rwose. Abantu baratangara bati "uyu ni muntu ki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuyaga n'inyanja na byo biramwumvira! Amaze gufata hakurya mu gihugu cy'abagadareni, ahura

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abantu babiri batewe n'abadayimoni bava mu mva, bari abasazi cyane bituma ari nta watinyuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: kunyura muri iyo nzira.  Barataka cyane bati "duhuriye he, mwana w'imana? Mbese uje hano kutwica

content.speaker: all
content.text: urupfu n'agashinyaguro, igihe cyacu kitaragera?"hirya yabo hari umugana w'ingurube nyinshi zirisha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abadayimoni bazibonye baramwinginga bati "nutwirukana utwohereze muri uriya mugana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'ingurube."arabasubiza ati "nimugende." babavamo baragenda, bajya muri izo ngurube. Umugana

content.speaker: all
content.text: wose wirukira ku gacuri, zisuka mu nyanja zipfira mu mazi. Abungeri bazo barahunga, binjiye mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mudugudu bavuga ibyo babonye byose, n'iby'abari batewe n'abadayimoni. Abo muri uwo mudugudu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose bajya gusanganira yesu, bamubonye baramwinginga ngo ave mu gihugu cyabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya 5

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, turakwinginze, urinde ab’umuryango w’itorero ryawe, ubahe gukomeza iteka kwizera ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: waduhishuriye, batabivanga n’ibizira, kugirango twebwe abishingikirije ku byiringiro by’ubuntu bwawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: byonyine, turindwe n’imbaraga zawe nyinshi iteka. Tubisabye mu izina ry umwami wacu yesu kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko                Abakolosayi 3.12-17

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko nk'uko bikwiriye intore z'imana zera kandi zikundwa, mwambare umutima w'imbabazi n'ineza, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwicisha bugufi n'ubugwaneza no kwihangana, mwihanganirana kandi mubabarirana ibyaha, uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuntu agize icyo apfa n'undi. Nk'uko umwami wacu yabababariye, abe ari ko namwe mubabarirana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko ibigeretse kuri ibyo byose mwambare urukundo, kuko ari rwo murunga wo gutungana rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mureke amahoro ya kristo atwarire mu mitima yanyu, ayo mwahamagariwe kuba umubiri umwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugire imitima ishima. Ijambo rya kristo ribe muri mwe rigwiriye rifite ubwenge bwose, mwigishanye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: muhugurane muri zaburi n'indirimbo n'ibihimbano by'umwuka, muririmbirirana imana ishimwe mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mitima yanyu. Kandi icyo muzavuga cyose n'ibyo muzakora, mujye mubikora byose mu izina ry'umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: yesu, mushima imana data wa twese ku bw'uwo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza                 Matayo 13.24-30

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko abacira undi mugani aravuga ati "ubwami bwo mu ijuru bugereranywa n'umuntu wabibye imbuto

content.speaker: all
content.text: nziza mu murima we, nuko abantu basinziriye, umwanzi araza abiba urukungu mu masaka, aragenda.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko amaze kumera no kwera, urukungu na rwo ruraboneka.  Abagaragu be baraza babaza umutware

content.speaker: all
content.text: bati 'mutware, ntiwabibye imbuto nziza mu murima wawe? None urukungu rurimo rwavuye he?' ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: 'umwanzi ni we wagize atyo.' abagaragu be baramubaza bati 'noneho urashaka ko tugenda

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukarurandura? Na we ati 'oya, ahari nimurandura urukungu murarurandurana n'amasaka, mureke

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikurane byombi bigeze igihe cyo gusarurwa. Mu isarura nzabwira abasaruzi nti: mubanze muteranye

content.speaker: all
content.text: urukungu muruhambire imitwaro rutwikwe, maze amasaka muyahunike mu kigega cyanjye.' "

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Ya   6

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikira Umunsi Wo Kwerekanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, turagushimira yuko umwana wawe ushimwa yerekaniwe kumaraho imirimo ya satani,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akaduhindura abana bawe n’abaragwa b’ ubugingo budashira; nuko rero, ubwo dufite ibyo byiringiro,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uduhe gukiranuka, nk’uko umwana wawe akiranuka, kugirango ubwo azazana imbaraga n’icyubahiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyinshi, tuzinjire mu bwami bwe bwiza budashira dusa nawe. Tubisabye mu izina ry umwami wacu yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kristo. Amina,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko    1yohana 3.1-8

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimurebe urukundo ruhebuje data wa twese yadukunze, rwatumye twitwa abana b'imana kandi ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turi. Ni cyo gituma ab'isi batatumenye kuko batayimenye.  Bakundwa, ubu turi abana b'imana ariko uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuzamera ntikurerekanwa. Icyakora icyo tuzi ni uko yesu niyerekanwa, tuzasa na we kuko tuzamureba

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko ari. Kandi ufite ibyo byiringiro muri we, yiboneza nk'uko uwo aboneye. Umuntu wese ukora icyaha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: aba agomye, kandi icyaha ni bwo bugome.muzi yuko uwo yerekaniwe gukuraho ibyaha kandi nta cyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kimurimo. Umuntu wese uguma muri we ntakora ibyaha, umuntu wese ukora ibyaha ntiyamubonye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ntiyamumenye. Bana bato, ntihakagire ubayobya. Ukiranuka ni we mukiranutsi nk'uko uwo ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: umukiranutsi. Ukora ibyaha ni uwa satani, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere satani akora ibyaha. Ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwana w'imana yerekaniwe ni ibi: ni ukugira ngo amareho imirimo ya satani.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza               Matayo 24.23-31

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abiyita kristo n'abahanuzi b'ibinyoma bazaduka bakora ibimenyetso bikomeye n'ibitangaza, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babone uko bayobya n'intore niba bishoboka. Dore mbibabwiye bitaraba."nuko nibababwira bati 'dore

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari mu butayu', ntimuzajyeyo, cyangwa bati 'dore ari mu kirambi', ntimuzabyemere.  Kuko nk'uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umurabyo urabiriza iburasirazuba ukabonekera aho rirengera, ni ko no kuza k'umwana w'umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuzaba. "aho intumbi iri hose, ni ho inkongoro ziteranira. "ariko hanyuma y'umubabaro wo muri iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: minsi, uwo mwanya 'izuba rizijima, n'ukwezi ntikuzava umwezi wako, n'inyenyeri zizagwa ziva mu ijuru,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'imbaraga zo mu ijuru zizanyeganyega.'  ubwo ni bwo ikimenyetso cy'umwana w'umuntu kizabonekera

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru, n'amoko yose yo mu isi ni bwo azaboroga abonye umwana w'umuntu aje ku bicu byo mu ijuru,

content.speaker: all
content.text: afite ubushobozi n'ubwiza bwinshi. Azatumisha abamarayika be ijwi rirenga ry'impanda, bateranye

content.speaker: all
content.text: intore ze mu birere bine, uhereye impera y'ijuru ukageza iyindi mpera yaryo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Yitwa Seputuwagesima

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami mana, turakwinginze, wumvane imbabazi gusenga kw’abantu bawe, kandi nubwo ibihano

content.speaker: all
content.text: duhanwa bitaruta ibikwiriye ibicumuro byacu, ubidukize, kubwo kugira neza kwawe n’imbabazi zawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugirango izina ryawe rihimbazwe tubisabye mu izina rya yesu kristo umwami wacu amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko I Abakorinto 9.24-27

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntimuzi yuko mu birori abasiganwa biruka bose, ariko ugororerwa akaba umwe? Namwe abe ari ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwiruka kugira ngo mugororerwe.  Umuntu wese urushanwa yirinda muri byose. Abandi bagenzereza

content.speaker: all
content.text: batyo kugira ngo bahabwe ikamba ryangirika, naho twebwe tugenzereza dutyo kugira ngo duhabwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: iritangirika. Nuko nanjye ndiruka ariko si nk'utazi aho ajya, nkubitana ibipfunsi ariko si nk'uhusha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ahubwo mbabaza umubiri wanjye nywukoza uburetwa, ngo ahari ubwo maze kubwiriza abandi nanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwanjye ntaboneka ko ntemewe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza    Matayo 20.1-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwami bwo mu ijuru bwagereranywa n'umuntu ufite urugo, yazindutse kare gushaka abahinzi ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bahingire uruzabibu rwe.  Asezerana n'abahinzi idenariyo ku munsi umwe, abohereza mu ruzabibu rwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isaha eshatu arasohoka, asanga abandi bahagaze mu iguriro nta cyo bakora, na bo arababwira ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: 'namwe mujye mu ruzabibu rwanjye ndi bubahe ibikwiriye.' baragenda. Yongera gusohoka mu isaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: esheshatu n'isaha cyenda, abigenza atyo.  Isaha zibaye cumi n'imwe arasohoka, asanga abandi bahagaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababaza ati 'ni iki kibahagaritse hano umunsi wose nta cyo mukora?' baramusubiza bati 'kuko ari nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: waduhaye umurimo.' arababwira ati 'namwe mujye mu ruzabibu rwanjye.' "bugorobye nyir'uruzabibu

content.speaker: all
content.text: abwira igisonga cye ati 'hamagara abahinzi ubahe ibihembo byabo, utangirire ku ba nyuma ugeze ku ba

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbere.'  abatangiye mu isaha cumi n'imwe baje, umuntu wese ahabwa idenariyo imwe.  Ababanje baje

content.speaker: all
content.text: bibwira ko bahembwa ibirutaho, ariko umuntu wese ahembwa idenariyo imwe.  Bazihawe bitotombera

content.speaker: all
content.text: nyir'uruzabibu bati 'aba ba nyuma bakoze isaha imwe, ubanganyije natwe abahingitse umunsi wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuvunika, twicwa n'izuba!'"na we asubiza umwe muri bo ati 'mugenzi wanjye, sinkugiriye nabi. Ntuzi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: twasezeranye idenariyo imwe?  Ngiyo yijyane ugende. Ko nshatse guhemba uwa nyuma nkawe, mbese

content.speaker: all
content.text: hari icyambuza kugenza ibyanjye uko nshaka, ko undeba igitsure, kuko ngize ubuntu!' "uko ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ab'inyuma bazaba ab'imbere, kandi ab'imbere bazaba ab'inyuma."

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato Yitwa Sekisangesima

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami mana uzi yuko imirimo dukora ubwacu atariyo twiringira nahato nuko re nuko rero ujye

content.speaker: all
content.text: uturindisha amaboko yawe kugira ngo hatagira ibyago cyangwa amakuba.tubisabye mu izina ry umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu yesu kristo. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ukwandiko   2 Abakorinto 11.19-31

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwishimira kwihanganira abapfu kuko ubwanyu muri abanyabwenge.  Murihangana iyo umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: abahinduye imbata, iyo aabamize, iyo abafashe, iyo yishyize hejuru akabakubita inshyi. Ibyerekeye ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bigawa, ni koko twabigizemo intege nke.nyamara icyo undi wese ahangara gukora (ibi mbivuze

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'umupfu) nanjye nagihangara.  Mbese abo si abaheburayo? Nanjye ni uko. Si abisirayeli? Nanjye ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko. Si urubyaro rwa aburahamu? Nanjye ni uko.  Si abakozi ba kristo bagabura ibye? (noneho ndavuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'umusazi), ndabarusha. Mbarusha mu mihati, mbarusha gushyirwa mu mazu y'imbohe, mbarusha

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyane gukubitwa birenze urugero: kenshi nari mu kaga k'urupfu.  Ibihe bitanu abayuda bankubise inkoni

content.speaker: all
content.text: mirongo itatu n'icyenda.  Ibihe bitatu nakubiswe inga, igihe kimwe natewe amabuye, ibihe bitatu inkuge

content.speaker: all
content.text: zaramenetse, naraye imuhengeri nirirwamo, nari mu ngendo kenshi, mu kaga gatewe n'inzuzi, mu kaga

content.speaker: all
content.text: gatewe n'abambuzi, mu kaga gatewe na bene wacu, mu kaga gatewe n'abapagani, mu kaga ko mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: midugudu, mu kaga ko mu butayu, mu kaga ko mu nyanja, mu kaga ko muri bene data b'ibinyoma, mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: miruho n'imihati. Mba maso kenshi, ngira inzara n'inyota, nirirwa ubusa kenshi, nicwa n'imbeho,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nambara ubusa.  Ariko ne kuvuga ibindi, keretse ko hariho ikindemerera iminsi yose: ni uguhagarikira

content.speaker: all
content.text: umutima amatorero yose. Ni nde udakomeye ngo nanjye mbe udakomeye?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ninde ugushwa ngo nanjye ndeke kugurumana niba binkwiriye kwirata, nzajya nirata iby'intege nke

content.speaker: all
content.text: zanjye.  Imana y'umwami yesu ari yo na se ishimwe iteka ryose, izi ko ntabeshya

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza Luka 8.4-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: nuko abantu benshi bamusanga bavuye mu midugudu yose, bamaze guterana abacira umugani

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati"umubibyi yasohoye imbuto, akibiba zimwe zigwa mu nzira barazikandagira, inyoni zo mu kirere

content.speaker: all
content.text: zirazitoragura.  Izindi zigwa ku kara, zimaze kumera ziruma kuko zihabuze amazi.  Izindi zigwa mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mahwa, amahwa amerana na zo araziniga. Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza ziramera, zera imbuto imwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijana, indi ijana, bityo bityo."amaze kuvuga ibyo avuga ijwi rirenga ati "ufite amatwi yumva

content.speaker: all
content.text: niyumve."nuko abigishwa be bamusobanuza uwo mugani.  Arababwira ati "mwebweho mwahawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumenya ubwiru bw'ubwami bw'imana, ariko abandi bo babibwirirwa mu migani, kugira ngo kureba

content.speaker: all
content.text: babirebe ariko be kubibona, no kumva babyumve ariko be kubisobanukirwa."dore iby'uwo mugani ni ibi:

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbuto ni ijambo ry'imana.  Izo mu nzira, abo ni bo bumva ijambo hanyuma umwanzi akaza agakura

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijambo mu mitima yabo, kugira ngo batizera ngo bakizwe.  Izaguye ku kara, abo ni bo bumva ijambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakaryemera banezerewe, ariko ntibagire imizi. Bizera umwanya muto, maze ibibagerageza

content.speaker: all
content.text: byabageraho bagasubira inyuma.  Izaguye mu mahwa ni bo bumva ijambo, maze bakigenda amaganya

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ubutunzi n'ibinezeza byo muri ubu bugingo bikabaniga, ntibere imbuto nziza.  Izo mu butaka bwiza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abo ni bo bumva ijambo bakarifata neza mu mitima inyuzwe myiza, bakera imbuto ku bwo kwihangana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isaboto Yitwa Kwitwa Kwinwagesima

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami mana. Ubwo watunyesheje yuko ibyo dukokara byose bitagigira umumaro namuke, niba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bidafatanyije n urukundo, turagusaba cyane. Nuko turakwinginze.utume umwka wawe wera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amusukishe mu mitima yacu impano kandi ari rwo rudukesha abantu ingeso nziza zose.erega utarufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: aguhwaniye n’upfuye ahagaze.uduhe ibyo ku bw’umwana wawe w’ikinegeyesu kristo’ amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko  1 Abakorinto 13.1-13

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nubwo navuga indimi z'abantu n'iz'abamarayika, ariko singire urukundo, mba mpindutse nk'umuringa

content.speaker: all
content.text: uvuga cyangwa icyuma kirenga.

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi nubwo nagira impano yo guhanura, nkamenya ibihishwe byose n'ubwenge bwose, kandi nubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: nagira kwizera kose nkabasha gukuraho imisozi, ariko singire urukundo nta cyo mba ndi cyo. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: nubwo natanga ibyanjye byose ngo ngaburire abakene, ndetse nkitanga ubwanjye ngo ntwikwe ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: singire urukundo, nta cyo byamarira. Urukundo rurihangana rukagira neza, urukundo ntirugira ishyari,

content.speaker: all
content.text: urukundo ntirwirarira, ntirwihimbaza, ntirukora ibiteye isoni, ntirushaka ibyarwo, ntiruhutiraho,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntirutekereza ikibi ku bantu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntirwishimira gukiranirwa kw'abandi ahubwo rwishimira ukuri, rubabarira byose, rwizera byose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwiringira byose, rwihanganira byose. Urukundo ntabwo ruzashira. Guhanura kuzarangizwa no kuvuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: izindi ndimi kuzagira iherezo, ubwenge na bwo buzakurwaho kuko tumenyaho igice kandi duhanuraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: igice, ariko ubwo igishyitse rwose kizasohora, bya bindi bidashyitse bizakurwaho. Nkiri umwana muto

content.speaker: all
content.text: navugaga nk'umwana muto, ngatekereza nk'umwana muto nkibwira nk'umwana muto. Ariko maze

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukura mva mu by'ubwana.  Icyakora none turebera mu ndorerwamo ibirorirori, ariko icyo gihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuzarebana duhanganye mu maso. None menyaho igice, ariko icyo gihe nzamenya rwose nk'uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: namenywe rwose.ariko none hagumyeho kwizera n'ibyiringiro n'urukundo, ibyo uko ari bitatu, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikiruta ibindi ni urukundo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza Luka 18.31-43

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu yihererana n'abo cumi na babiri arababwira ati "dore turazamuka tujye i yerusalemu, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi byose bizasohora ku mwana w'umuntu.  Azagambanirwa mu bapagani,

content.speaker: all
content.text: azashinyagurirwa, bazamukoza isoni bamucire amacandwe, kandi nibamara kumukubita imikoba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazamwica, maze ku munsi wa gatatu azazuka."ariko ntibagira icyo bamenya muri ibyo, kuko ayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: magambo bari bayahishwe, ntibamenya ibyo babwiwe. Nuko yenda kugera i yeriko, impumyi yari yicaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: iruhande rw'inzira isabiriza, yumvise abantu benshi bahita ibaza ibyo ari byo. Barayibwira bati "ni yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'i nazareti uhita." irataka cyane iti "yesu mwene dawidi, mbabarira."abagiye imbere barayicyaha ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: iceceke, ariko irushaho gutaka iti "mwene dawidi, mbabarira." yesu arahagarara, ategeka ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bayimuzanira. Igeze bugufi arayibaza ati "urashaka ko nkugirira nte?"iti "databuja, ndashaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: guhumuka." yesu arayibwira ati "humuka, kwizera kwawe kuragukijije."ako kanya arahumuka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amukurikira ahimbaza imana. Abantu bose babibonye bashima imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Wa Mbere W’iyo Kwiyiriza Ubusa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kwa Kristo Ni Ko Kwihana Kwacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose idashira turagushimira yuko ari ntacyo waremye cyose wanga, kandi ubabarira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha by’abihana bose nuko turakwinginze uturememo imitima mishya yihana tugire gahinda k’ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byacu nk’uko dukwiriye kandi twemere ko turi indembe rwose kugirango tubabarirwe rwose ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose. Mana y’imbabazi zose, tubisabye mu izina ry umwami wacu yesu kristo. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu Cyimbo Cy’urwandiko     Yoweli 2.12-17

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka aravuga ati "ariko n'ubu nimungarukire n'imitima yanyu yose mwiyirize ubusa, murire

content.speaker: all
content.text: muboroge." imitima yanyu abe ari yo mutanyura mureke imyenda yanyu, muhindukirire uwiteka imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanyu kuko igira impuhwe. Yuzuwe n'imbabazi, ntiyihutira kurakara ahubwo ihorana ibambe ryinshi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi yitangira kuzana ikibi. Ni nde uzi ko itazahindukira ikigarura ngo ibasigire umugisha, mubone uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutura uwiteka imana yanyu amaturo y'ifu n'ay'ibinyobwa? Muvugirize impanda i siyoni, mutegeke

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwiyiriza ubusa, mugire iteraniro ryera, muteranye abantu mweze iteraniro, muteranye abakuru n'abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abakiri ku ibere, umukwe nasohoke mu nzu ye, n'umugeni mu nzu yarongorewemo. Abatambyi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakorera uwiteka nibaririre hagati y'umuryango w'urusengero n'igicaniro, maze bavuge bati "uwiteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: we, kiza ubwoko bwawe, ntureke ab'umwandu wawe bashinyagurirwa, kandi ngo bategekwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abanyamahanga. Ni iki gituma duhinyurwa mu banyamahanga, bati 'imana yabo iri hehe?' "

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza       Matayo 6.16-21

content.speaker: all
content.text: "kandi nimwiyiriza ubusa ntimukabe nk'indyarya zigaragaza umubabaro, kuko bagaragaza umubabaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo abantu babarebe ko biyirije ubusa. Ndababwira ukuri yuko bamaze kugororerwa ingororano

content.speaker: all
content.text: zabo. Ariko weho niwiyiriza ubusa wisige amavuta mu mutwe, wiyuhagire mu maso, kugira ngo abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: batamenya ko wiyirije ubusa keretse so uri ahiherereye, kandi so ureba ibyiherereye azakugororera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato 1

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami yesu turagushimira yuko wamaze iminsi mirongo ine ku manywa na nijoro wiyiriza ubusa kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyitegererezo cyacu. Nuko turakwinginze uduhere ubuntu budufashe kwiyiriza ubusa, uburyo butuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere yacu itegekwa rwose n umwuka wawe, natwetukumvira ibyiza udutegeka dukiranuka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: duhinduka abera nyakuri, ngo biguheshe icyubahiro n’igitinyiro. Ni wowe uhorana na data wa twese

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umwuka wera, muri imana imwe iteka ryose.amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko    2abakorinto 6.1-10

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ubwo dukorana nayo turabinga kugirango mudaherwa ubuntu bw imana gupfa ubusa; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yavuze iti” mu gihe cyo kwemererwamo narakumviye. No ku munsi wo gukirizwamo naragutabaye dore

content.speaker: all
content.text: none nicyo gihe cyo kwemererwamo ;dore none niwo munsi wo gukirizwamo. Ntitugire igisitaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: dushyira mu nzira y umuntu wese kugirango umurimo wacu utagira umugayo. Ahubwo kukintu cyose

content.speaker: all
content.text: twihe agaciro nk’abakozi b’imana bagabura ibyayo. Twihangane cyane mu makuba no mu mibabaro mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: byago, mu biboko, mu mazu y’imbohe mu midugararo no mu mihati tuba maso twirirwa ubusa, dufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: umutima uboneye, dufite  ubwenge, tutarambirwa, tugira neza , dufite umwuka wera, dufite urukundo

content.speaker: all
content.text: rutaryarya, tuvuga ijambo ry’ukuri, dufite imbaraga z’imana kandi dufite intwaro zo gukiranuko z’iburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n iz’ubumoso, mu cyubahiro no mu buhemu, mu mugayo no mu ishimwe dutekerezwa ko turi

content.speaker: all
content.text: abashukanyi ariko turi ab ukuri, dutekerezwa ko turi abatamenyekana kandi nyamara turi ibirangirire

content.speaker: all
content.text: dusa n abagiye gupfa ariko dore turi bazima, dusa n abahanwa ariko ntitwicwa, dusa n’abababara ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: twishima iteka, dusa nk’abakene nyamara dutungishha benshi, dusa n’abatagira icyo bafite nyamara

content.speaker: all
content.text: dufite byose.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa Bwiza Matayo 4.1-11

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze yesu ajyanwa n'umwuka mu butayu kugeragezwa n'umwanzi, amaze iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro

content.speaker: all
content.text: mirongo ine atarya, abona gusonza. Umushukanyi aramwegera aramubwira ati "niba uri umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'imana, bwira aya mabuye ahinduke imitsima."aramusubiza ati "handitswe ngo 'umuntu ntatungwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'umutsima gusa, ahubwo atungwa n'amagambo yose ava mu kanwa k'imana.' " maze umwanzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: amujyana ku murwa wera, amuhagarika ku gasongero k'urusengero aramubwira ati "niba uri umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'imana, ijugunye hasi kuko handitswe ngo 'izagutegekera abamarayika bayo,bakuramire mu maboko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabo, ngo udakubita ikirenge ku ibuye.' "yesu aramusubiza ati "kandi handitswe ngo 'ntukagerageze

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwiteka imana yawe.' " umwanzi arongera amujyana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure cyane, amwereka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwami bwose bwo mu isi n'ubwiza bwabwo  aramubwira ati "biriya byose ndabiguha nupfukama

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukandamya." yesu aramubwira ati "genda satani, kuko handitswe ngo 'uramye uwiteka imana yawe, abe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari yo ukorera yonyine.' "Umwanzi aherako aramureka, maze haza abamarayika baramukorera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato 2

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose, uzi yuko ubwacu tutabasha na hato kwitabara. Nuko rero, ujye uturindisha umubiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umutima kugira ngo dukire ibyago byose n’amakuba yose byatera umubiri, dukire n’ibiteye isoni byose

content.speaker: all
content.text: twakwibwira mu mitima bikawangiza. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko 1 Abatesalonike 4:1-8

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO, bene Data ibisigaye turabinginga tubahugurira mu Mwami Yesu kugira ngo, nk’uko mwabwiwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: natwe uko mukwiriye kugenda no kunezeza Imana, mube ariko mugenda, ndetse murusheho. Muzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: amategeko twahawe n’umwami Yesu kubategekera ayo ari yo. Icyo Imana ishaka ni iki: ni ukwezwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwanyu no kwirinda gusambana, ngo umuntu wese muri mwe amenye gutegeka umubiri we, wezwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufite icyubahiro, mudatwarwa n’irari ryo kurigira, nk’abapagani batazi Imana; kandi ngo umuntu wese

content.speaker: all
content.text: areke kurengera, cyangwa kuriganya mwene se kuri ibyo, kuko umwami wacu ahora inzigo y’ibyo byose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nkuko twabanje kubabwira no kubahamiriza. Imana ntiyaduhamagariye kwanduzwa ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yaduhamagariye kwezwa. Ni cyo gituma uwirengagiza ibyo, aba atari umuntu yanze ahubwo aba yanze

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana iha mwebwe Umwuka wayo Wera.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa bwiza      Matayo 15:21-28

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU, arahava ajya mu gihugu cy'i Tiro n'i Sidoni. Umunyakananikazi aturuka muri icyo gihugu arataka

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyane ati"Mwami mwene Dawidi, mbabarira, umukobwa wanjye atewe na dayimoni cyane." Ntiyagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyo amusubiza. Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramwinginga bati"Musezerere kuko adutakira

content.speaker: all
content.text: inyuma." Arabasubiza ati"Sinatumiwe abandi, keretse intama zazimiye zo mu muryango wa Isirayeli." Na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we araza aramupfukamira aramubwira ati"Mwami, ntabara." Aramusubiza ati"Si byiza kwenda

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyokurya by'abana ngo mbijugunyire imbwa." Na we ati"Ni koko Mwami, ariko imbwa na zo zirya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubuvungukira bugwa buvuye ku meza ya ba nyirazo." Maze Yesu aramusubiza ati"Mugore, kwizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwawe ni kwinshi, bikubere uko ushaka." Umukobwa we aherako arakira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isabato 3

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yo Mu Minsi Yo Kwiyiriza Ubusa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose, turakwinginze, wite ku byo abantu bawe bitonze tugushakaho cyane, uramburire

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukuboko kwawe kw’iburyo kudutabara ababisha bacu bose. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Urwandiko    Abefeso 5. 1-14

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko mwigane Imana nk'abana bakundwa. Kandi mugendere mu rukundo nk'uko Kristo yadukunze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akatwitangira kuba ituro n'igitambo cy'Imana n'umubabwe uhumura neza. Ariko gusambana n'ibyonona

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose no kurarikira ntibikavugwe rwose muri mwe nk'uko bikwiriye abera, cyangwa ibiteye isoni

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa amagambo y'ubupfu, cyangwa amashyengo mabi kuko ibyo bidakwiriye, ahubwo mushime

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana. Kuko ibi mubizi neza yuko ari nta musambanyi cyangwa ukora ibyonona cyangwa urarikira, ari we

content.speaker: all
content.text: usenga ibigirwamana, ufite ibyo azaragwa mu bwami bwa Kristo n'Imana. Ntihakagire umuntu ubohesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: amagambo y'ubusa, kuko ibyo ari byo bizanira umujinya w'Imana abatayumvira. Nuko ntimugafatanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: na bo, kuko kera mwari umwijima none mukaba muri umucyo mu Mwami wacu. Nuko mugende

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'abana b'umucyo, kuko imbuto z'umucyo ari ingeso nziza zose no gukiranuka n'ukuri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mushakashake uko mwamenya ibyo Umwami ashima. Ntimukifatanye n'imirimo y'ab'umwijima itagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: umumaro, ahubwo muyihane kuko ibikorwa na bo rwihishwa biteye isoni no kubivuga. Ariko byose iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitangajwe n'umucyo na byo ubwabyo bihinduka umucyo, kuko ikimurikiwe n'umucyo cyose gihinduka

content.speaker: all
content.text: umucyo. Ni cyo gituma bivugwa ngo"Usinziriye we, kanguka uzuke, Kristo abone uko akumurikira!"

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ubutumwa bwiza      Luka 11.14-28

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu yirukanye dayimoni utera uburagi mu muntu, dayimoni amaze kuva mu kiragi kiravuga, abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: baratangara. Ariko bamwe muri bo baravuga bati"Ni Belizebuli umutware w'abadayimoni umuha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwirukana abadayimoni." Abandi bamushakaho ikimenyetso kiva mu ijuru, bamugerageza. Ariko amenya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo bibwira arababwira ati"Ubwami bwose iyo bwigabanije ubwabwo burarimbuka, n'inzu ikagwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: indi. Na Satani niba yigabanije ubwe ubwami bwe bwakomeza bute, ko muvuga yuko ari Belizebuli umpa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwirukana abadayimoni? Ariko jyewe niba Belizebuli ari we umpa kwirukana abadayimoni, abana banyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni nde ubaha kubirukana? Ni cyo gituma abo ari bo babacira urubanza. Ariko urutoki rw'Imana niba ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwo rumpa kwirukana abadayimoni, noneho ubwami bw'Imana bubaguye gitumo. "Umunyamaboko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufite intwaro iyo arinze urugo rwe, ibintu bye biba amahoro. Ariko umurusha amaboko iyo amuteye

content.speaker: all
content.text: akamunesha, izo ntwaro ze zose yari yizigiye arazimwambura, n'ibyo amunyaze akabigaba. "Uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: tutabana ni umwanzi wanjye, kandi uwo tudateraniriza hamwe arasandaza. "

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dayimoni iyo avuye mu muntu, azerera ahadafite amazi ashaka uburuhukiro, akabubura akavuga ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: 'Reka nisubirire mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.' Yagerayo agasanga ikubuye kandi iteguye, akagenda akazana

content.speaker: all
content.text: abandi badayimoni barindwi bamurusha kuba babi, bakinjira bakayibamo. Nuko ibyo hanyuma by'uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: muntu bikarusha ibya mbere kuba bibi."

content.speaker: all
content.text: Akivuga ibyo, umugore wari muri iryo teraniro ashyira ejuru aramubwira ati"Hahirwa inda yakubyaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'amabere yakonkeje." Na we aramusubiza ati"Ahubwo hahirwa abumva ijambo ry'Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakaryitondera."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO 4

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: YO MU YO KWIYIRIZA UBUSA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose twemeye yuko turi abo guhanirwa ibyaha bikomeye twakoze, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginze, ubuntu bwawe ubudukuzeho ibihano bidukwiriye, ubutumarishe umubabaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubw’imbabazi zawe.  Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO Abagalatiya 4:21-31

content.speaker: all
content.text: ABASHAKA gutwarwa n’amategeko, nimumbwire.  Ntimurasobanukirwa n’ amategeko?  Byanditswe

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko Aburahamu yari afite abahungu babiri, umwe ari uw’inshoreke, undi ari uw’umugeni.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uw’inshoreke yavutse nkuko iby’umubiri bigenda, naho uw’umugeni yavutse kubw’isezerano ry’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo birimo umugani, kuko abo bagore bameze nk’amasezerano abiri. Rimwe ryavuye ku musozi w’i

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sinayi, ribyarira ububata; iryo niryo rigereranywa na Hagari, ari we kandi ugereranywa n’umusozi w’i

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sinayi wo mu Arabiya, kandi usobanurwa ngo Yerusalemu ya none, kuko iri mu bubata hamwe n’abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bayo. Ariko Yerusalemu yo mu ijuru ni yo mugeni, ni we mama wa twese, uko byanditswe ngo “ Ishime,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngumba itabyara; tera hejuru, uvuge cyane, utaramukwa; kuko abana b’inyungwakazi ari benshi, baruta

content.speaker: all
content.text: ab’inkundwakazi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni uko rero, bene Data, namwe muri abana b’isezerano, nkuko Isaka yari ari. Ariko nkuko icyo gihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwabyawe n’umubiri yarenganyaga uwabyawe n’Umwuka, na n’ubu niko bikimeze . Mbese ibyanditswe

content.speaker: all
content.text: bivuga bite?  Biravuga biti< Senda inshoreke n’umuhungu wayo, kuko umuhungu w’inshoreke

content.speaker: all
content.text: atazaraganwa n’umuhungu w’umugeni.” Nuko, bene Data, ntitukiri abana b’inshoreke, ahubwo turi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ab’umugeni.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Yohana 6.1-14

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: HANYUMA y’ibyo Yesu ajya hakurya y’inyanja y’I Galilaya, ni yo yitwa Tiberiya. Iteraniro ry’abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: benshi riramukurikira, kuko babonye ibimenyetso yakoreye abarwayi. Yesu azamuka umusozi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: yicaranayo n’abigishwa be. Ubwo Pasika, iminsi mikuru y’Abayuda, yendaga gusohora. Yesu yubura

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaso; abonye abantu benshi baza aho ari,  abaza Filipo ati< Turagura hehe ibyo kurya, ngo aba babone

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo barya?” Icyatumye amubaza atyo, yagiraga ngo amugerageze;  ubwe yari azi icyo ari bukore. Filipo

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramusubiza ati < Imitsima yagurwa idenariyo magana abiri ntiyabakwira, nubwo umuntu wese yaryaho

content.speaker: all
content.text: gato. Umwe mu bigishwa be, ni we andereya mwene se wa Simoni Petero, aramubwira ati, Hano hari

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuhungu ufite imitsima itanu y’ingano , n’ifi ebyiri; ariko ibyo byamarira iki abantu bangana batya?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu ati, Nimwicaze abantu. Aho hantu hari ubwatsi bwinshi; nuko abagabo baricara, bari nk’ibihumbi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitanu. Yesu yenda ya mitsima arayishimira, ayigabanya abicaye , n’ifi na zo azigenza atyo, nkuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazishakaga. Bamaze guhaga , abwira abigishwa be ati, Nimuteranye ubuvungukira busigaye , hatagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikintu gipfa ubusa . Barateranya, buzuza intonga cumi n’ebyiri z’ubuvungukira bwa ya mitsima itanu

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ingano, ubwo abariye bashigaje. Abantu babonye ikimenyetso yakoze, baravuga bati, Ni ukuri  uyu ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: we wa muhanuzi wari ukwiriye kuza mu isi.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO 5

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: YO MU YO KWIYIRIZA UBUSA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turakwinginze, urebane imbabazi abantu bawe; ujye ubategekesha kugira-neza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwawe kwinshi, ukabarindisha umubiri n’umutima iteka ryose. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO Abaheburayo 9.11-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO Kristo amaze kuza ahinduka umutambyi mukuru w’ ibyiza bizaza,anyura mw ihema rirusha rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: rindi gukomera no gutungana rwose ritaremwe n’intoke; ibyo n’ukuvuga ngo, ritari ibyo mu byaremwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibi. Kandi ntiyinjijwe ahera cyane n’amaraso y’ihene cyangwa n’ay’ ibimasa, ahubwo yahinjijwe rimwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’amaraso ye amaze kutubonera gucungurwa kw’iteka. None ubwo amaraso y’ihene n’amapfizi n’ivu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’inka y’iriza, iyo biminjiriwe ku bihumanye, ko byeza umubiri, ugahumanuka, nkanswe amaraso ya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo, witambiye Imana atagira inenge, kubw’Umwuka w’iteka, ntazarushaho guhumanura imitima

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanyu, akayezahw imirimo ipfuye, kugira ngo mubone uko mukorera Imana ihoraho? Kubw’ibyo ni cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gituma aba umuhuza w’isezerano rishya , kugira ngo abahamagawe bahabwe ibiragwa bidashira

content.speaker: all
content.text: byasezeranijwe, ubwo habayeho uwapfiriye gucungura abacumuye, bagitegekwa n’isezerano rya mbere.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 8.46-59

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU aravuga ati, Ni nde muri mwe unshinje icyaha? Ko mvuga ukuri, n’iki gituma mutanyizera?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uw’Imana yumva amagambo y’Imana ; mwebwe igituma. Mutumva n’uko mutari ab’Imana. Abayuda

content.speaker: all
content.text: baramusubiza bati,<Ntitwavuze neza yuko uri Umusamariya , kandi ko ufite dayimoni?> Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: arabasubiza ati< simfite dayimoni, ahubwo nubaha Data; ariko mwe muransuzugura. Icyakora jye

content.speaker: all
content.text: sinishakira icyubahiro, nyamara hariho Ugishaka, kandi ni we uca imanza. Ni ukuri, ni ukuri ndababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko umuntu, niyumva ijambo ryanjye, atazapfa iteka ryose. Abayuda baramusubiza bati< Noneho

content.speaker: all
content.text: tumenye yuko ufite dayimoni; Aburahamu yarapfuye, n’abahanuzi nuko, nawe ukavuga ngo umuntu , ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: yumvira ijambo ryawe , ntazapfa iteka ryose! Mbese uruta sogokuruza Aburahamu wapfuye n’abahanuzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bapfuye? Wibwira ko urinde? Yesu arabasubiza ati< Niba nuha icyubahiro, icyo cyubahiro nicy’ubusa;

content.speaker: all
content.text: umpa icyubahiro ni Data, uwo muvuga ngo ni Imana yanyu. Nyamara ntimumuzi,  ariko njye ndamuzi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi navuga yuko ntamuzi,naba  ndi umunyabinyoma nkamwe; ariko ndamuzi,  kandi nitondera ijambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: rye.  Aburahamu sekuruza wanyu yifujije cyane kureba umunsi wanjye , kandi awubonye aranezerwa.>

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abayuda baramubwira bati <ko utaramara imyaka mirongo itanu,  Aburahamu wamubonye ute? Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababwira ati< Ni ukuri ni ukuri ndababwira yuko Aburahamu ataravuka, ndiho>. Nuko batora amabuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: yo kumutera; ariko Yesu arihisha, asohoka mu rusengero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ISABATO IBANZIRIZA IYO KUZUKA (y’Amashami)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose idashira, turagushimira yuko urukundo rwinshi ukunda abantu rwakwemeje

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutuma Umwana wawe, Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, kuvukana umubiri nk’iyacu, no gupfira ku musaraba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugirango  abantu bose bakurikize icyitegererezo cye cyo kwicisha bugufi cyane. Nuko uduhe ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’imbabazi zawe gukurikiza icyitegererezo cye cyo kwihangana, no gufatanya kuzuka kwe. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mw Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo, Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO Abafilipi 2.5-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUGIRE wa mutima wari muri Kristo Yesu. Uwo, nubwo yabanje kugira akamero k’Imana, ntiyatekereje

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko guhwana n’Imana ari ikintu cyo gukundirwa; ahubwo yisiga ubusa, ajyana akamero k’umugaragu

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’imbata , agira ishusho  y’umuntu; kandi amaze kuboneka afite ishusho y’umuntu, yicisha bugufi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: araganduka, ntiyanga no gupfa , ndetse urupfu rwo ku musaraba. Ni cyo cyatumye Imana imushyira

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: hejuru cyane, ikamuha izina risumba ayandi mazina yose, kugirango  amavi yose apfukame mu izina rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu , ari ay’ibyo mw ijuru, cyangwa ay’ibyo mu isi, cyangwa ay’ibyo munsi y’isi, kandi indimi zose

content.speaker: all
content.text: zihamye ko Yesu Kristo ari Uwiteka, ngo Imana Data wa twese ihimbazwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Matayo 27. 1-54

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUSEKE utambitse abatambyi bakuru bose n’abakuru b’ubwo bwoko bigira inama yi kwica Yesu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baramuboha , baramujyana, bamushyira umutegeka Pilato.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Yuda wamugambaniye, abonye ko urubanza rutsinze Yesu, aricuza, asubiza abatambyi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakuru, n’abakuru bya bice by’ifeza mirongo itatu, ati< nakoze icyaha , kuko nagambaniye amaraso

content.speaker: all
content.text: atariho urubanza.” Ariko bo baramusubiza bati, biramaze! Ni ibyawe.” Ifeza azijugunya mu rusengero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arasohoka, aragenda, arimanika. Ariko abatambyi bakuru bajyana bya bice by’ifeza, baravuga bati<

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amategeko ntiyemera ko tubishyira mu bubuko bw’Imana, kuko ari ibiguzi by’amaraso.” Bajya inama ,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazigura isambu y’umubumbyi, ngo ijye ihambamwo  abashyitsi. Ni cyo gituma iyo sambu yitwa Isambu

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’amaraso na bugingo n’ubu. Ni bwo ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Yeremiya byasohoye ngo, Bajyane ibice

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’ifeza mirongo itatu, ari cyo giciro cy’uwo baciriye, uwo bamwe mu Bisirayeli baciriye, babigura

content.speaker: all
content.text: isambu y’umubumbyi, nk’uko Uwiteka yanyeretse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwo Yesu yari ahagagaze imbere y’umutegeka ; umutegeka aramuza ati< Ni wowe Mwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’abayuda?” Yesu aramusubiza ati< wakabimenye .” Abatambyi bakuru n’abakuru baramurega, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntiyagira icyo yireguza na hato. Maze Pilato aramubaza ati< Niwumwise ko bagushinje byinshi? Ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntiyamusubiza ijambo na rimwe, bituma umutegeka yumirwa cyane. Muri iyo minsi mikuru, uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwaka utashye, umutegeka yagiraga akAminayero ko kubohorera abantu imbohe imwe, iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bashakaga. Nuko icyo gihe bari bafite imbohe y’ikimenywabose yitwaga Baraba. Nuko bateranye, Pilato

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababaza ati< Uwo mushaka ko mbabohorera ni nde? Ni Baraba, cyangwa ni Yesu witwa Kristo? Kuko

subsections.title: IBYO GUSOMWA KU MUNSI WA I WO MU CYUMWERU CYERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: yAminaye yuko ishyari ari ryo rimubatangishije. Kandi ubwo yari yicaye ku ntebe y’imanza. Umugore we

content.speaker: all
content.text: amutumaho ati< ntugire icyo utwara uwo mukiranutsi, kuko naraye ndose byinshi kuri we byambabaje>.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko abatambyi bakuru n’abakuru boshya abantu ngo basabe Baraba, bicishe Yesu. Nuko umutegeka

content.speaker: all
content.text: yongera kubabaza ati< Muri aba bombi uwo mushaka  ni nde, nkamubabohorera?> Bati <Ni Baraba..>

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pilato arasubiza ati< Nuko Yesu witwa Kristo ndamugira nte? > Bose bati< Nabambwe!” Na we

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababaza ati<  ku ki? Yakoze cyaha ki?> Ariko barushaho gusakuza cyane bati< Nabambwe !”  Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pilato abonye ko arushywa n’ubusa, ahubwo ko barushijeho gushega, yenda amazi, akarabira imbere y’

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu, ati<  Jyeweho nta cyaha kindiho ku bw’ amaraso y’uyu muntu w’umukiranutsi; biraba ibyanyu.>

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu bose barasubiza bati< Amaraso ye natubeho no ku bana bacu. Maze ababohorera Baraba, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaze gukubita Yesu imikoba, aramutanga ngo abambwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze abasirikare b’umutegeka bajyana Yesu mu rukiko, bamuteraniraho ingabo zose; baramucuza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamwambika umwenda w’umuhemba, baboha ikamba ry’amahwa, barimwambika mu mutwe,
