content.speaker: all
content.text: n’urubingo mu kuboko kwe kw’iburyo, baramupfukamira, baramushinyagurira, bati< Ni amahoro,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami w’Abayuda!” Bamucira amancandwe , benda rwa rubingo, baramukubita mu mutwe. Bamaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumushyinyagurira, bamwambura wa mwenda, bamwambika imyenda ye, bamujyana kumubamba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bagisohoka bahura n’Umunyakurene witwaga Simoni; uwo bamuhata kujyana nabo, ngo yikorere

content.speaker: all
content.text: umusaraba wa Yesu. Bageze ahitwa I Goligota, hasobanurwa ngo: I Nyabihanga, bamuha vino ivanze

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’indurwe, ngo anywe, Asogongeye yanga kuyinywa. Bamaze kumubamba, bagabana imyenda ye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: barayifindira. Bicara aho baramurinda. Bashyira hejuru y’umutwe we ibirego bamureze, byanditswe ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: “UYU NI YESU UMWAMI W’ABAYUDA.” Maze abambuzi babiri bababambana na we, umwe I buryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’undi I bumoso. Abahisi baramutuka, bamuzunguriza imitwe, baravuga bati< Wowe usenya urusengero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukarwubaka mu minsi itatu, ikize; niba uri Umwana w’Imana, manuka uve ku umusaraba. Abatambyi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakuru n’abanditsi n’abakuru nabo bamushinyagurira batyo bati, yakijije abandi, ntabasha kwikiza. Kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari Umwami w’abisirayeli, namanuke ave ku umusaraba nonaha, natwe turamwemera. Yiringiye Imana;

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngaho nimukize nonaha, niba imukunda; kuko yavuze ati<  Ndi Umwana w’Imana. N’abambuzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: babambanywe na we nabo bamutuka batyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uhereye mu isaha ya gatandatu haba ubwirakabiri mu gihugu cyose kugeza mu isaha ya cyenda. Maze

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu isaha ya cyenda Yesu avuga ijwi rirenga ati< Eli, Eli, Iama sabakitani? Bisobanurwa ngo, Mana yanjye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni iki kikundekesheje? Ariko bamwe mu bari bahagaze aho babyumvise baravuga bati, Umva wa mugabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: arahamagara Eliya. Uwo mwanya umwe muri bo arirukanka, yenda sipongo, ayuzuza inzoga isharira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ayishyira ku urubingo, arayimushomesha. Ariko abandi bati< ba uretse turebe ko Eliya aza kumukiza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko Yesu yongera kuvuga ijwi rirenga, aratanga.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwenda ukingiriza ahera cyane h’urusengero utabukamo kabiri, utangirira hejuru ugeza hasi, isi

content.speaker: all
content.text: iratigita, ibitare birameneka, ibituro birakinguka, intumbi nyinshi z’abera bari basinziriye zirazurwa, bava

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bituro; maze amaze kuzuka, binjira mu murwa wera, babonekera benshi. Umutware utwara umutwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’abasirikare n’abari kumwe nawe barinda Yesu, babonye igishyitsi n’ibibaye, baratinya cyane bati< Ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukuri uyu yari umwana w’Imana.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WO GUPFA KWA KRISTO

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: AMASENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, twebwe abana bawe turakwinginze, ujye uturebana imbabazi, kuko ari kubwacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yemeye kugambanirwa no gutangwa mu maboko y’abanyabyaha, no gupfira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku umusaraba. None ariho, abana naw ku ngoma hamwe n’Umwuka wera, muri Imana imwe iteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishibora byose kandi ihoraho, ni Wowe wahaye Itorero ryawe ryose Umwuka wawe ngo aritegeke

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi aryeze. Nuko emera amasengesho yacu tugusabiye abantu bo mu itorero ryawe ryera b’uburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwose, kugira ngo umuntu wese wo muri ryo, mu byo akora byose, ajye ahora agukorerana umurava,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akubashye. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kandi Umukiza wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA y’imbabazi, Muremyi w’abantu bose, kandi Mukunzi w’ibyo waremye byose, turagushimira yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: udakunda ko umunyabyaha apfa, ahubwo ushaka ko aguhindukirira, akagira ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginze, ugirire imbabazi Abayuda, n’Abasiramu, n’abatizera, kandi abayoba bose, ukure mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mitima yabo kujijwa kose no kunangirwa, kandi no kugaya Ijambo ryawe. Nuko ubagarure mu mukumbi

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe, Mwami wacu ushimwa, bakizanywe n’igice gisigaye cy’Abisirayeli nyakuri, bahinduke umukumbi

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe umwe, kandi baragirwe n’Umwungeri umwe, Yesu Kristo, uhorana nawe n’Umwuka wera, muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                  Abaheburayo 10:1-25

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBWO amategeko  ari igicucu cy’ibyiza bizaza, akaba adafite ishusho yabyo ubwayo, nta bwo yabasha

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutunganya rwose abegera igicaniro, abatunganishije ibitambo bahora batamba uko umwaka utashye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iyo abibasha , ntibabe bakimenyaho ibyaha. Ahubwo bahora bibutswa ibyaha byahon’ibyo bitambo, uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwaka utashye. Erega ntibishoboka ko amaraso y’amapfizi n’ay’ihene akuraho ibyaha. Ni cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyatumye, ubwo Yesy yazaga mu isi. Avuga ati< Ibitambo n’amaturo ntimwabishatse , ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wanyiteguriye umubiri. Ntiwishimiye ibitambo byokeje cyangwa ibitambo by’ibyaha: mperaka ndavuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: nti ‘Dore ndaje, Mana, ( Mu muzingo w’igitabo ni ko byanditswe kuri jye), Nzanywe no gukora ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushaka’>. Amaze kuvuga ibyo ngo < ibitambo n’amaturo n’ibitambo byokeje n’ ibitambo byibaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntiwabishatse, kandi ntiwabyishimiye> ( ari byo bitambwa nk’uko amategeko yategetse), aherako

content.speaker: all
content.text: aravuga ati < Dore nzanywe no gukora ibyo ushaka.> Akuriraho ibya mbere gukomeza ibya kabiri. Uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: gushaka kw’Imana ni ko kwatumye twezwa, tubiheshejwe n’uko umubiri wa Yesu watambwe rimwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusa ngo bibe bihagije iteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi umutambyi wese ahagarara iminsi yose akora umurimo we, atamba kenshi ibitambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bidahinduka bitabasha iteka kugira ubwo bikuraho ibyaha. Ariko wa wundi amaze gutamba igitambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kimwe cy’iteka cy’ibyaha, yicara iburyo bw’Imana, ahera ubwo arindira igihe abanzi be bazashyirirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: munsi y’ibirenge bye. Kuko abezwa yabatunganishije rwose igitambo kimwe kugeza iteka ryose. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka Wera ni we mugabo wo kuduhamiriza ibyo. Amaze kuvuga ati “iri ni ryo sezerano

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzasezerana nab o hanyuma y’iyo minsi, ni ko Uwiteka avuga, nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu mitima

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabo, kandi mu bwenge bwabo ni ho nzayandika,” arongera ati “ Ibyaha byabo n’ubugome bwabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: sinzabyibuka ukundi.” Noneho rero ubwo ibyo bibababariwe , ntihakiriho kongera gutamba ibitambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’ibyaha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko , bene Data, ubwo dufite ubushizi bw’ubwoba bwo kwinjizwa Ahera cyane n’amaraso ya Yesu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tunyuze mu nzira yaduciriye nshya kandi y’ubugingo, inyura mu mwenda ukinze, ni wo mubiri we; kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo dufite umutambyi ukomeye, utwra inzu y’Imana, twegere dufite imitima y’ukuri twizera rwose

content.speaker: all
content.text: tudashidikanya, imitima yacu iminjiriweho gukurwamo  kwimenyaho ibibi, n’imibiri yacu yuhagijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: amazi meza. Dukomeze kwatura ibyiringiro byacu tutanyeganyega, kuko uwasezeranije ari uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwizerwa, kandi tujye tuzizirikana  ubwacu, kugira ngo duterane ishyaka ryo gukundana n’iry’imirimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: myiza. Twe kwirengagiza guteranira hamwe, nk’uko bamwe bajya bagira, ahubwo duhugurane, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko mubonye urya munsi wegera, mube ari ko murushaho kugenza mutyo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                    Yohana 19:1-37.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO Pilato aherako ajyana Yesu, amukubita imikoba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abasirikare baboha ikamba ry’amahwa, barimwambika mu mutwe, bamwambika n’umwenda

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’umuhengeri. Baramwegera, baramubwira bati< Ni amahoro , Mwami w’Abayuda! Bamukubita inshyi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pilato yongera gusohoka, arababwira ati <Dore ndamusohoye, ndamubazaniye, ngo mumenye yuko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: nta cyaha mubonyeho.” Nuko Yesu asohoka yambaye ikamba ry’amahwa n’umwenda w’umuhengeri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pilato arababwira ati “ Uwo muntu nguyu!” Abatambyi bakuru n’abasikare bamubonye batera hejuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: bati < Mubambe! Mubambe!” Pilato arabawira ati < Mube ari mwe mumujyana, mumubambe; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: jyewe ntamubonyeho icyaha .” Abayuda baramusubiza bati bati < Dufite itegeko, kubw’iryo tegeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: akwiriye gupfa, kuko yigize Umwana w’Imana .” Pilato yumvise ibyo arushaho gutinya. Nuko yongera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwinjira mu rukiko, maze abaza Yesu ati < Wavuye he?” ariko Yesu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza. Pilato

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubaza ati < Uranyihorera? Ntuzi yuko mfite ububasha bwo kukurekura, kandi ko mfite ububasha

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwo kukubbamba?” Yesu aramusubiza ati < ntiwagira ububasha bwo kugira icyo untwara, utabuhawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: buvuye mu ijuru; ni cyo gituma ukungabije akurusha icyaha.” Uhereye ubwo Pilato ashaka uburyo bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumurekura. Ariko Abayuda batera hejuru bati< Nurekura uyu, uraba uteri inshuti ya Kayisari; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuntu wese wigize umwami, aba agomeye Kyisari. Nuko Pilato yumvise ibyo, asohora Yesu yicara ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntebe y’imanza ahantu hitwa Amabuye ashashwe, mu Ruheburayo hitwa Gabata. (Ubwo hari ku munsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo kwitegura ibya pasika, hari nk’isaha esheshatu). Nuko abwira Abayuda ati,< nguyu umwami, wanyu!”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Na bo batera hejuru bati < Mukurho, umubambe!” Pilato ararbabaza ati< Mbese, mbambe umwmi

content.speaker: all
content.text: wnyu?” Abatambyi bakuru baramusubiza bati < Nta mwami dufite keretse Kayisari.” Aherako

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubaha , ngo abambwe. Nuko bajyana Yesu, asohoka yiyikoreye umusaraba , agera ahantu hitwa I

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyabihanga, mu Ruheburayo hitwa I Gologota. Bamubambanaho n’abandi babiri, hirya no hino, Yesu ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahagati. Pilato yandika urwandiko, arushyira ku musaraba, rwanditswe ngo, YESU W’INAZARETI,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMWAMI W’ ABAYUDA. Urwo rwandiko benshi mu bayuda barabusoma, kuko ahantu babambye Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: hari bugufi bw’umurwa, kandi rwari rwanditswe mu Ruheburayo, no mu Ruroma, no mu Rugiriki. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: abatambyi bakuru b’Abayuda babwira Pilato bati < Ntiwandike ngo, ‘Umwami w’Abayuda;’ ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wandi uti ‘ yiyise umwami w’Abayuda.’” Pilato arasubiza ati < Icyo nanditse nacyanditse.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko abasirikare, bamaze kubamba Yesu, bajyana imyambaro ye, bayigabanyamo kane,

content.speaker: all
content.text: umusirikare wese umugabane we; ariko hasigara ikanzu ye. Iyo kanzu ntiyari ifite umubariro, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yari iboshywe yose, uhereye hejuru ukageza hasi. Nuko baravugana bati< Twe kuyitanyagura, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuyifindire, turebe uri bube nyirayo uwo ari we.” Bavuze ibyo, ngo ibyanditswe bisohore ngo “Bagabanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyenda yanjye, kandi bafindira umwambaro wanjye.” Nuko abasirikare babigenza batyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyina wa Yesu na nyina wabo na Mariya muka kilopa na Mariya Magadarina bari bahagaze ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: musaraba wa Yesu. Nuko Yesu abonye nyina n’ umwigisha yakundaga ahagaze bugufi, abwira nyina ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: <Mubyeyi, nguyu umwana wawe.” Maze abwira uwo mwigisha ati < Nguyu nyoko.” Uhereye uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwanya, uwo mwigishwa amujyana iwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma y’ibyo Yesu Aminaye yuko noneho byose birangiye, agira ngo ibyanditswe bisohore

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwose, ni ko kuvuga ati “ Mfite inyota.” Hari hateretse ikibindi cyuzuye vino isharira. Nuko benda

content.speaker: all
content.text: sipongo yuzuye iyo vino isharira, bayishyira ku rubingo, barayimushomesha. Yesu amaze gusoma iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: vino, aravuga ati <Birarangiye.” Acurika umutwe, umutima uraca.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwo munsi wari uwo kwitegura Pasika kandi Abayuda ntibashakaga ko imibiri iguma ku misaraba

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku isabato, kuko iyo sabato yari umunsi mukuru; niko gusaba Pilato kubavuna amaguru, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babamburwe. Abasirikare baraza, babanza kuri umwe, bamuvuna amaguru, n’undi wari ubambanywe na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we bamugenza batyo; ariko bageze kuri Yesu, basanga amaze gupfa, ntibamuvuna amaguru. ariko umwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri bo amucumita icumu mu rubavu; uwo mwanya havamo amaraso n’amazi. Uwabibonye ni we

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubihamije, kandi ibyo ahamya n’ibyukuri, kandi azi ko avuga ukuri ngo namwe mwizere. Kuko ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: byabereyeho kugira ngo ibyanditswe bisohore ngo “ Nta gufa rizavunwa.” Byongeye kandi ibindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: byanditswe, biravuga ngo “ Bazabona uwo bacumitse.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI UBANZIRIZA UWO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                    I Petero 3:17,22

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Matayo 27:57,65

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WO KUZUKA KWA KRISTO

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu gihe cyo Gusenga kwa mugitondo, mu cyimbo cya Zaburi 95 “Nimuze turirimbire Uwiteka”, ibi bice

content.speaker: all
content.text: aribyo bivugwa cyangwa biririmbwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: PASIKA yacu yatambwe ni we Kristo ;nuko rero tujye tuzirikana iminsi mikuru, tudafite umusemburo wa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kera, cyangwa umusemburo  ni wo gomwa n’ ikibi,ahobwo tugire imitsima  idasembuwe, ni yo kuri no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kutaryarya

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1 Abakorinto 5:7,8.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tuzi yuko Kristo amaze kuzuka atagipfa; urupfu rukaba rutakimufiteho ububasha;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Urwo rupfu yapfuye yarapfuye rimwe risa ku bw’ibyaha; ariko ubwo ariho,ariho ku bw’ Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abe ari ko namwe mwiyumvamo mwapfuye ku byaha. Mukaba muriho ku Mana muri kristo Yesu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abaroma 6:9,11

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko noneho Kristo yarazutse, ni we muganura w’abasinziriye;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko ubwo urupfu rwazanywe n’umuntu, ni ko no kuzuka kw’ abapfuye kwazanywe n’umuntu. Nk’ uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose bokojwe gupfa na Adamu, ni ko bose bazahindurwa bazima na Kristo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1 Abakorinto 15:20,22

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana ,n’icy’umwuka Wera. Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbere, n’ ubu niko kiri, kandi niko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amina

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wanesheje urupfu Umwana wawe  w,ikinege Yesu Kristo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukamutwugururishiriza irembo ry’ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko turakwinginze twitonze, nk’uko ubuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwawe butujya imbere, ukabushyirisha mu mitima yacu gushaka ibyiza, abe ari ko gufasha kwawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kudasiba kuduhesha kubisohoresha nrza ingeso nziza. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                     Abakorosayi 3:1-7

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO rero, niba mwarazuranywe na Kristo, mujye mushaka ibiri hejuru, aho Kristo ari yicaye iburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’Imana. Mujye muhoza umutima ku biri hejuru, Atari ku biri mu isi, kuko mwapfuye, kandi ubugingo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanyu bukaba bwarahishanywe na Kristo mu Mana. Kandi ubwo Kristo, ari we bugingo bwacu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: azerekanwa, namwe muzaherako mwerekanwe na we muri mu bwiza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko noneho mwice ingeso zanyu z’ibyisi: gusambana, no gukora ibiteye isoni, no kurigira, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurarikira, n’imyifurize yose, ari yo gusenga ibigirwamana; ibyo ni byo bizanira umujinya w’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: abatumvira. Kandi namwe mwabigenderamo kera, ubwo mwahoraga muri byo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 20:1-10

content.speaker: all
content.text: KU WA mbere w’iminsi irindwi, mu rubungabungo hatarabona, Mariya Magadarena aza ku gitoro,

content.speaker: all
content.text: asanga igitare gikuwe ku gituro. Arirukanka, asanga Simoni Petero na wa mwigishwa wundi Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: yakundaga, arababwira ati “ Bakuye Umwami Yesu mu gituro, kandi ntituzi aho bamushize.” Petero

content.speaker: all
content.text: asohokana na wa mwigishwa wundi, bajya ku gituro. Bombi birukira icyarimwe; ariko uwo mwigishwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: asiga Petero, aba ari we ubanza kugera ku gituro. Arunama, arungurukamo, abona imyenda y’ibitare

content.speaker: all
content.text: ishyizwe hasi, ariko ntiyinjiramo. Maze Simoni Petero na we aza amukurikiye, yinjira mu gituro, abona

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyenda y’ibitare ishyizwe hasi, n’igitambaro cyari mu mutwe we kidashyizwe hamwe n’imyenda

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ibitare, ahubwo cyari kizinze kiri ukwacyo hirya. Ni cyo cyatumye na wa mwigishwa wundi wabanje

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugera ku gituro, na we yinjira. Abibonye, yizera ibyo yabwiwe na wa mugore; kuko bari batarAminaya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyanditswe, ko akwiriye kuzuka. Maze abigishwa basubirayo, bajya iwabo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA MBERE UKURIKIRA UWO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 10:34-43

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Luka 24:13-35

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA KABIRI UKURIKIRA UWO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 13:26-41

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Luka 24:36-48

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 1 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA WA TWESE ushobora byose, turagushimira yuko watanze umwana wawe w’ikinege, ngo apfire

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukuraho ibicumuro byacu, azurirwe kugira ngo dutsindishirizwe. Nuko uduhe kwikuramo igitubura, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo gomwa n’ikibi, tukajya tugukorerana ingeso zitunganye n’umurava iminsi yose. Tubisabye mu Izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina

content.speaker: all
content.text: URWANDIKO         1Yohani5:4-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: ICYABYAWE n’Imana cyose kinesha iby’isi; kandi uku ni ko kunesha kwanesheje iby’isi, n’ukwizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwacu. Ni nde unesha iby’isi keretse uwizera yuko Yesu ari Umwana w’Imana? Ni we Yesu Kristowaje,

content.speaker: all
content.text: agaca mu mazi n’amaraso, si mu mazi yonyine, ahubwo ni amazi n’amaraso nayo. Kandi Umwuka ni we

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubihamya, kuko Umwuka ari ukuri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibihamya ni bitatu, Umwuka n’amazi n’amaraso; kandi ibyo bitatu birahuje. Ubwo twemera ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu bahamya, ibyo Imana ihamya birabiruta, kuko ibyo Imana ihamya ari bibi, ari uko yahamije

content.speaker: all
content.text: iby’Umwana wayo. Uwizera Umwana w’Imana aba afite uko guhamya muri we; naho utizera Imana aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: ayise umunyabinyoma, kuko atemeye ibyo Imana yahamije ku Mwana wayo. Kandi uko guhamya ni uku,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni uko Imana yaduhaye ubugingo buhoraho, kandi ubwo bugingo bubonerwa mu Mwama wayo. Ufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwo Mwami ni we ufite ubwo bugingo, naho udafite Umwana w’Imana nta bugingo afite.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA     Yohana 20:19-23

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO kuri uwo munsi bugorobye, ari wow a mbere w’iminsi irindwi, abigishwa bari bateraniye mu nzu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: inzugi zikinze kuko b atinyaga Abayuda; Yesu araza, ahagarara hagati yabo, arababwira ati< Amahoro

content.speaker: all
content.text: abe muri mwe!” Amaza kuvuga atyo, abereka ibiganza bye n’urubavu rwe. Abigishwa babonye Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: baranezerwa. Yesu yongera kubabwira ati < Amahoro abe muri mwe! Uko Data yantumye, ni ko nanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbatumye.” Amaze kuvuga atyo, abahumekeraho, ati “ Nimwakire Umwuka Wera. Abo muzababarira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe; abo mutazabibabarira bose, bazaba batabibabariwe.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 2 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishoborabyose, turagushimira yuko watangiye Umwana wawe w’ikinege kutubera igitambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kiducungura ibyaha, kandi icyitegererezo cy’ingeso nziza. Nuko uduhere ubuntu kugira ngo tujye

content.speaker: all
content.text: tugerageza iminsi yose kugera ikirenge mu cye, mgo tube abera,nk’uko ari  Uwera. Tubisabiye mu izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO    1 Petero 2:18-25

content.speaker: all
content.text: BAGARAGU b’imbata, mugandukire ba shobuja mububashye rwose, Atari abeza n’abagira ineza gusa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo n’ibigoryi; kuko igishimwa ari uko umuntu yakwihanganira imibabaro bamuhoye ubusa, azize

content.speaker: all
content.text: umutima utunganiye Imana. Ariko se, niba mwihanganira gukubitwa ibpfunsi babahora icyaha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzashimwa ki? Icyakora, nimukora neza , akaba ari byo mubabarizwa, mukabyihanganira, ibyo ni byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana ishima; kandi ibyo nibyo mwahamagariwe, kuko na Kristo yababarijwe, akabasigira icyitegererezo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo mugere mu kirenge mu cye. Nta cyaha yakoze, nta n’uburiganya bwabonetse mu kanwa ke;

content.speaker: all
content.text: yaratutswe, ntiyasubiza; yarababajwe, ntiyabakangisha; ahubwo aritanga yiha Idaca urwa kibera. Ubwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: yikoreye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we, abibambanwa ku giti kugira ngo dupfe ku byaha, duhereko tubeho

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku gukiranuka. Imibyimba ye ni yo yabakijije. Kuko mwari nk’intama zizimiye, ariko none mukaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwagarukiye Umwungeri w’ubugingo bwanyu, ni we Murinzi wabwo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 10:11-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni Jye mwungeri mwiza. Umwungeri mwiza apfira intama ze; ariko uragirira ibihembo, uteri umwungeri

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwite, kandi n’intama Atari ize, iyo abonye isega rije, asiga intama, agahunga, isega rikazifata,

content.speaker: all
content.text: rikazitatanya. Kuko ari uw’ibihembo, arahunga, ntiyite kun tama. Ni jye mwungeri mwiza, kandi menya

content.speaker: all
content.text: izanjye, izanjye zikAminaya , nk’uko Data Aminaya, nanjye nkamumenya; kandi mfira intama zanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mfite n’izindi ntzmz zitari izo muri uru rugo; na zo nkwiriye kuzizana; zizumva ijwi ryanjye, kandi zizaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: umukumbi umwe, zigire umwungeri umwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 3 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko umurikishiriza abayobye umucyo, ari wo by’ukuri byawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo bibayobore inzira yo gukiranuka. Nuko abinjijwe mu mukumbi wa Kristo bose, bagihinduka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingingo z’umubiri we, bakigishirizwa muri wo ibihura n’iby’ukuri bye, ubahe kuzinukwa ibinyurana n’ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bemera, bagakurikiza ibihura nabyo. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                  1 Petero 2:11-17

content.speaker: all
content.text: BAKUNDWA, ndabahugura, ubwo muri abasuhuke n’abimukira; kugira ngo mwirinde irari ry’umubiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’uburyo bwinshi rirwanya. Mugire ingeso nziza hagati y’abapagani, kugira ngo, nubwo babasebya

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk’abakora nabi, ni babona imirimo yanyu myiza, izabatere guhimbaza Imana ku munsi wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugenderwamo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mugandukire ubutware bwose bw’abantu ku bw’umwami wacu, naho yaba umwami, kuko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: we usumba bose, cyangwa abatware, kuko ari bo batumwe na we guhana inkozi z’ibibi no gushima

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakora neza. Kuko ibyo Imana ishaka  ari uko muzibishaabantu b’abapfapfa, batagiraicyo bAminaya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukora neza kwanyu, mumeze nk’ab’umudendezo koko, ariko uwo mudendezo mutawutwikirije ibibi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo mugenze nk’imbata z’Imana. Mwubahe abantu bose, mukunde bene Data, mwubahe Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwubahee umwami.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:16-22

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be ati < Hasigaye igihe gito, ntimumbone; maze hazabaho ikindi gihe gito,

content.speaker: all
content.text: mumbone.> Bamwe mu bigishwa be barabazanya bati<Ibyo atubwiye ni ibiki? Ngo ‘Hasigaye igihe gito,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntimumbone; maze hazabaho igihe gito mumbone;’ kandi bati < Ibyo ni ibiki ngo ‘igihe gito?’ Ntituzi ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: avuga. Yesu Aminaye ko bashaka kumubaza, arababaza ati < Murabazanya ibyo mbabwiye ibyo, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ‘Hasigaye igihe gito, ntimumbine; maze hazabaho ikindi gihe gito mumbone?’ Ni ukuri, ni ukuri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ndababwira yuko mwebweho muzarira mukaboroga, ariko ab’isi bazanezerwa; mwebweho muzababara,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ariko umubabaro wanyu uzahinduka umunezero. Umugore iyo aramukwa, arababara, kuko igihe cye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gisohoye; ariko, iyo umwana amaze kuvuka, ntaba akibuka kuribwa, kuko anenejwe n’uko umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: avutse mu isi. Ni ko namwe mubabara none, ariko nzongera kubobonana namwe, kandi imitima yanyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: izanezerwa; n’umunezero wanyu nta muntu uzawubaka.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 4 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko ari Wowe wenyine ushobora gutegeka imitima y’abanyabyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: itagondeka. Nuko rero, twebwe abantu bawe, uduhe gukunda ibyo utegeka, tukishimira ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wasezeranije, kugira ngo naho iby’iyi si  bigenda bihindagurika, imitima yacu ihame muri wowe, aho

content.speaker: all
content.text: umunezero nyakuri ubonerwa. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO Yakobo 1:17-21

content.speaker: all
content.text: GUTANGA kose kwiza n’impano yose itunganye rwose ni byo biva mu ijuru, bimanuka bituruka kuri Se

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’imicyo udahinduka, cyangwa ngo agore n’igicucu cyo guhinduka. Yatubyarishije ijambo ry’ukuri nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabigambiriye, kugira ngo tube nk’umuganura w’ibiremwa byayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero, bene Data bakundwa, umuntu wese yihutire kumva, ariko atinde kuvuga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi atinde kurakara; kuko uburakari bw’abantu budasohoza ibyo gukiranuka kw’Imana. Ubwo bimeze

content.speaker: all
content.text: bityo mwiyambura imyanda yose n’ububi busaze, Mwakirane ubugwaneza ijambo ryatewe muri mwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ribasha gukiza ubugingo bwanyu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:5-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO none ndajya ku Uwantumye, kandi muri mwe ntawe umbaza ati <Urajya he?> Ariko kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbabwiye ibyo, imitima yanyu yuzuye agahinda.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko ndababwira ukuri yuko ikizagira icyo kibamarira, ari uko ngenda; kuko nintagenda, Umufasha

content.speaker: all
content.text: atazaza aho muri; ariko ningenda, nzamubohererza. Ubwo azaza azatsinda ab’isi, abemeza iby’icyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibyo gukiranuka n’iby’amateka, n’iby’icyaha, kuko batanyizeye: n’ibyo gukiranuka, kuko njya kwa Data,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi namwe muzaba mutakimbona; n’iby’amateka, kuko umutware w’ab’iyi si aciriweho iteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndacyafite ibyo kubabwira byinshi, ariko ubu ntimubasha kubyihanganira. Uwo Mwuka w’ukuri naza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: azabayobora mu kuri kose, kuko atazavuga ku bwe, ahubwo ibyo azumva, ni byo azavuga; kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azababwira ibyenda kubaho. Uwo azanyubahiriza, kuko azenda ku byanjye, akabibabwira. Ibyo Data

content.speaker: all
content.text: afite byose ni ibyanjye, ni cyo gitumye mvuga nti “Azenda ku byanjye, abibabwire.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 5 IKURIKIRA IYO KUZUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, tuzi yuko ari wowe ibyiza byoze bikomokaho. Ni cyo gitumye twebwe abantu bawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukwingingira, kugira ngo Umwuka wawe wera atume imitima yacu ihugukira mu byiza, kandi ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’imbabazi azwe atuyobore, tubone uko twasohoza ibyo byiza. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO               Yakobo 1:22-27

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO  rero, mujye mukora iby’iryo jambo, Atari ugupfa kuryumva gusa mwishuka; kuko uwumva ijambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusa, ntakore ibyaryo, ameze nk’umuntu urebeye mu maso he mu ndorerwamo. Amaze kwireba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akagenda, uwo mwanya akiyibagirwa uko asa. Ariko uwitegereza mu mategeko atunganye rwose atera

content.speaker: all
content.text: umudendezo, agakomeza kugira umwete wayo, Atari uwumva gusa akibagirwa, ahubwo ari uyumvira, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: we uzahabwa umugisha mu byo akora. Umuntu ni yibwira ko ari umunyadini, ntagenge erurimi rwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo akishuaka mu mutima, idini ry’uwo muntu riba ari ubusa. Idini ritunganye kandi ritanduye

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere y’Imana Data wa twese ni iri: ni ugura imfubyi n’abapfakazi mu mibabaro yabo, no kwirinda no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwirinda kutanduzwa n’isi.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 16:23-33

content.speaker: all
content.text: NI UKURI, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye, azakibaha. Kugeza

content.speaker: all
content.text: none nta cyo mwasabye mu izina ryanjye. Musabe, muzahabwa, ngo umunezero wanyu ube wuzuye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo mbibabwiriye mu migani, ariko igihe kizaza, sinzavuganira namwe mu migani, ahubwo nzababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibya Data neruye. Uwo munsi muzasaba mu izina ryanjye; kandi simbabwira ko nzabasabira kuri Data,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko na we abakunda ubwe, kuko mwankunze, mukizera yuko navuye ku Mana. Navuye kuri Data, nza

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu isi; kandi isi ndayivamo, nsubire kuri Data. Abigishwa baravuga bati “Dore noneho ureruye, nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugani uduciriye. Ubu tuzi yuko uzi byose, kandi ko utagomba ko umuntu wese agira icyo akubaza, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo gituma twizera ko wavuye ku Mana .” Yesu arabasubiza ati “ None murizeye? Dore igihe kirenda

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusohora, ndetse kirasohoye, ubwo muri butatane, umuntu wese ukwe, mukansiga njyenyine. Ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: sindi jyenyine, kuko Data ari kumwe nanjye. Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo mugire amahoro muri jye. Mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: isi mugira umubabaro, ariko nimuhumure, nanesheje isi.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WO KUZAMUKA KWA KRISTO

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, twemeye yuko Uwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo yazamutsenakajya mu ijuru.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko turakwinginga ngo abe ari ko uduha natwe kuzamuka, tukajyayo mu mutima no mu byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: dutekereza, ngo duhore tubana na we iteka. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO    Ibyakozwe 1:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: TEWOFILO we, Muri cya gitabo nanditse ibyo Yesu yabanje gukora no kwigisha byose, kugeza ku munsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yazamuriwe mu ijuru, amaze gutegeka intumwa yatoranije, azitegekesha Umwuka Wera. Amaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubabazwa, ababonekera ari muzima, atanga ibimenyetso byinshi, agumya kubabonekera mu minsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mirongo ine, avuga iby’ubwami bw’Imana. Nuko abateraniriza hamwe, abategeka kutava I Yerusalemu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati< Ahubwo murindire ibyo Data yasezeranije, ibyo nababwiye; kuko Yohana yabatirishaga amazi, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwebweho mu minsi mike muzabatirishwa Umwuka Wera”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko bamaze guterana, baramubaza bati< Mbese, Mwami, iki ni cyo gihe wenda kugaruriramo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwami mu Bisirayeli?” Arasubiza ati: “Si ibyanyu kumenya iby’iminsi cyangwa ibihe Data yegennye, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware bwe wenyine. Icyakora muzahabwa imbaraga, Umwuka Wera nabamanukira; kandi muzaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: abagabo bo kumpamya I Yerusalemu n’I Yudaya yose, n’I Samamariya no kugeza ku mpera y’isi. “Amaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuvuga atyo, azamurwa bakimureba, igicu kiramukingiriza. Bakiraramye batumbira mu ijuru, akigenda,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abagabo babiri barababonekera, bahagaze I ruhande rwabo bambaye imyenda year. Barababaza bati <

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yemwe bagabo b’I Galilaya, ni iki gitumye muhagaze mureba mu ijuru? Yesu ubakuwemo akazamurwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru, azaza atyo, nk’uko mumubonye ajya mu ijuru.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Mariko 16:14-20

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBWANYUMA abonekera abigishwa be cumi n’umwe bicaye bafungura; abagaya ku bwo kutizera kwabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kunangirwa kw’imitima kwabo, kuko batemereye abamubonye amaze kuzuka. Arababwira ati< Mujye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bihugu byose, mwigishe abaremwe bose ubutumwa bwiza. Uwizera akabatizwa azakizwa; ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: utizera azacirwaho iteka. Kandi ibimenyetso bizagumana n’abizera ngibi: bazirukana abadayimoni mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: izina ryanjye, bazavuga indimi nshya, bazafata inzoka, kandi ni banywa ikintu kica, nta cyo kizabatwara

content.speaker: all
content.text: na hato, bazarambika ibiganza ku barwayi, bakire.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko Umwami Yesu, amaze kuvugana nab o, ajyanwa mu ijuru, yicara iburyo bw’Imana. Abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: barasohoka, bigisha hose, Umwami Yesu ari kumwe nabo abafasha, akomeresha ijambo rye ibimenyetso

content.speaker: all
content.text: byagendanaga na ryo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO IKURIKIRA UMUNSI WO KUZAMUKA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, Mwami w’icyubahiro, twibuka yuko washyize hejuru Umwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukamuzamurana icyubahiro cyinshi, ukamujyana mu bwami bwawe bwo mu ijuru. Nuko turakwinginze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntudusige nk’imfubyi, ahubwo udutumeho Umwuka wawe Wera, ngo aduhumurize, adufashe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: atuzamure, atujyane ahantu umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yatubanjirije kujya, ni we utegekana nawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO       1Petero 4:7-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: IHEREZO rya byose riri bugufi; kuko mugire ubwenge, mwirinde ibisindisha, mubone uko mugira umwete

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo gusenga. Ariko ikiruta byose mukundane urukundo rwinshi, kuko urukundo rutwikira ibyaha byinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mucumbikirane, mutitotomba; kandi nkuko umuntu yahawe impano, abe ari ko muzigaburana, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikwiriye ibisonga byiza by’ubuntu bw’Imana bw’uburyo bwinshi. Umuntu navuga, avuge nk’ubwirijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Imana; nagabura ibyayo, abigabure nk’ufite imbaraga Imana itanga. Kugira ngo Imana ihimbazwe muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose ku bwa Yesu Kristo, nyir’icyubahiro n’ubutware iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Yohana 15:26-16:4

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUFASHA naza, uwo nzaboherereza ava kuri Data, ni we Mwuka w’ukuri ukomoka kuri Data,

content.speaker: all
content.text: azampamya ; kandi namwe mumpamye, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere mwari kumwe nanjye. Icyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbabwiriye ibyo ni ukugira ngo hatagira ikibagusha. Bazabaca mu masinagogi, kandi igihe kigiye kuza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uzabica wese azibwira ko akoreye Imana umurimo. Kandi ibyo bazabibakorera batyo, kuko batAminaye

subsections.title: PENTEKOTE , NI WO MUNSI W’UMWUKA WERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data, nanjye Nanjye ntibAminaye. Ariko ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo igihe cyabyo ni kigera, muzibuke

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko ari jye wabibabwiye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: PENTEKOTE , NI WO MUNSI W’UMWUKA WERA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, turagushimira yuko wohereje abantu bawe bakwizeye umucyo w’Umwuka wawe Wera, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigishe, nkuko twibuka uyu munsi. Nuko turakwingingira ko uwo Mwuka aduhesha guhitamo ibyiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri byose, no kujya twishimira guhumuriza kwe kwera iminsi yose. Tubisabye ku bw’imirimo myiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo Yesu Umukiza wacu yadukoreye, uhorana nawe ku ngoma mu bumwe bw’uwo Mwuka, muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 2:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI wa pentekote usohoye, bose bari bari hamwe mu mwanya umwe bahuje umutima. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuriri ubatungura uvuye mu ijuru, umeze nk’uw’umuyaga uhuha cyane, ukwira inzu bari bicayemo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Haboneka indimi zigabanije zisa n’umuriro, ururimi rujya ku muntu wese wo muri bo. Bose buzuzwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwuka Wera, batangira kuvuga izindi ndimi, nk’uko Umwuka yahabaye kuzivuga .

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muri Yerusalemu habaga Abayuda b’abaturage b’abanyadini, bari baraturutse mu mahanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose ari munsi y’ijuru. Uwo muriri ubaye, abantu benshi baratererana, batangazwa n’uko umuntu wese

content.speaker: all
content.text: yumvise ba bandi bavuga ururimi rw’iwabo. Barumirwa bose, baratangara bati <Mbese aba bose bavuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: si Abanyagalilaya? None se ni iki gitumye twese tubumva bavuga indimi z’iwacu za kavukire? Kandituri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abapariti n’ Abelamiti n’abatuye I Mesapotamiye n’I Yudaya n’i Kapadokiya n’I Ponto no mu Asiya n’I

content.speaker: all
content.text: Furugiya n’I Pamfiliya no muri Egiputa no mu guhugu cy’I Libiya gihereranye n’I Kurene, n’Abaroma

content.speaker: all
content.text: b’abashyitsi n’Abayuda n’abakomeza idini yabo, kandi n’Abakirete n’Abarabu, turabumva bavuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibitangaza by’Imana mu ndimi z’iwacu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA Yohana 14:15-31

content.speaker: all
content.text: NIMUNKUNDA, muzitondera amategeko yanjye; nanjye nzasaba Data, na we azabaha undi mufasha wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubana namwe ibihe byose, ni we Mwuka w’ukuri. Ntibishoboka ko ab’isi bamuhabwa, kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: batamurora, kandi batamuzi; ariko mwebweho muramuzi, kuko abana namwe, kandi azaba muri mwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sinzabasiga nk’imfubyi, ahubwo nzaza aho muri. Hasigaye umwanya muto ab’isi ntibabe bakimbona,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ariko mwebweho muzambona; kuko ndiho, namwe muzabaho. Uwo munsi muzamenya  ko ndi muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data, namwe mukaba muri jye, nanjye nkaba muri mwe. Ufite amategeko yanjye, akayitondera, ni we

content.speaker: all
content.text: unkunda; kandi unkunda azakundwa na Data, najye nzamukunda, mwiyereke. Yuda, uteri Isikariyota,

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubaza ati <Databuja, bibaye bite ko ugiye kutwiyereka, ntiwiyereke ab’isi?” Yesu aramusubiza ati <

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuntu nankunda, azitondera ijambo ryanjye, na Data azamukunda; tuzaza aho ari, tugumane na we.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko utankunda, ntiyitondera amagambo yanjye; kandi iryo jambo mwumvise si iryanje, ahubwo n’irya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wantumye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo mbibabwiye nkiri kumwe namwe, ariko Umufasha, ni we Mwuka Wera, uwo Data azatuma mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: izina ryanjye, ni we uzabigisha byose, abibutse ibyo nababwiye byose. Mbasigiye amahoro, amahohoro

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanjye ndayabahaye. Icyakora simbaha nk’uko ab’isi batanga. Imitima yanyu ntihagarare, kandi ntitinye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwumvise uko nababwiye nti ‘Ndagenda, nzagaruka aho muri.’ Iyaba mwankundaga, muba munejejwe

subsections.title: UMUNSI WA 1 WO MU CYUMWERU CYA

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’uko njya kwa Data, kuko Data anduta. Nuko rero mbibabwiye bitaraba, ngo ubwo bizaba, muzizere.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sinkivugana namwe byinshi, kuko umutware w’ab’isi aza, kandi nta cyo amfiteho; ahubwo nkora uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data yantegetse, kugira ngo ab’isi bAminaye, ko mukunda. Nimuhaguruke, tuve hano.>

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA 1 WO MU CYUMWERU CYA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: PENTEKOTE

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho ni rimwe n’iry’umunsi wa Pentekote

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO         Ibyakozwe   10:34-38

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                   Yohana3:16-21

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA 2 WO MUYUMWERU CYA PENTEKOTE

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe  8:14-17

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 10:1-10

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO Y’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byoseidashira, twebwe abantu bawe turagushimira yuko wadufashije kwemera

content.speaker: all
content.text: iby’ukuri waduhishuriye, tukAminaya yuko uri Ubutatu buhoraho, ari bwo Data wa twese n’Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka Wera, tukabuhamirisha kwemera kwacu. Kandi turagushimira yuko watwigishije ko ubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Butatu ari Imana imwe. None turagusenga, dushima Ubumana bwawe bukomeye. Nuko turakwinginze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uturinde dukomeze kwizera ibyo byose, kandi ujye uturinda ibyago byose byadutera, ni Wowe Mnan

content.speaker: all
content.text: ihoraho uri ku ngoma, kandi uri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO    Ibyahishuriwe yohana

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: HANYUMA  y’ibyo, ngiye kubona mbona mu ijuru urugi rukinguye, kandi numva rya jwi nabanje kumva

content.speaker: all
content.text: rivugana nanjye, rimeze nk’iry’impanda, rimbwira riti “Zamuka uze hano, nkwereke ibikwiriye kuzabaho

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: hanyuma y’ibyo.” Muri ako kanya mba mu Mwuka. Nuko mbona intebe y’ubwami iteretswe ,mu ijuru,

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbona n’Uyicayeho. Uwari uyicayeho yasaga n’ibuye ryitwa yasipi n’iryitwa sarudiyo; kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: umukororombya wari ugose iyo ntebe, usa na simarigido. Iyo ntebe yari igoswe n’izindi ntebe

content.speaker: all
content.text: myakumyabiri n’enye; kuri izo ntebe mbona abakuru makumyabiri na bane bazicayeho, bambaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyenda yera, no ku mitwe yabo bari bambaye amakamba y’izahabu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuri ya ntebe y’ubwami haturukaga imirabyo n’amajwi no guhinda kw’inkuba; kandi amatabaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: arindwi yaka umuriro yamurikiraga imbere y’iyo ntebe hariho igisa n’inyanja y’ibirahuri isa n’isarabwayi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi hagati y’iyo ntebe no kuyizenguruka hari ibizima bine byuzuye amaso imbere n’inyuma. Ikizima

content.speaker: all
content.text: cya mbere cyasaga n’intare, icya kabiri gisa n’ikimasa, icya gatatu cyari gifite mu maso hasa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ah’umuntu, naho icya kane cyasga n’ikizu kiguruka. Ibyo bizima uko ari bine bifite amababa atandatu

content.speaker: all
content.text: atandatu, byuzuye amaso impande zose no mu nda; ntibiruhuka ku manywa na nijoro, ahubwo bihora

content.speaker: all
content.text: bivuga biti, “Uwera Uwera Uwera, ni Mwami Imana ishobora byose; ni yo yahozeho, kandi iriho,kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: izahoraho.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo bizima bihaye iyicara kuri ya ntebe ihoraho iteka ryose, icyubahiro no guhimbazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ishimwe, ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bikubita imbere y’Iyicara kuri ya  ntebe, bakaramya ihoraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: iteka ryose, bakajugunya amakamba yabo imbere y’iyo ntebe , bavuga bati, “Mwami wacu Mana yacu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukwiriye guhabwa icyubahiro no guhimbazwa n’ubutware koko, kuko ari Wowe waremye byose. Igituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: biriho, kandi icyatumye biremwa, ni uko wabishatse.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                        Yohana 3:1-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: HARIHO umuntu wo mu bafarisayo witwaga Nikodemo, umutware wo mu Bayuda.yasanze Yesu nijoro,

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubwira ati, “Mwigisha, tuzi yuko uri umwigisha wavuye ku Mana, kuko ari ntawubasha gukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibimenyetso ujya ukora, keretse Imana iri kumwe na we.” Yesu aramusubiza ati, “Ni ukuri , ni ukuri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe ubwa kabiri atabasha kubona ubwami bw’Imana”. Nikodemo

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubaza ati, “Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kubyarwa akuze. Yakongera agasubira mu nda ya nyina ,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabyarwa?” Yesu aramusubiza ati, “Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe n’amazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka, atabasha kwinjira mu bwami bw’Imana. Ikibyarwa n’umubiri nacyo n’ umubiri, n’ikibyarwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka nacyo n’umwuka. Witangazwa n’uko nkubwiye yuko bibakwiriye kubyarwa ubwa kabiri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuyaga uhuha aho ushaka, ukumva guhuha kwawo, aeiko ntumenye aho uva cyangwa ujya. Ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwabyawe n’Umwuka wese amera.” Nikodemo aramusubiza ati,” Ibyo byashoboka bite?” Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramusubiza ati, “ Ukaba uri umwigisha w’Abisirayeli, ntumenye ibyo! Ni ukuri ,ni ukuri ndakubwira yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuvuga ibyo tuzi, kandi duhamya ibyo twabonye: nyamara ntimwemera ibyo duhamya. Ubwo nababwiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: iby’isi, ntimwemere, nimbabwira iby’ijuru, muzemera mute? Nta wazamutse ngo ajye mu ijuru, keretse

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwana w’umuntu wavuye mu ijuru, akamanuka akza mu isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nkuko Mose yamanitse inzoka mu butayu, niko Umwana w’umuntu akwiriye kumanikwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo umwizera wese abone guhabwa ubugingo budashira. Kuko Imana yakunze abari mu isi cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: byatumye itanga Umwana wayo w’ikinege, kugira ngo umwizera wese atarimbuka, ahubwo ahabwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugingo buhoraho.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 1 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, ni wowe mbaraga y’abakwingingira bose, turakwinginze wemerane imbabazi ibyo tugusaba;

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi kuko integer nke za kamere yacu ishira zitubuza kugira icyiza cyose dukora tudafashijwe nawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: emera kudufashisha ubuntu bwawe, kugira ngo tukunezereshe kwitondera amategeko yawe, ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: dushaka gukora n’ibyo dukora na byo bishimwe nawe. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: URWANDIKO               1 Yohana4:7-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: BAKUNDWA, dukundane, kuko urukundo ruva ku Mana. Umuntu wese ukunda yabyawe n’Imana, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azi Imana. Udakunda ntazi Imana, kuko Imana ari urukundo. Iki nicyo cyerekanye urukundo rw’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri twe: ni uko Imana yatumye Umwana wayo w’ikinege mu isi, kugira ngo tubone uko tubeshwaho

content.speaker: all
content.text: nawe. Muri iki ni mwo urukundo ruri: si uko twebwe twakunze Imana, ahubwo ni uko Imana ari yo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yadukunze, igatuma Umwana wayo kuba impongamo y’ibyaha byacu. Bakundwa, ubwo Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: yadukunze ityo, natwe dukwiriye gukundana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uhereye kera kose ntihigeze kubaho umuntu wabonye Imana; nyamara ni dukundana, Imana iguma

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri twe, urukundo rwayo rutunganirizwa muri twe rwose. Iki nicyo kitumenyesha ko yuguma muri yo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nay o ikaguma muri twe, ni uko yaduhaye ku Mwuka wayo. Natwe twarabibonye, kandi duhamya ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wa twese yatumye Umwana we kuba Umukiza w’abari mu isi. Uvuga yuko Yesu ari Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Imana, Imana iguma muri we, na we akaguma mu Mana. Natwe twAminaye kandi twizeye urukundo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana idukunda. Imana ni urukundo, kandi uguma mu rukundo aguma mu Mana, Imana ikaguma muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: we. Ibyo ni byo bimaze gutunganya rwose urukundo muri twe, kugira ngo tuzatinyuke ku munsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’amateka, kuko uko ari , ari ko turi muri iyi isi. Mu rukundo ntiharimo ubwoba, ahubwo urukundo

content.speaker: all
content.text: rutunganijwe rwose rumara ubwoba, kuko ubwoba buzana igihano, kandi ufite ubwoba ntiyari yashikira

content.speaker: all
content.text: urukundo rutunganijwe rwose. Turayikunda, kuko ari yo yabanje kudukunda. Umuntu navuga ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Nkunda Imana,” akanga mwene Se, yabonye, atabasha gukunda Imana atabonye. Kandi dufite iri

content.speaker: all
content.text: tegeko ryavuye kuri yo, ngo ukunda Imana, akunde na mwene Se.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Luka 16:19-31

content.speaker: all
content.text: HARIHO umutunzi wambaraga imyenda y’imihengeri n’iy’ ibitare byiza, iminsi yose yahoraga adamaraye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi hariho n’umukene witwaga Lazaro, wahoraga aryamye ku muryango w’uwo mukire, umubiri we

content.speaker: all
content.text: wuzuyeho ibisebe. Imbwa na zo zarazaga zikamurigata mu bisebe; kandi yifuzwaga guhazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ubuvungukira buva ku meza y’uwo mutunzi. Bukeye umukene arapfa, abamarayika bamujyana mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: gituza cya Aburahamu; n’umutunzi na we arapfa, arahambwa. Ageze ikuzimu, arababazwa cyane;

content.speaker: all
content.text: yubuye amaso, areba Aburahamu ari kure, na Lazaro ari mu gituza cye. Arataka ati< Aburahamu

content.speaker: all
content.text: sogokuru, mbabarira, wohererze Lazaro, akoze isonga y’urutoke rwe mu tuzi, atonyagirize ku rurimi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko mbabzwa n’uyu muriro.” Aburahamu aramubwira ati <Mwana wanjye, ibuka yuko wahawe ibyiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: byawe ukiriho; Lazaro na we yahawe ibibi; none aguwe neza hano, naho wowe urababazwa cyane. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: uretse n’ibyo, dore, hariho umworera munini bikabije hagati yacu namwe, washyiriweho kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abashaka kuva hano kuza aho muri batabibasha, kandi n’abava aho batagera hano. Na we ati<

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndakwinginze, sogokuru, ngo nibura umwohereze kwa data, kuko mfite bana data batanu; ababurire,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo nab o batazaza aha hantu ho kubabarizwa cyane. “ Aburahamu aramubwira ati “ Bafite Mose

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abahanuzi, babumvire.” Na we ati “oya, sogokuru Aburahamu, ahubwo nihagira uzuka akabasanga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazihana.” Aramubwira ati “ Nibatumvira Mose n’abahanuzi, ntibakwemera baho umuntu yazuka.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 2 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI Mana, turagushimira yuko ari ntabwo ubura gufasha no gutegeka abana bawe urera ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakubahe iteka, kandi bagukunde. Nuko turakwinginze, ujye uturinda, udutabare, utegekeshe ibyacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwenge bwiza bwinshi, uduhe kujya twubaha izina ryaweryera, tukarikunda. Tubisabye mu izina rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO              1Yohana 3:13-24

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, ntimutangazwe n;uko ba’isi babanga. Twebwe tuzi yuko twavuye mu rupfu tukagera mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bugingo, kuko dukunda bene Data. Udakunda aguma mu rupfu. Umuntu wese wanga mwene se ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwicanyi ; kandi muzi yuko ari nta mwicanyi ufite ubugingo buhoraho muri we. Iki nicyo kitumenyesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: urukundo icyo ari cyo, ni uko Yesu yatanze ubugingo bwe ku bwacu; natwe ikidukwiriye ni uko twatanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugingo bwacu ku bwa bene Data.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko se, ufite ibintu byo mu isi, akareba ko mwene se akennye, akamukingira imbabazi ze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: urukundo rw’Imana rwaguma muri we gute? Bana bato, twe gukundana urumamo mu magambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa ku rurimi, ahubwo dukundane mu byo dukora no mu by’ukuri. Icyi ni cyo kizatumenyesha ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turi ab’ukuri, tukabona uko duhumuriza imita yacu imbere yayo, nubwo imitima yacu iducira urubanza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko Imana iruta imitima yacu, kandi izi byose. Bakundwa, imitma yacu nitaducira urubanza, turatinyuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere y’Imana , kandi icyo dusaba cyose tugihabwa nay o, kuko twitondera amategeko yayo, tugakora

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibishimwa imbere yayo. Itegeko ryayo ni iri; ni uko twizera izina ry’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tugakundana, nk’uko yadutegetse. Kandi uwitondera amategeko yayo aguma muri yo, nay o ikaguma

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri we ; kandi ikitumenyesha ko iguma muri twe, ni Umwuka yaduhaye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Luka 14:16-24

content.speaker: all
content.text: HARIHO umuntu watekeshaje ibyo kurya byinshi, ararika benshi. Igihe cyo kurya gisohoye, atuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugaragu we kubwira abararitswe ati, “Nimuze,kuko bimaze kwitegurwa.” Bose batangira gushaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: impamvu z’urwitwazo bahuje umutima. Uwambereati, “ naguze umurima, nkwiriye kuwureba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ndakwinginze, mbabarira.” Undi ati, “ Naguze amapfizi cumi yo guhinga, ngiye kuyagerageza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ndakwinginze, mbabrira.” Undi ati, “ Narongoye, ni cyo gituma ntabashakuza.” Nuko uwo mugaragu

content.speaker: all
content.text: agarutse abwira shebuja uko byagenze. Maze nyiri urugo ararakara, abwira umugaragu we ati,” Sohoka

content.speaker: all
content.text: vuba, ujye mu nzira nini n’into zo mu mudugudu uzane hano abakene n’ibirema n’impumyi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abacumbagira.” Umugaragu we agarutse aravuga ati,< Databuja, icyo utegetse ndagikoze; nyamara

content.speaker: all
content.text: haracyari umwanya w’abandi.” Shebuja abwira umugaragu we ati< sohoka ugende mu nzira

content.speaker: all
content.text: nyabagendwa no mumihora, ubahate kwinjira, kugira ngo urugo rwanjye rwuzure. Ndababwira yuko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: nta muntu wo muri ba bararikwa uzarya ibyo nabiteguriye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 3 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI MANA, turakwinginze, utwumvane imbagazi, kandi ubwo waduhaye umutima ukunda cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusenga, uduhumurize, uko tuzabona akaga kose cyangwa ibyago byose; kandi ujye uturindisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutabara kwawe gukomeye. Tubisabye mu izina tya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                1 Petero 5:5-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWESE mukenyere kwicisha bugufi, kugira ngo mukomerane, kuko Imana irwanya abibone, naho

content.speaker: all
content.text: abicisha bugufi ikabahera ubuntu. Nuko mwicisha bugufi muri munsi y’ukuboko gukomeye kw’Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo ibashyire hejuru mu gihe gikwiriye. Muyikoreze amaganya yanyu yose, kuko yita kuri mwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwirinde ibisindisha, mube maso, kuko umurezi wanyu Satani azerera nk’intare yivuga, ashaka uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: aconshomera. Mumurwanye mushikamye, kandi mufite kwizera gukomeye, muzi yuko bana Data bari

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu isi muhuje imibabaro. Kandi Imana, igira ubuntu bwose yabahamagariye ubwiza bwayo buhoraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: buri muri Kristo, izabatunganya rwose ubwayo, ibakomeze, ibongerere imbaraga, nimumara kubabazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: akanya gato. Icyubahiro n’ubutware bibe ibyayo iteka ryose. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA              Luka 15:1-10

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO abakoresha b’ikoro bose n’abanyabyaha baramwegera ngo bamwumve. Abafarisayo n’abanditsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: barabyivovotera bati < uyu yiyegereza abanyabyaha, kandi agasangira nabo.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abacira uyu mugani ati < Ni nde muri mwe waba afite intama ijana, akazimiza imwe muri zo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntiyasiga izindi mirongo urwenda n’icyenda mu gasozi, akajya gushaka iyazimiye, kugeza aho

content.speaker: all
content.text: aribuyibonere? Iyo ayibonye, ayiterera ku bitugu yishimye; yagera mu rugo, agahamagara inshuti ze

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abaturanyi be, akababwira ati ‘Twishimane, kuko mbonye intama yanjye yari yazimiye.’ Ndababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko mu ijuru bazishimira batyo umunyabyaha umwe wihannye kumurutisha abakiranuka mirongo

content.speaker: all
content.text: urwenda n’icyenda badakwiriye kwihana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa umugore waba afite ibice cumi by’ifeza, yaburamo kimwe, ntiyakongeza

content.speaker: all
content.text: itabaza, agakubura mu nzu, akagira umwete wo gushaka kugeza aho akibonera? Iyo akibonye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahamagara inshuti ze n’abaturanyi be, akababwira ati “ Twishimane, kuko mbonye igice nari nabuze.’

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndababwira yuko ari ko haba umunezero mwinshi imbere y’abamarayika b’Imana bishimira

content.speaker: all
content.text: umunyabyaha umwe wihannye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 4 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, ni wowe Murinzi w’abakwiringira bose; ni wowe wenyine imbaraga zibonerwamo, kandi nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: wubasha kuba uweraadafashwa na we. Nuko, nk’uko ari wowe udutegeka, utuyobore, turakwinginze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ugwize imbabazi zawe kuri twe, uzidusagirize, kugira ngo duce mu by’iyi si bishira vuba dukora ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushima, uburyo butuma tutazabura ibyiza byo mu ijuru bidashira. Uduhe ibyo, Data wa twese wo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijuru, kuko tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO           Abaroma 8:18-23

content.speaker: all
content.text: MBONYE yuko imibabaro y’iki gihe idakwiriye kugereranywa n’ubwiza tuzahishurirwa; kuko ndetse

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibyaremwe byose bitegerazanya amatsiko guhishurwa kw’abana b’Imana. Kuko ibyaremwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: byashyizwe mu bubata bw’ibitagira umumaro; icyakora si ku bw’ubushake bwabyo, ahubwo ni ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwubushake bw’Uwabubushyizemo; yiringira yuko nabyo bizaturwa kuri ubwo bubata bwo kubora,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikinjira muri uwo mudendezo w’ubwiza bw’abana b’Imana. Tuzi yuko ibyaremwe byose binihira hamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikaramukirwa hamwe kugeza ubu; ariko ibyo bias, ahubwo natwe abafite umuganura w’Umwuka ,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tunihira mu mitima yacu, dutegereza guhindurwa abana b’Imana, ari ko gucungurwa kw’imibiri yacu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                  Luka 6.36-42

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUGIRIRANE imbabazi, nk’uko so na we azigirira; kandi ntimugacire abandi urubanza mu mitima yanyu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo namwe mutazarucirwa; kandi ntimugatsindishe, namwe mutazatsindishwa; mubabarire

content.speaker: all
content.text: abandi, namwe muzababarirwa; mutange, namwe muzahabwa; urugero rwiza rutsindagiye, rucugushije,

content.speaker: all
content.text: rusesekaye, ni rwo muzagererwa, kuko urugero mugereramo ari rwo muzagererwamo namwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abacira umugani, ati <Mbese impumyi yabasha kurandata indi mpumyi? Zombi ntizagwa mu mwobo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwigishwa ntaruta umwigisha, ahubwo umwigisha wese, iyo atunganye rwose mu byo yigishijwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amera nk’umwigisha we. Ni ki gituma ureba agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mwenen so, ukirengagiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugogo uri mu ryawe? Wabasha ute kubwira mwene so, uti ‘Mwene data, henga ngutokore agatotsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: kari mu jisho ryawe,’ nawe nturebe umugogo uri mu ryawe? Wa ndyarya we! Banza wikuremo umugogo

content.speaker: all
content.text: uri mu jisho ryawe, abe ari ho ubona uko utokora agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mwene so.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 5 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI MANA, turakwinginze, ujye utegeka ibibaho muri iyi si, bitungane neza, kugira ngo Itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryawe rigukorerane ibyishimo, rikubashye kandi rituje. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO 1 Petero 3:8-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: IBISIGAYE, mwese muhuze imitima, mubabarane, kandi mukundane nk’abavandimwe, mugirirane

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbabazi mwicisha bugufi mu mitima . ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye cyangwa igitutsi yabatutse;

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo mumwiture kumusabira umugisha, kuko ari byo mwahamagariwe, kugira ngo namwe muragwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugisha. Kuko byanditswe ngo “ Ushaka gukunda ubugingo  no kubona iminsi myiza, abuze ururimi

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwe rutavuga ikibi, n’iminwa ye itavuga iby’uburiganya. Kandi azibukire ibibi, akore ibyiza, ashake

content.speaker: all
content.text: amahoro, ayakurikire kugira ngo ayashyikire. Kuko amaso y’Uwiteka ari ku bakiranutsi, n’amatwi ye ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku byo basaba. Ariko igitsure cy’Uwiteka kiri ku nkozi z’ibibi.” Mbese ni nde uzabagirira nabi, ni mugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ishyaka ry’ibyiza? Icyakora, nubwo mwababazwa babahora gukiranuka, mwaba muhiriwe. Ntimugatinye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo babatinyisha, kandi ntimugaharike imitima; ahubwo mwubahe Kristo mu mitima yanyu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Luka 5:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU yari agahagaze mu kibaya cy’inyanja Y’ I Genesereti; abantu benshi bamubyiganiraho, ngo bumve

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijambo ry’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abona amato abiri atitse ku nkombe y’inyanja, ariko abarobyi bari bayavuyemo, bamesa inshundura

content.speaker: all
content.text: zabo. Yikira mu bwato bumwe bwari ubwa Simoni, amusaba kubutsuraho hato ngo buve ku nkombe;

content.speaker: all
content.text: aricara, yigisha abantu ari mu bwato, arangije kuvuga, abwira Simoni ati <igira imuhengeri, mujugunye

content.speaker: all
content.text: inshundura, murobe.” Simoni aramusubiza ati <Databuja, twakesheje ijoro dukora cyane nyamara nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo twafashe. Ariko kuko ubivuze, reka nzijugunye.” Babikoze  bafata ifi nyinshi cyane, ndetse

content.speaker: all
content.text: inshundura zabo zenda gucika. Barembuza bagenzi babo bari mu bundi bwato, ngo baze babatabare;

content.speaker: all
content.text: baraza, buzuza amato yombi, bituma yenda kurengerwa. Simoni Petero, ngo abibone atyo, yikubita

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere ya Yesu, ati <Va aho ndi, Databuja, kuko ndi umunyabyaha.” Kuko ubwe yari yumiwe n’abari

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumwe na we bose, babonye izo fi bafashe; na Yakobo na Yohana bene Zebedayo, bari bafatanije na

content.speaker: all
content.text: Simoni, nabo birabatangaza. Yesu abwira Simoni, ati< Witinya; uhereye none uzajya uroba abantu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bamaze kugeza amato yabo ku nkombe, basiga byose, baramukurikira,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 6 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, watunganirije abagukunda ibyiza biruta ibyo umuntu wese yAminaya n’ubwenge bwe. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginze, gwiza urukundo mu mitima yacu, kugira ngo dukunde tukurutisha  ibindi byose, tubone

content.speaker: all
content.text: guhabwa ibyo wasezeranije biruta ibyo twabasha kwifuza byose, ku bwa Yesu Kristo. Amina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: URWANDIKO   Abaroma 6:-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: NTIMUZI yuko twese ababatirijwe muri Yesu Kristo, twabatwirijwe no mu rupfu rwe? Nuko rero ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’umubatizo twahambanywe na we mu rupfu rwe, kugira ngo, nk’uko Kristo yazuwe n’ubwiza bwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wa twese, abe ari na ko natwe tugendera mu bugingo bushya. Ubwo twateranijwe na we gusangira

content.speaker: all
content.text: urupfu nk’urwe, ni ko tuzaba duteranujwe na we gusangira kuzuka nk’ukwe. Kandi tumenye iki, yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umunru wacu wa kera yabambanywe na we, kugira ngo umubiri w’ibyaha ukurweho, twe kugumya kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbata z’ibyaha; kuko uwapfuye aba atsindishirijwe ibyaha. Ariko niba twarapfanye na Kristo, twizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko tuzabanaho na we, kuko tuzi yuko Kristo, amaze kuzuka, atagipfa; urupfu rukaba rutakimufiteho

content.speaker: all
content.text: urutabi. Urwo rupfu yapfuye, yarapfuye rimwe risa ku bw’ibyaha, ariko ubwo ariho, ariho ku bw’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abe ari ko namwe mwiyumvamo ko mwapfuye ku byaha, mukaba muriho ku Mana muri Kristo Yesu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Matayo 5:20-26

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ndababwira ko gukiranuka kwanyu ni kutaruta ukw’abanditsi n’ukw’Abafarisayo, mutazinjira mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwami bwo mu ijuru. Mwumvise ko abakera babwiwe ngo “ntukice, uwica akwiriye guhanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abacamanza. Ariko jyeweho ndababwira yuko umuntu wese urakarira mwene se akwiriye guhanwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abacamanza; uzatuka mwene se ati< Wa gicucu we” Akwiriye gushyirwa mu muriro w’I Gehinomu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko nujyana ituro ryawe ku gicaniro, ukahibukira mwene so ko afite icyo mupfa, usigeyo ituro ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere y’igicaniro ubanze ugende wikiranure na mwene so, uhereko ugaruke uture ituro ryawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wikiranure vuba n’ukurega mukiri mu nzira; ukurega ye kugushyikiriza umucamanza, umucamanza

content.speaker: all
content.text: ataguha umusirikare, akagushyira mu nzu y’imbohe. Ndakubwira ukuri yuko utazavamo rwose, keretse

content.speaker: all
content.text: wishyuye umwenda wose, hadasigaye ikuta na rimwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 7 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI MANA, nyir’imbaraga, ni wowe urema ibyiza byose, ni wowe ubitanga. Tera mu mitima yacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukunda izina ryawe, nk’uko ingurukira iterwa mu giti, utugwizemo idini y’ukuri, utubeshesheho kugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: neza kwawe kose, kandi ku bw’imbabazi zawe ujye ubiturindiramo tutabitezukaho. Tubisabye mu Izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO              Abaroma 6:19-23

content.speaker: all
content.text: IBYO mbivuze nk’umuntu ku bw’intege nke z’imibiri yanyu kuko, nk’uko mwahaga ibiteye isoni

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ubugome ingingo zanyu kuba imbata zabyo, bigatuma muba abagome, abe ari ko na none muha

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukiranuka ingingo zanyu kuba imbata zako, kugira ngo mwezwe. Ubwo mwari mukiri imbata z’ibyaha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntimwatwarwaga no gukiranuka. Mbese icyo gihe mweraga imbuto ki, zitari ibibakoza isoni ubu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaherezo yaybyo akaba ari urupfu. Ariko noneho, ubwo mwabatuwe ku byaha, mukaba imbata

content.speaker: all
content.text: z’Imana , mwifitiye imbuto zanyu, ari zo kwezwa, kandi amaherezo yanyu ni ubugingo buhoraho; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibihembo by’ibyaha ari urupfu, ariko impano y’Imana ni ubugingo buhoraho muri Yesu kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Mariko 8:1-9

content.speaker: all
content.text: MURI IYO minsi abantu benshi bongeye guterana, ntibabona ibyo kurya; Yesu ahamagara abigishwa be,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababwira ati “ Aba bantu banteye impuhwe, kuko uyu munsi ari uwa gatatu turi kumwe, none bakaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: badafite ibyo kurya. Nu mbasezerera ngo basubire iwabo biriwe ubusa, baragwira isari mu nzira; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamwe ari abakure .” abaza abigishwa be ati: “Mufite imitsima ingahe? “ Baramusubiza bati: <Ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: irindwi,> ategeka abantu ko bicara hasi, yenda iyo mitsima irindwi, arayishimira, arayimanyagura, ayiha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigishwa be, ngo bayibashyire; barayibaha. Bari bafite n’udufi duke; na two aradushimira, ategeka ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: batubaha. Bararya, barahaga, bateranya ubuvungukira busigaye, bwuzura ibitebo birindwi. Bari

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk’ibihumbi bine. Arabasezerera.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 8 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, uhora utegeka ibyo mu ijuru n’ibyo mu isi byose, ubitegekesha ubwenge,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginze,twitonze, udukureho ibibasha kugira icyo bidutwara byose, uduhe ibitugirira umumaro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Ktristo. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO  Abaroma 8:12-17

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO RERO, bene Data, turimo umwenda, ariko si uwa kamere y’imibiri yacu, ngo dukurikize ibyayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko niba mukurikiza ibya kamere y’umubiri, muzapfa; ariko ni mwicisha Umwuka ingezo za kamere,

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzarama. Abayoborwa n’Umwuka w’Imana bose nibo bana b’Imana; kuko mutahawe umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’ububata ubasubiza mu bwoba, ahubwo mwahawe umwuka ubahindura abana b’Imana udutakisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuti “ Aba, Data!” Umwuka w’Imana ubwe ahamanya n’umwuka wacu, yuko turi  abana b’Imana; kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo turi abana bayo, turi n’abaragwa; ndetse turi abaragwa b’Imana, turi abaraganwa na Kristo, niba

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubabarana na we, ngo duhanwe ubwiza na we.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA:Matayo 7:15-21

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWIRINDE abahanuzi b’ibinyoma, baza aho muri basa n’intama, ariko imbere ni amasega aryana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MuzabAminayera ku mbuto zabo. Mbese hari abasoroma imizabibu ku mugenge, cyangawa imbuto

content.speaker: all
content.text: z’umutini ku gitovu? Nuko igiti cyiza cyera imbuto nziza, ariko igiti kibi cyera imbuto mbi. Igiti cyiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntikibasha kwera imbuto nziza, kandi n’igiti kibi ntikibasha kwera imbuto nziza. Igiti cyose kitera imbuto

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbuto nziza kiracibwa, kikajugunywa mu muriro. Nuko muzAbaminayera ku mbuto zabo. Umuntu wese

content.speaker: all
content.text: umbwira ati< Mwami, Mwani,” si we uzinjira mu bwami bwo mu ijuru, keretse ukora ibyo Data wo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijuru ashaka. Benshi bazambaza kuri uwo munsi bati < Mwami, Mwami, ntitwahanuraga mu izina ryawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntitwirukanaga abadayimoni mu izina ryawe, ntitwakoraga ibitangaza byinshi mu izina ryawe? Ni bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzaberurira nti <Sinigeze kubAminaya, nimumve imbere, mwa nkozi z’ibibi mwe.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 9 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI Mana, twemeye yuko tutabasha gukora icyiza na kimwe tudafashijwe nawe. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginze, ugwize muri twe umutima ugambirira ibyiza tukabikra, kugira ngo tujye dukora ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushima dufashwa nawe. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, sinanshaka ko mutAminaya yuko basogokuruza bose bari munsi ya cya gicu, kandi yuko bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: baciye mu Nyanja yigabanije, bose bakabatirizwa muri icyo gicu no muri iyo Nyanja gutegekwa na Mose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose bagasangira bya byo kurya by’Umwuka na bya byo kunywa by’Umwuka; kuko banywaga ku gitare

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’Umwuka cyabakurikiraga, kandi icyo gitare cyari Kristo. Ariko benshi muri bo Imana ntiyabashimye; ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo cyatumye barimbukira mu butayu. Ariko ibyo byababereyo kugira ngo bitubere akabarore, ngo

content.speaker: all
