content.text: tutifuza ibibi, nku’uko bo babyifuje. Nuko rero, ntimugasenge ibishushanyo, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babisengaga, nkuko byanditswe ngo “Abantu bicajwe no kurya no kunywa, bahugurutswa no gukina.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ntimugasambane, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo basambanaga, bigatuma hapfa abantu inzovu ebyiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibihumbi bitatu ku munsi umwe. Kandi ntimukagerageze Umwami wacu, nk’uko bamwe bo muri bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamugerageje, bakicwa n’inzoka. Ntimukivovote, nk’uko bamwe muri bo bivovose, bakicwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umurimbuzi. Ibyo byabereyeho kutubera akabarore, kandi byandikiwe kuduhugura, twebwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: abasohoreweho n’imperuka y’ibihe. Nuko rero uwibwira ko ahagaze, yirinde atagwa. Nta kigeragezo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kibasha kubageraho kitari rusange mu bantu; kandi Imana ni iyo kwizerwa, kuko itazabakundira

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugeragezwa ibiruta ibyo mushobora, ahubwo hamwe n’ikibagerageza izabacira akanzu, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mubone uko mubasha kucyihanganira.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA : Luka 16:1-9

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be, ati <Hariho umutunzi wari ufite igisonga cye, bakimugeraho ko cyaya ibintu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bye. Aragihamagara, arakibwira ati “Ibyo nkumvaho ni ibiki?’ Murikira ibyo nakubikije, kuko utagikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuba igisonga cyanjye. Icyo gisonga kiribwira kiti ‘ Ko databuja aribunyage ubutware bwanjye, nkaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntashobora guhinga, nkagira isoni zo gusabiririza! Ndagira nte? Have! Nzi icyo nzakora, kugira ngo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nimara kunyagwa, bazandaze mu mazu yabo.’ Ahamagara ufite umwenda wa shebuja wese, abaza uwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbere ati< Harya databuja akwishyuza iki?’ Aramusubiza ati < Inshuro ijana z’amavuta y’elayo. Na we ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: < Enda urwandiko rwawe, wicare vuba, wandike mirongo itanu. Abaza undi ati < Harya wishyuzwa iki?’

content.speaker: all
content.text: Aramusubiza ati < Inshuro ijana z’amasaka.’ Aramubwira ati< Enda urwandiko rwawe, wandike mirongo

content.speaker: all
content.text: inani.’ Nuko shebuja ashima icyo gisonga kubi kuko cyakoze iby’ubwenge, kuko abana b’iyi si ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanyabwenge mu byo ku ngoma yabo kururta abana b’umucyo. Kandi ndababwira nti <Ubutunzi bubi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mubushakisha inshuti, kugira ngo, nibushira, bazabakire mu buturo bw’iteka.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 10 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI  MANA, twebwe abantu bawe turagusaba twitonze kugira ngo utegere amatwi amasengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: yacu, utwumvane imbabazi. Kandi uduhe kugusaba ibyo ushima, kugira ngo duhabwe ibyo dusaba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabe mu izina rya Yesu Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO       1 Abakorinto 12:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, ibyerekeye impano z’Umwuka sinshaka ko mutabimenya. Muzi yuko mukiri abapagani

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwayobyagwa, mukajya ku bigirwamana bitabasha kuvuga, uko mwabijyanywagaho kose. Ni cyo gituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbAminayesha yuko ari nta muntu ubwirijwe n’umwuka w’Imana uvuga ati < Yesu ni ikivume”, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: nta muntu ubasha kuvuga ati < Yesu ni Umwami, atabibwirijwe n’Umwuka Wera”.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyakore, hariho impano z’uburyo bwinshi, ariko Umwuka ni umwe. Kandi hariho uburyo bwinshi bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugabura iby’Imana, ariko umwami ni umwe. Hariho n’uburyo bwinshi bwo gukora, ariko Imana ikorera

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose muri byose ni imwe, umuntu wese agahabwa ikimwerekanaho Umwuka, kugira ngo bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bafashwe. Umwe aheshwa ijambo ry’ubwenge n’Umwuka, undi agaheshwa n’uwo Mwuka ijambo ryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumenya, undi agaheshwa n;uwo Mwuka kwizera, undi agaheshwa n’uwo Mwuka impano yo gukiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: indwara. Undi agahabwa gukora ibitangaza, undi agahabwa guhanura, undi agahabwa kurobanura

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyuka, undi agahabwa kuvuga indi nyinshi, undi agahabwa gusobanura indimi; ariko ibyo byose uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwuka ni we ubikorera muri bo, agabira umuntu wese uko ashaka.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA  Luka 19:41-46

content.speaker: all
content.text: AGEZE hafi, abona umurwa, arawuririra, ati < Uyu munsi nawe, iyo umenya ibyaguhesha amahoro! Ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: noneho bihishwe amaso yawe. Kuko iminsi izaza, ubwo abanzi bawe bazakubakaho uruzitiro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bazakugota, bazakurinda cyane impande zose; kandi bazagutsembana n’abana bawe batuye muri wowe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntibazagusigira ibuye rigeretse ku rindi, kuko utamenye igihe wagenderewe.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yinjira mu rusengero, atangira kwitukana abaguriragamo, arababwira ati< Handitswe ngo “Inzu

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanjye izaba iyo gusengerwamo; ariko mwebwe mwayihinduye isenga y’abambuzi.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko  yigishiriza mu rusengero iminsi yose.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISABATO YA 11 IKURIKIRA IY’UBUTATU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, turagushimira yuko cyane cyane werekanishishe imbaraga zawe zishobora byose kubabarira

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu no kubagirira ibambe. None uduhere ubuntu bwinshi ku bw’imbabazi zawe, kugira ngo duce mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzira amategeko yawe yadushyize imbere, duhabwe ibyiza wasezeranije ku bwo kugira neza kwawe;

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: hanyuma tuzahabwe umugabane w’ubutunzi bwawe bwo mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu. Amina.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO             1 Abakorinto 15:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, ndabAminayesha ubutumwa bwiza nababwirije ubwo mwakiriye mukabukomereramo, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugakizwa na bwo, niba mubukomeza, nkuko nabubabwirije; keretse mwaba mwizereye ubusa. Muzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko nabanje kubaha ibyo nanjye nahawe kumenya, yuko Kristo yapfiriye ibyaha byacu, nkuko byari

content.speaker: all
content.text: byaranditswe, agahambwa, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, nkuko byari byaranditswe na none;

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabonekera Kefa, maze akabonekera abo cumin a babiri; hanyuma akabonekera bene Data basaga

content.speaker: all
content.text: Magana atanu; muri abo benshi baracyariho n’ubu, ariko bamwe barasinziriye; yongera kubonekera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yakobo, abonekera n’izindi ntumwa zose. Kandi nyuma ya bose nanjye arambonekera, ndi nk’umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’icyenda, kuko noroheje hanyuma y’izindi ntumwa zose, ndetse ntibinkwiriye  ko nitwa intumwa, kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: narenganyaga Itorero ry’Imana. Ariko ubuntu bwayo nahwe ntibwabaye ubw’ubusa, ahubwo nakoze

content.speaker: all
content.text: imirimo myinshi iruta iya bose; nyamara si jye, ahubwo ni ubuntu bw’Imana buri kumwe nanjye. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: rero, ari jye, cyangwa bo, ibyo ni byo tubabwiriza, namwe ni ibyo mwizeye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA          Luka 18:9-14

content.speaker: all
content.text: UYU mugani Yesu yawuciriye abayiringiye ubwabo ko bakiranuka bagahinyura abandi bose. Ati <Abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: babiri bazamutse, bajya mu rusengero gusenga; umwe yari Umufarisayo, undi yari umukoresha w’ikoro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umufarisayo arahagarara, asengera mu mutima we, ati ‘Mana, ndagushimiye yuko ntameze nk’abandi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanyazi n’abakiranirwa n’abasambanyi, cyangwa ndetse n’uyu mukoresha w’ikoro. Mu minsi irindwi

content.speaker: all
content.text: hose niyiriza ubusa kabiri, ntanga kimwe mu icumi mu byo nungutse byose.’ Naho uwo mukoresha

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’ikoresha ahagarara kure, ntiyahagararo no kubura amaso ngo arebe mu ijuru, ahubwo yikubita mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: gituza, ati <Mana, mbabarira, kuko ndi umunyabyaha.’ Ndababwira yuko uwo muntu yamanutse ajya

content.speaker: all
content.text: iwe ari we utsindishirijwe kuruta wa wndi; kuko uwishyira hejuru azacishwa bugufi, ariko uwicisha bugufi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azashyirwa hejuru,”

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI WA MATIYASI WERA (Fev.24)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, uyu musi turibuka uko watoye umugaragu wawe umwizerwa Matiyasi kuba uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu mubare w´intumwa zawe icumi na babiri mu cyimbo cya Yuda wagambaniye Umwami wacu. None

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagusaba kugira ngo Itorero ryawe rihore ririndwa intumwa z’ibinyoma, kandi rigire abungeri kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bizerwa bo kuriyobora. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO           Ibyakozwe 1:15-26

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muri iyo minsi Petero ahagaze hagati ya bene Data, (umubare w'abantu bose bari bahateraniye bari

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'ijana na makumyabiri), aravuga ati"Bagabo bene Data, ibyanditswe byari bikwiriye gusohora, ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwuka Wera yahanuriye mu kanwa ka Dawidi kuri Yuda wayoboye abafashe Yesu, kuko yari

content.speaker: all
content.text: yarabazwe muri twe, agahabwa umugabane w'uyu murimo." (Kandi uwo muntu, amaze kugura isambu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku byo yahawe ho igihembo cyo gukiranirwa kwe, agwa yubamye araturika, amara ye yose arataraka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bimenyekana mu batuye i Yerusalemu bose, ni cyo cyatumye iyo sambu mu rurimi rwabo bayita

content.speaker: all
content.text: Akeludama, risobanurwa ngo"Isambu y'amaraso.") "Ndetse byanditswe mu gitabo cya Zaburi ngo 'Iwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: hasigare ubusa, Kandi he kugira undi uhaba.' Kandi ngo 'Ubusonga bwe bugabane undi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko muri abo twagendanaga iteka, ubwo Umwami Yesu yari akiri muri twe, uhereye ku kubatiza kwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yohana ukageza ku munsi Yesu yadukuriwemo azamuwe, bikwiriye ko umwe aba umugabo hamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: natwe wo guhamya kuzuka kwe." Bahitamo babiri, umwe ni Yosefu witwaga Barisaba, uwo bahimbye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yusito, undi ni Matiyasi. Barasenga bati"Mwami Mana, umenya imitima y'abantu bose, werekane uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: utoranije muri aba bombi abe intumwa, ahabwe uyu murimo Yuda yataye akajya ahe." Barabafindira,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubufindo bufata Matiyasi. Nuko abaranwa n'intumwa cumi n'imwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Matayo 11.25-30

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muri iyo minsi Yesu aravuga ati"Ndagushima Data, Mwami w'ijuru n'isi, kuko wahishe ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanyabwenge n'abahanga, ukabimenyesha abana bato. Ni koko Data, kuko ari ko wabishatse. "Byose

content.speaker: all
content.text: nabihawe na Data, kandi nta wuzi Umwana w'Imana keretse Se, kandi nta wuzi Se keretse Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'Imana, n'umuntu wese uwo Mwana ashatse kuyimenyesha. "Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nimuze munsange ndabaruhura. Mwemere kuba abagaragu banjye munyigireho, kuko ndi umugwaneza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi noroheje mu mutima, namwe muzabona uburuhukiro mu mitima yanyu, kuko kunkorera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kutaruhije, n'umutwaro wanjye utaremereye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUSI W’UMWARI MARIYA

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHIRIWE (Mars 25)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI Mana, turakwingize, ugwize mu mitima yacu ubuntu bwawe, kugira ngo, nk’uko ubutumwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwa marayika bwatumenyesheje ibyo kuvuka k’Umwama wawe Yesu Kristo, abe ari ko ubutumwa bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubabazwa kwe ko ku Musaraba buduhesha gufatana na we mu kuzuka kwe kw’icyubahiro. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo, Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO                 Yesaya 7 : 10-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka yongera kubwira Ahazi ati"Saba Uwiteka Imana yawe ikimenyetso, usabe icy'ikuzimu cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyo hejuru mu kirere." Ariko Ahazi aravuga ati"Nta cyo nsaba, singiye kugerageza Uwiteka." Yesaya

content.speaker: all
content.text: aravuga ati"Nimwumve yemwe mwa muryango wa Dawidi mwe, murushya abantu mukabona

content.speaker: all
content.text: biboroheye, none murashaka no kurushya Imana yanjye nayo ? Ni cyo kizatuma Uwiteka ubwe ari we

content.speaker: all
content.text: uzabihera ikimenyetso. Dore Umwari azasama inda, azabyara umwana w'umuhungu amwite izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imanweli. Amata n'ubuki ni byo bizamutunga kugeza aho azamenyera ubwenge bwo kwanga ibibi

content.speaker: all
content.text: agakunda ibyiza. "

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA   Luka 1 : 26-38

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, Marayika Gaburiyeli atumwa n'Imana mu mudugudu w'i Galilaya witwa i

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nazareti, ku mwari wari warasabwe n'umugabo witwaga Yosefu wo mu nzu ya Dawidi, izina ry'uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwari ni Mariya. Amusanga aho yari ari aramubwira ati"Ni amahoro Uhiriwe, Umwami Imana iri kumwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: nawe." Ariko we ahagarika umutima cyane w'iryo jambo, atekereza iyo ndamutso icyo ari cyo. Marayika

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubwira ati"Witinya Mariya, kuko uhiriwe ku Mana. Kandi dore uzasama inda, uzabyara umuhungu

content.speaker: all
content.text: uzamwite Yesu. Azaba mukuru, azitwa Umwana w'Isumbabyose kandi Umwami Imana izamuha intebe

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'ubwami ya sekuruza Dawidi, azima mu nzu ya Yakobo iteka ryose, ubwami bwe ntibuzashira." Mariya

content.speaker: all
content.text: abaza marayika ati"Ibyo bizabaho bite ko ntararyamana n'umugabo ?" Marayika aramusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati"Umwuka Wera azakuzaho, n'imbaraga z'Isumbabyose zizagukingiriza, ni cyo gituma Uwera uzavuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: azitwa Umwana w'Imana. Kandi dore mwene wanyu Elizabeti na we afite inda y'umuhungu yo mu za

content.speaker: all
content.text: bukuru, uwitwaga ingumba none uku ni ukwezi kwe kwa gatandatu, kuko ari nta jambo Imana ivuga ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: rihere." Mariya aramubwira ati"Dore ndi umuja w'Umwami Imana, bimbere uko uvuze." Nuko marayika

content.speaker: all
content.text: amusiga aho aragenda.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI WA MARIKO WERA (Avril 25)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wigishaga Itorero ryawe ryera imyigishirize Mariko Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanditse mu Butumwa bwe bwiza. None turagusaba kugira ngo tudateraganwa hirya no hino nk’abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bato n’imiyaga n’imyigishirize Yose idafite umumaro, tubone gukomezwa n’ukuri kuri mu Butumwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwabwe bwiza. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO     Abefeso 4 : 7-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO umuntu wese muri twe yahawe ubuntu nk'uko urugero rw'impano ya Kristo ruri. Ni cyo gituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: ivuga iti"Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano." Ariko iryo jambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo"Yazamutse mu ijuru" risobanurwa rite ? Ntirigaragaza yuko yabanje kumanuka ikuzimu ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwamanutse ni we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose, kugira ngo asohoze byose. Nuko aha bamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuba intumwa ze, n'abandi kuba abahanuzi, n'abandi kuba kugira ngo abera batunganirizwe rwose

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukora umurimo wo kugabura iby'Imana no gukomeza umubiri wa Kristo, bwiza, n'abandi kuba abungeri

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abigisha, kugeza ubwo twese tuzasohora kugira ubumwe bwo kwizera no kumenya Umwana w'Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi kugeza ubwo tuzasohora kuba abantu bashyitse bageze ku rugero rushyitse rw'igihagararo cya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo, kugira ngo tudakomeza kuba abana duteraganwa n'umuraba, tujyanwa hirya no hino n'imiyaga

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose y'imyigishirize, n'uburiganya bw'abantu n'ubwenge bubi, n'uburyo bwinshi bwo kutuyobya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo tuvuge ukuri turi mu rukundo, dukurire muri we muri byose. Uwo ni we mutwe, ari wo Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuri uwo ni ho Umubiri wose uteranywa neza, ugafatanywa n'uko ingingo zose zigirirana, nuko igice

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyose kigakora umurimo wacyo cyagenewe. Muri Kristo uwo ni ho umubiri ukura gukura kwawo, kugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo ukurizwe mu rukundo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 15 :1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: "NDI umuzabibu w'ukuri, kandi Data ni nyirawo uwuhingira. Ishami ryose ryo muri jye ritera imbuto

content.speaker: all
content.text: arikuraho, iryera imbuto ryose aryanganyaho amahage yaryo ngo rirusheho kwera imbuto. None

content.speaker: all
content.text: mumaze kwezwa n'ijambo nababwiye. Mugume muri jye, nanjye ngume muri mwe. Nk'uko ishami

content.speaker: all
content.text: ritabasha kwera imbuto ubwaryo ritagumye mu muzabibu, ni ko namwe mutabibasha nimutaguma muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: jye. "Ni jye muzabibu, namwe muri amashami. Uguma muri jye nanjye nkaguma muri we, uwo ni we

content.speaker: all
content.text: wera imbuto nyinshi, kuko ari nta cyo mubasha gukora mutamfite. Umuntu utaguma muri jye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ajugunywa hanze nk'ishami ryumye, maze bakayateranya bakayajugunya mu muriro agashya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimuguma muri jye amagambo yanjye akaguma muri mwe, musabe icyo mushaka cyose muzagihabwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo ni byo byubahisha Data, ni uko mwera imbuto nyinshi, mukaba abigishwa banjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uko Data yankunze ni ko nanjye nabakunze. Nuko rero mugume mu rukundo rwanjye. Nimwitondera

content.speaker: all
content.text: amategeko yanjye muzaguma mu rukundo rwanjye, nk'uko nanjye nitondeye amategeko ya Data

content.speaker: all
content.text: nkaguma mu rukundo rwe. "Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo umunezero wanjye ube muri mwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'umunezero wanyu ube wuzuye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA FILIPO NA YAKOBO (Mai 1)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko kukumenya ari bwo bugingo buhoraho. None turakwingize,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uduhe kumenya rwose Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ko ari we nzira, ukuri, n’ubugingo, kugira ngo tugere

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikirenge mu cy’intumwa zawe Filipo na Yakobo, tubone gukomeza mu nzira ijya mu bugingo budashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                    Yakobo 1 :1-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: YAKOBO imbata y'Imana n'Umwami Yesu Kristo ndabandikiye, mwebwe abo mu miryango cumi n'ibiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'abatatanye ndabatashya. Bene Data, mwemere ko ari iby'ibyishimo rwose nimugubwa gitumo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ibibagerageza bitari bimwe, mumenye yuko kugeragezwa ko kwizera kwanyu gutera kwihangana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko mureke kwihangana gusohoze umurimo wako, mubone gutungana rwose mushyitse mutabuzeho

content.speaker: all
content.text: na gato.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko niba hariho umuntu muri mwe ubuze ubwenge, abusabe Imana iha abantu bose itimana, itishama

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi azabuhabwa. Ariko rero asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya, kuko ushidikanya ameze nk'umuraba

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo mu nyanja, ujyanwa n'umuyaga ushushubikanywa. Ariko rero asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko ushidikanya ameze nk'umuraba wo mu nyanja, ujyanwa n'umuyaga ushushubikanywa. Umeze atyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ye kwibwira ko azagira icyo ahabwa n'Umwami Imana, kuko umuntu w'imitima ibiri anamuka mu nzira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ze zose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwene Data w'umukene yishimire yuko afite isumbwe, naho umutunzi yishimire yuko acishijwe bugufi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko azashiraho nk'uburabyo bw'ibyatsi. Kuko izuba iyo rirashe rifite ubushyuhe bwotsa, ryumisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyatsi uburabyo bwabyo bugahunguka, ubwiza bw'ishusho yabyo bukabura. Uko ni ko umutunzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azumira mu nzira ze zose.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA              Yohana 14 :1-14

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU yabwiye abigishwa be ati   «Ntimuhagarike imitima yanyu, mwizere Imana nanjye munyizere. Mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: rugo rwa Data harimo amazu menshi : iyaba adahari mba mbabwiye, kuko ngiye kubategurira ahanyu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ubwo ngiye kubategurira ahanyu, nzagaruka mbajyane iwanjye, ngo aho ndi namwe muzabeyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi aho njya, inzira murayizi." Toma aramubwira ati"Databuja, ntituzi aho ujya, inzira twayibwirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'iki ?" Yesu aramubwira ati"Ni jye nzira n'ukuri n'ubugingo : nta wujya kwa Data ntamujyanye. Iyaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwaramenye, muba mwaramenye na Data. Uhereye none muramuzi kandi mwamurebye." Filipo

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubwira ati"Databuja, twereke Data wa twese biraba bihagije." Yesu aramubaza ati"Nabanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: namwe iminsi ingana ityo, kandi ntiwari wamenya, Filipo ? Umbonye aba abonye Data. Ni iki gitumye

content.speaker: all
content.text: uvuga uti 'Twereke Data wa twese' ? Ntiwizeye yuko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba ari muri jye ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amagambo mbabwira sinyavuga ku bwanjye, ahubwo Data uguma muri jye ni we ukora imirimo ye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimunyizere mwemere ko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba muri jye, ariko rero nimutizezwa n'ibyo mvuga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: munyizezwe n'imirimo nkora ubwayo. Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko unyizera, imirimo nkora na we

content.speaker: all
content.text: azayikora ndetse azakora n'iyiruta, kuko njya kwa Data. Kandi icyo muzasaba cyose mu izina ryanjye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzagikorera kugira ngo Data yubahirizwe mu Mwana we. Nimugira icyo musaba cyose mu izina ryanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzagikora.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA BARUNABA

content.speaker: all
content.text: WERA INTUMWA (Juin 11)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI Mana ishobora byose, wahaye intumwa yawe Barunaba impano z'umwuka nziza, none

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwiginze, ntubure kuduha impano zawe zitari zimwe n'ubuntu bwo kuzikoresha, ngo ziguheshe

content.speaker: all
content.text: icubahiro no guhimbazwa. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy'URWANDIKO               Ibyakozwe 11 :22-30

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iyo nkuru irumvikana igera mu matwi y'itorero ry'i Yerusalemu, batuma Barinaba muri Antiyokiya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Asohoyeyo kandi abonye ubuntu bw'Imana aranezerwa, abahugura bose ati"Mugume mu Mwami Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mumaramaje mu mitima yanyu." Kuko Barinaba yari umunyangesonziza, wuzuye Umwuka Wera no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwizera. Abantu benshi bongererwa Umwami Yesu. Bukeye avayo ajya i Taruso gushaka Sawuli,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amubonye amujyana mu Antiyokiya. Bamarayo umwaka wose baterana n'ab'Itorero, bigisha abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: benshi, kandi muri Antiyokiya ni ho abigishwa batangiriye kwitwa Abakristo. Muri iyo minsi abahanuzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bava i Yerusalemu, bajya mu Antiyokiya. Nuko umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo, arahaguruka arahanura

content.speaker: all
content.text: abwirijwe n'Umwuka ati"Inzara nyinshi izatera mu isi yose." (Ni yo yateye ku ngoma ya Kilawudiyo.)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko abigishwa bagambirira koherereza bene Data batuye i Yudaya imfashanyo, umuntu wese akurikije

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutunzi bwe. Babigenza batyo, babyoherereza abakuru babihaye Barinaba na Sawuli.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA               Yohana 15 :12-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ngiri itegeko ryanjye: mukundane nk'uko nabakunze. Nta wufite urukundo ruruta urw'umuntu upfira

content.speaker: all
content.text: incuti ze. Muri incuti zanjye, nimukora ibyo mbategeka. Sinkibita abagaragu kuko umugaragu atazi ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: shebuja akora, ahubwo mbise incuti kuko ibyo numvise kuri Data byose mbibamenyesheje. Si mwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwantoranyije, ahubwo ni jye wabatoranyije kandi mbashyiriraho kugira ngo mugende mwere imbuto,

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbuto zanyu zigumeho kugira ngo icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye akibahe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA YOHANA

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUBATIZA (Juin 24)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko washatse ko umugaragu wawe Yohana Umubatiza yavutse

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu buryo butangaza ; ukamutuma guteguriza Umwana wawe Umukiza wacu inzira, abwiriza ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwihana. Natwe udufashe, dukurikize imyigishishirize ye n’ingeso ze nziza, tubone kwihana nyakuri,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko yigishaga ; kandi uduhe kujya tuvuga iby’ukuri, ducyaha abakora ibyaha dushize amanga, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: twemere kurenganywa baduhoye ukuri twihanganye, nk uko na we yakoraga. Tubisabye mu Izina rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Yesaya 40:1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: "Nimuhumurize abantu banjye, mubahumurize." Ni ko Imana yanyu ivuga. "Muvuge ibyururutsa imitima

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'ab'i Yerusalemu, mukomere muhabwire ko intambara zaho zishize kandi yuko gukiranirwa kwaho

content.speaker: all
content.text: hakubabariwe, n'ibyaha byaho byose ko habihaniwe kabiri n'Uwiteka." Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangurura

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo"Nimutunganyirize Uwiteka inzira mu butayu, mugororere Imana yacu inzira nyabagendwa mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kidaturwa. Igikombe cyose kizuzuzwa kandi umusozi wose n'agasozi bizaringanizwa, n'ahagoramye

content.speaker: all
content.text: hazagororwa n'inzira zidaharuwe zizaharurwa. Maze icyubahiro cy'Uwiteka kizahishurwa kandi abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose bazakibonera rimwe, kuko akanwa k'Uwiteka ari ko kabivuze." Ijwi ryaravuze riti"Rangurura." Maze

content.speaker: all
content.text: habaho ubaza ati"Ndarangururira iki?""Abantu bose bameze nk'ubwatsi, n'ubwiza bwabo bwose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bumeze nk'uburabyo bwo ku gasozi. Ubwatsi buraraba, uburabyo bugahunguka kuko umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'Uwiteka ubuhushyeho. Ni ukuri abantu ni nk'ubwatsi. Yewe wumvisha i Siyoni inkuru z'ibyiza zamuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: umusozi muremure, yewe wumvisha i Yerusalemu inkuru z'ibyiza rangurura ijwi ryawe cyane,

content.speaker: all
content.text: rirangurure witinya ubwire imidugudu y'i Buyuda uti"Dore Imana yanyu." Dore Umwami Imana izaza ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: intwari, kandi ukuboko kwayo kuzayitegekera. Dore izanye ingororano, kandi inyiturano zayo ziyiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere. Izaragira umukumbi wayo nk'umushumba, izateraniriza abana b'intama mu maboko ibaterurire

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu gituza, kandi izonsa izazigenza neza. »

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA         Luka 1 :57-80

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko iminsi yo kubyara kwa Elizabeti irasohora, abyara umuhungu. Abaturanyi be na bene wabo bumva

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko Umwami Imana yamugiriye imbabazi nyinshi, bishimana na we. Nuko ku munsi wa munani bajya

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukeba umwana, bashaka kumwita izina rya se Zakariya. Nyina arabasubiza ati"Oya, ahubwo yitwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yohana." Baramubwira bati"Ko ari nta wo mu muryango wanyu witwa iryo zina!" Bacira se amarenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo bamubaze uko ashaka kumwita. Bacira se amarenga kugira ngo bamubaze uko ashaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumwita. Atumira icyo kwandikiraho arandika ati"Izina rye ni Yohana." Bose baratangara. Muri ako

content.speaker: all
content.text: kanya akanwa ke karazibuka, n'ururimi rwe ruragobodoka aravuga, ashima Imana. Abaturanyi bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: baterwa n'ubwoba, ibyo byose byamamara mu misozi y'i Yudaya yose. Ababyumvise bose babishyira mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mitima yabo bati"Mbese uyu mwana azaba iki?" Nuko ukuboko k'Umwami Imana gukomeza kubana na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we. Se Zakariya yuzuzwa Umwuka Wera arahanura ati"Umwami ahimbazwe, Imana y'Abisirayeli, Kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: igendereye abantu bayo ikabacungura. Kandi iduhagurukirije ihembe ry'agakiza, Mu nzu y'umugaragu

content.speaker: all
content.text: wayo Dawidi, (Nk'uko yavugiye mu kanwa k'abera bayo, Bahanuraga uhereye kera kose.) Kudukiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanzi n'amaboko y'abatwanga bose, Kugirira ba sogokuruza imbabazi, No kwibuka isezerano ryayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera, Indahiro yarahiye sogokuruza Aburahamu, Ko nitumara gukizwa amaboko y'abanzi bacu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tuzayisenga tudatinya, Turi abera dukiranuka imbere yayo iminsi yacu yose. "Kandi nawe mwana, uzitwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuhanuzi w'Isumbabyose, Kuko uzabanziriza Umwami ngo utunganye inzira ze, No kumenyesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu be iby'agakiza, Ko ari ukubabarirwa ibyaha byabo. Ku bw'umutima w'imbabazi w'Imana yacu, Ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo uzatuma umuseke udutambikira uvuye mu ijuru, Ukamurikira abicaye mu mwijima no mu gicucu

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy'urupfu, No kuyobora ibirenge byacu mu nzira y'amahoro." Uwo mwana arakura, agwiza imbaraga

content.speaker: all
content.text: z'umutima, aguma mu butayu kugeza umunsi yerekewemo Abisirayeli.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI WA PETERA WERA (Juin 29)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INSENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA Ishobora byose, tuzi yuko watumye umwana wawe Yesu Kristo guha intumwa yawe Petero wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: impano nziza nyinshi, ukamutegeka kuragirana umwete umukumbi wawe. None turakwingize,

content.speaker: all
content.text: utereAbepiskopi n’Abapastori bose umuhati wokubwiriza Ijambo ryawe ryera. Kandi turasabira abantu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo bumvire iryo jambo barikurikije ; hanyuma bazabone guhabwa ikamba ry’icubahiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: kitazashira. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami Yesu Kristo. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO            Ibyakozwe 12 : 1-11

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUKO muri icyo gihe Umwami Herode afatira abo mu Itorero bamwe kubagirira nabi. Yicisha Yakobo

content.speaker: all
content.text: inkota, mwene se wa Yohana. Abonye ko anejeje Abayuda, ariyongeza afata na Petero. Icyo gihe hari mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: minsi y'imitsima idasembuwe. Amaze kumufata amushyira mu nzu y'imbohe, amuha abasirikare cumi na

content.speaker: all
content.text: batandatu kumurinda bane bane, agira ngo azamushyire abantu Pasika ishize. Nuko Petero arindirwa mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzu y'imbohe, ariko ab'Itorero bagira umwete wo kumusabira ku Mana. Herode araye ari bumusohore,

content.speaker: all
content.text: iryo joro Petero yari asinziriye hagati y'abasirikare babiri, aboheshejwe iminyururu ibiri, abarinzi na bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bari ku rugi barinda inzu y'imbohe. Nuko marayika w'Umwami Imana ahagarara aho, umucyo waka mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nzu, marayika akoma Petero mu mbavu aramukangura ati"Byuka n'ingoga." Iminyururu imuva ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: maboko iragwa. Marayika aramubwira ati"Kenyera ukwete inkweto zawe." Abigenza atyo. Arongera

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubwira ati"Wifubike umwitero wawe, unkurikire." Arasohoka aramukurikira, ariko ntiyamenya ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: marayika akoze ko ari iby'ukuri, ahubwo agira ngo abirose mu nzozi. Banyuze ku barinzi ba mbere no ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: ba kabiri, bagera ku irembo rikingishijwe urugi rw'icyuma rijya mu murwa. Rurabikingurira ubwarwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: barasohoka banyura inzira imwe, uwo mwanya marayika amusiga aho. Petero agaruye umutima

content.speaker: all
content.text: aribwira ati"Noneho menye by'ukuri yuko Umwami Imana yatumye marayika wayo, ikankura mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: maboko ya Herode, ikankiza ibyo ubwoko bw'Abayuda bwategerezaga byose."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA           Matayo 16 : 13-19

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko Yesu ajya mu gihugu cy'i Kayisariya ya Filipo abaza abigishwa be ati"Abantu bagira ngo Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'umuntu ndi nde ?" Baramusubiza bati"Bamwe bagira ngo uri Yohana Umubatiza, abandi ngo uri Eliya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abandi ngo uri Yeremiya, cyangwa ngo uri umwe wo mu bahanuzi." Arababaza ati"Ariko mwebwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwanyu mugira ngo ndi nde ?" Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati"Uri Kristo, Umwana w'Imana ihoraho."

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu aramusubiza ati"Urahirwa Simoni wa Yona, kuko umubiri n'amaraso atari byo byabiguhishuriye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo ni Data wo mu ijuru. Nanjye ndakubwira nti 'Uri Petero, kandi nzubaka Itorero ryanjye kuri urwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: rutare, kandi amarembo y'ikuzimu ntazarishobora.'Nzaguha imfunguzo z'ubwami bwo mu ijuru, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyo uzahambira mu isi kizaba gihambiriwe mu ijuru, n'icyo uzahambura mu isi kizaba gihambuwe mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijuru."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA YAKOBO WERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: INTUMWA (Juillet 25)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INSENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA  y’imbabazi  turibuka  uko  Intumwa  yawe  yera  Yakobo  yasize  se  n’ibyo  yari  afite  byose,  akitaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwana  wawe  Yesu  Kristo  adatindiganije,  akamukurikira.  None  turagusaba  kugira  ngo  natwe  uduhe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwemera gusiga ibyo kurigira iby’iyi si n’iby’umubiri, tubone  kurushaho kwitegura kumvira amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yawe yose. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO              Ibyakozwe 11 : 27-12 :3

content.speaker: all
content.text: MURI IYO minsi abahanuzi bava i Yerusalemu, bajya mu Antiyokiya. Nuko umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arahaguruka arahanura abwirijwe n'Umwuka ati"Inzara nyinshi izatera mu isi yose." (Ni yo yateye ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngoma ya Kilawudiyo.) Nuko abigishwa bagambirira koherereza bene Data batuye i Yudaya imfashanyo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuntu wese akurikije ubutunzi bwe. Babigenza batyo, babyoherereza abakuru babihaye Barinaba na

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sawuli. Nuko muri icyo gihe Umwami Herode afatira abo mu Itorero bamwe kubagirira nabi. Yicisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yakobo inkota, mwene se wa Yohana. Abonye ko anejeje Abayuda, ariyongeza afata na Petero. Icyo gihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: hari mu minsi y'imitsima idasembuwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                 Matayo 20 :20-28

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: MAZE nyina wa bene Zebedayo azana n'abana be aho ari, aramupfukamira ngo agire icyo amusaba. Na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we aramubaza ati"Urashaka iki ?" Aramusubiza ati"Tegeka ko aba bana banjye bombi bazicara mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwami bwawe, umwe iburyo bwawe undi ibumoso." Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ntimuzi icyo musaba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwabasha kunywera ku gikombe nzanyweraho ?" Bati"Turabibasha." Arababwira ati"Ni ukuri igikombe

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyanjye muzakinyweraho, ariko kwicara iburyo bwanjye n'ibumoso si jye ubigaba, keretse abo Data

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabitunganyirije." Ba bandi cumi babyumvise barakarira abo bavandimwe bombi. Yesu arabahamagara

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababwira ati"Muzi yuko Abami b'abanyamahanga babatwaza igitugu, n'abakomeye babo bahawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubategeka. Ariko muri mwe si ko biri, ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe ajye aba umugaragu

content.speaker: all
content.text: wanyu, kandi ushaka kuba uw'imbere muri mwe, ajye aba imbata yanyu, nk'uko Umwana w'umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ataje gukorerwa, ahubwo yaje gukorera abandi no gutangira ubugingo bwe kuba incungu ya benshi."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA BARUTOLOMAYO WERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: INTUMWA (Aout 24)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INSENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA  ishobora  byose  ihoraho,  wagiriye  intumwa  yawe  Barutolomayo  ubuntu  butuma  yizera  by’ukuri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijambo  ryawe,  akaryigisha.  Turakwingize,  uhe  Itorero  ryawe  umutima  ukunda  rya  Jambo  yizeraga  no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuritora. T ubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO                    Ibyakozwe 5 :12-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza byinshi byakorwaga mu bantu n'amaboko y'intumwa, kandi bose bateraniraga

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ibaraza rya Salomo n'umutima uhuye. Ariko nubwo abantu bose babahimbazaga cyane, ntihagiraga

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'umwe muri bo watinyukaga kwifatanya na bo. Nyamara abizeye Umwami Yesu bakomezaga

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubongerwaho, abantu benshi b'abagabo n'abagore, byatumaga bazana abarwayi mu nzira

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakabashyira ku mariri no mu ngobyi, kugira ngo Petero nahanyura nibura igicucu cye kigere kuri

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamwe. Hateraniraga benshi bavuye no mu midugudu ihereranye n'i Yerusalemu, bazanye abababazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abadayimoni bose bagakizwa.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Luka 22 :24-30

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze habyuka impaka muri bo, ngo ni nde muri bo ukwiriye gutekerezwa ko ari we mukuru. Arababwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati"Abami b'amahanga barayategeka, n'abafite ubutware bwo kuyatwara bitwa ba ruhekerababyeyi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko mwebweho ntimukabe mutyo, ahubwo ukomeye muri mwe abe nk'uworoheje, n'utwara abe

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'uhereza. Umukuru ni uwuhe? Ni uherezwa cyangwa ni uhereza ? Si uherezwa ? Ariko jyewe ndi hagati

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanyu meze nk'uhereza. "Ni mwe mwagumanye nanjye, twihanganana mu byo nageragejwe. Nanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbabikiye ubwami nk'uko Data yabumbikiye, kugira ngo muzarye munywe mwegereye ameza yanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bwami bwanjye. Kandi muzicara ku ntebe z'icyubahiro, mucire imanza imiryango cumi n'ibiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'Abisirayeli."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA MATAYO WERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: INTUMWA (Sep. 21)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INSENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, watumye Umwami wawe ushimwa guhamagara Matayo ngo ave bukoresha

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’ikoro, ahinduke intumwa n’umubwiriza w’ubutumwa. None uduhe umutima, wemeye gusiga

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyifurize yose mibi itwifurisha iby’abandi, no gukunda ubutunzi uburyo bukabije, tubone gukurikira

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo uhorana nawe ku ngoma hamwe n’umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe iteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryose. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO              2 Abakorinto 4 :1-6

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero, ubwo dufite uwo murimo wo kugabura iby'Imana ku bw'imbabazi twagiriwe, ntiducogora

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo twanga ibiteye isoni bikorwa rwihishwa, tutagendera mu buriganya kandi tutagoreka ijambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry'Imana, ahubwo tuvuga ukuri tweruye bigatuma umuntu wese adushimisha umutima we imbere

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'Imana. Ariko niba ubutumwa bwiza twahawe butwikiriwe, butwikiririwe abarimbuka ari bo batizera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abo imana y'iki gihe yahumiye imitima, kugira ngo umucyo w'ubutumwa bw'ubwiza bwa Kristo, ari we

content.speaker: all
content.text: shusho y'Imana utabatambikira. Kuko tutabwiriza abantu ibyacu, ahubwo tubabwiriza ibya Kristo Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko ari we Mwami, natwe tukaba abagaragu banyu ku bwa Yesu. Imana yategetse umucyo kuva uturutse

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu mwijima, ni yo yaviriye mu mitima yacu, kugira ngo imurikishe ubwenge bwo kumenya ubwiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw'Imana buri mu maso ha Yesu Kristo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA             Matayo   9 :9 -13

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu avayo, akigenda abona umuntu witwaga Matayo yicaye aho yakoresherezaga ikoro, aramubwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati"Nkurikira." Arahaguruka, aramukurikira. Hanyuma ubwo Yesu yari yicaye mu nzu bafungura, haza

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakoresha b'ikoro benshi n'abanyabyaha, basangira na Yesu n'abigishwa be. Abafarisayo babibonye

content.speaker: all
content.text: babaza abigishwa be bati"Ni iki gitumye umwigisha wanyu asangira n'abakoresha b'ikoro

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'abanyabyaha?" Abyumvise arababwira ati"Abazima si bo bifuza umuvuzi, keretse abarwayi. Ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: nimugende, mwige uko iri jambo risobanurwa ngo 'Icyo nkunda ni imbabazi, si ibitambo.' Sinazanywe no

content.speaker: all
content.text: guhamagara abakiranuka, keretse abanyabyaha."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UMUNSI WA MARAYIKA MIKAELI

content.speaker: all
content.text: N’ABAMARAYIKA BOSE (sep.29)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ihoraho washyiriyeho Abamarayika n’abantu, kugira ngo bagukorere muri gahunda nziza. None

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwingize kubw’imbabazi zawe, ujye utuma abamarayika bawe bera, baturengere kandi baturinde

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukiri muri iyi isi, nk’uko bahora bagukorera mu ijuru. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO             Ibyahishuwe 12 :7-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu  ijuru  habaho  intambara.  Mikayeli  n'abamarayika  be  batabarira  kurwanya  cya  kiyoka,  ikiyoka

content.speaker: all
content.text: kirwanana n'abamarayika bacyo. Ntibanesha kandi mu ijuru ahabo ntihaba hakiboneka. Cya kiyoka kinini

content.speaker: all
content.text: kiracibwa,  ari  cyo  ya  nzoka  ya kera  yitwa  Umwanzi na  Satani,  ari cyo kiyobya abari  mu  isi  bose.  Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: kijugunywa  mu  isi,  abamarayika  bacyo  bajugunyanwa  na  cyo.  Numva  ijwi  rirenga  rivugira  mu  ijuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: riti"Noneho agakiza karasohoye, gasohoranye n'ubushobozi n'ubwami bw'Imana yacu n'ubutware bwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo wayo, kuko Umurezi wa bene Data ajugunywe hasi, wahoraga abarega ku manywa na nijoro imbere

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'Imana  yacu.  Na  bo  bamuneshesheje  amaraso  y'Umwana  w'Intama  n'ijambo  ryo  guhamya  kwabo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntibakunda amagara yabo, ntibanga no gupfa.  Nuko rero wa  juru we, namwe  abaribamo nimwishime.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Naho wowe wa si we, nawe wa nyanja we, mugushije ishyano kuko Satani yabamanukiye afite umujinya

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwinshi, azi yuko afite igihe gito."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA           Matayo 18 :1-10

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yesu baramubaza bati"Umukuru mu bwami bwo mu ijuru ni nde?"

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ahamagara umwana muto amuhagarika hagati yabo, arababwira ati"Ndababwira ukuri yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: nimudahinduka ngo mumere nk'abana bato, mutazinjira mu bwami bwo mu ijuru. Nuko uzicisha bugufi

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'uyu mwana muto, ni we mukuru mu bwami bwo mu ijuru. Uwemera umwana umwe muto nk'uyu mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: izina ryanjye, ni jye aba yemeye. "Ariko ushuka umwe muri aba bato banyizera akamugusha, ikiruta ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko yahambirwa urusyo mu ijosi rye, akazikwa imuhengeri mu nyanja. Isi izaboneshwa ishyano

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ibigusha abantu, kuko ibyo bigusha bitazabura kuza, ariko uwo muntu uzana ibigusha azabona ishyano.

content.speaker: all
content.text: "Ariko ukuboko kwawe cyangwa ukuguru kwawe nibigucumuza uguce ugute kure yawe. Ibyiza ni uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wakwinjira mu bugingo usigaranye ukuboko kumwe cyangwa ukuguru, biruta ko wajugunywa mu muriro

content.speaker: all
content.text: utazima ufite amaboko yombi cyangwa amaguru yombi. Cyangwa ijisho ryawe nirikugusha urinogore

content.speaker: all
content.text: urite kure yawe. Ibyiza ni uko wakwinjira mu bugingo usigaranye ijisho rimwe gusa, biruta ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wajugunywa muri Gehinomu y'umuriro ufite amaso yombi. "Mwirinde mudasuzugura umwe muri aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bana bato. Ndababwira yuko abamarayika babo bo mu ijuru bahora bareba mu maso ha Data wo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijuru.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi wa LUKA WERA (Oct. 18)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, wahamagaye Luka umuvuzi ushimirwa cyane Ubutumwa Bwiza yanditse, ngo abe

content.speaker: all
content.text: umubwiriza w’ubutumwa, kandi umuvuzi w’imitima y’abantu. None turagusaba, kugira ngo udukize

content.speaker: all
content.text: indwara zacu zose z’imitima, uzikirishe umuti mwiza, ni wo myigishirize yahawe, ku bw’ibyiza Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe Yesu Kristo yadukoreye. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO                   2 Timoteyo 4 :5-15

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO wowe ho wirinde muri byose, wemere kurengana, ukore umurimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'umubwirizabutumwa bwiza, usohoze umurimo wawe wo kugabura iby'Imana. Kuko jyeweho

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: maze kumera nk'ibisukwa ku gicaniro, igihe cyo kugenda kwanjye gisohoye. Narwanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: intambara nziza, narangije urugendo, narinze ibyo kwizera. Ibisigaye mbikiwe ikamba ryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukiranuka, iryo Umwami wacu, umucamanza utabera azampa kuri urya munsi, nyamara si jye

content.speaker: all
content.text: jyenyine, ahubwo ni abakunze kuzaboneka kwe bose. Gira umwete wo kuza aho ndi vuba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dema yaransigiriye kuko akunze iby'iki gihe cya none, ajya i Tesalonike. Kiresikenti na we yagiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: i Galatiya, naho Tito yagiye i Dalumatiya. Luka ni we wenyine ukiri kumwe nanjye. Shaka Mariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuzane, kuko angirira umumaro wo kunkorera. Ariko Tukiko namaze kumwohereza muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Efeso. Nuza uzazane umwitero nasize i Tirowa kwa Karupo n'ibitabo, ariko cyane cyane uzazane

content.speaker: all
content.text: iby'impu. Alekizanderi, umucuzi w'imiringa yangiriye inabi nyinshi. Umwami wacu azamwitura

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibikwiriye ibyo yakoze. Nawe umwirinde, kuko yarwanije amagambo yacu cyane.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA       Luka 10: 1-7

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: HANYUMA y'ibyo Umwami Yesu atoranya abandi mirongo irindwi, atuma babiri babiri ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamubanzirize, bajye mu midugudu yose n'aho yendaga kujya hose. Arababwira ati"Ibisarurwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni byinshi ariko abasaruzi ni bake, nuko mwinginge nyir'ibisarurwa ngo yohereze abasaruzi mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bisarurwa bye. Nimugende, dore mbatumye mumeze nk'abana b'intama hagati y'amasega.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntimujyane uruhago rurimo ifeza, cyangwa imvumba, cyangwa inkweto, kandi ntimugire uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: muramutsa muri mu nzira. Nimujya mugira inzu yose mwinjiramo, mubanze muvuge muti

content.speaker: all
content.text: 'Amahoro abe muri iyi nzu.'Niba harimo umunyamahoro, amahoro yanyu azaba kuri we.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Natahaba, amahoro yanyu azabagarukira. Kandi iyo nzu abe ari yo mugumamo, musangire na

content.speaker: all
content.text: bo ibyokurya n'ibyokunywa, kuko umukozi akwiriye guhembwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA SIMONI NA YUDA (Oct. 28)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, wubatse Itorero ryawe ku rufatiro rw’intumwa n’abahanuzi, kandi Yesu Kristo ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: we Buye rikomeza imfuruka. Nuko rero, nawe uduhe kugirana ubumwe bw’umwuka dufatanishijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: imyigishirize yabo, bituma duhimduka urusengero rwera wishimira. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: URWANDIKO       Yuda 1-8

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yuda imbata ya Yesu Kristo kandi mwene se wa Yakobo, ndabandikiye mwebwe abahamagawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakundwa kuko muri mu Mana Data wa twese, mukarindirwa Yesu Kristo. Imbabazi n'amahoro

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'urukundo bigwire muri mwe. Imbuzi zo kwirinda abatubaha Imana n'abigisha b'ibinyoma Bakundwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo nagiraga umwete wo kubandikira iby'agakiza dusangiye niyumvisemo ko mpaswe no kubahugura,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo mushishikarire kurwanira ibyo kwizera abera bahawe rimwe, bakazageza iteka ryose. Kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: hariho bamwe baseseye muri mwe rwihishwa bagenewe kera gucirwa ho iteka: ni abantu batubaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana, bahindura ubuntu bw'Imana yacu isoni nke, bakihakana Yesu Kristo ari we wenyine Databuja

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'Umwami wacu. Ndashaka kubibutsa, nubwo byose hari ubundi mwigeze kubimenya, yuko Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana imaze gukirisha ubwoko bw'Abisirayeli kubakura mu gihugu cya Egiputa, hanyuma irimbura

content.speaker: all
content.text: abatizeye. N'abamarayika batarinze ubutware bwabo ahubwo bakareka ubuturo bwabo, ibarindira mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: minyururu idashira no mu mwijima w'icuraburindi kugira ngo bacirwe ho iteka ku munsi ukomeye. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'i Sodomu n'i Gomora n'imidugudu yari ihereranye na ho, kuko abaho na bo bitanze bakiha

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubusambanyi no kwendana mu buryo imibiri itaremewe, iyo midugudu yashyiriweho kuba akabarore

content.speaker: all
content.text: ihanwa n'umuriro utazima. Uko ni ko na ba bandi b'abarosi bonona imibiri yabo, bagasuzugura

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutegekwa bagatuka abanyacyubahiro.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA                Yohana 15: 17-27

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo mbibategekeye kugira ngo mukundane. "Ab'isi nibabanga, mumenye ko babanje kunyanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: batarabanga. Iyo muba ab'isi, ab'isi baba babakunze. Ariko kuko mutari ab'isi, ahubwo nabatoranyije mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: b'isi, ni cyo gituma ab'isi babanga. Mwibuke ijambo nababwiye nti 'Umugaragu ntaruta shebuja.' Niba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bandenganyije namwe bazabarenganya, niba bitondeye ijambo ryanjye, n'iryanyu na ryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazaryitondera. Ariko ibyo byose bazabibagirira babahora izina ryanjye, kuko batazi Uwantumye uwo ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: we. Iyaba ntaje ngo mvugane na bo ntibaba bafite icyaha, ariko noneho ntibafite uko biregura icyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyabo. Unyanga aba yanze na Data. Iyaba ntakoreye muri bo imirimo itakozwe n'undi muntu, nta cyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: baba bafite. Ariko noneho barayibonye, nyamara baratwanga jyewe na Data. Ariko byabaye bityo kugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo ijambo risohore, ryanditswe mu mategeko yabo ngo 'Banyangiye ubusa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umufasha naza, uwo nzaboherereza ava kuri Data, ari we Mwuka w'ukuri ukomoka kuri Data,

content.speaker: all
content.text: azampamya. Kandi namwe muzampamya, kuko uhereye mbere na mbere mwari kumwe nanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNSI W’ABERA BOSE (Nov 1)

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ISENGESHO

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushimira yuko wafatanirije hamwe intore zawe, zikagira ubumwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ziteranijwe mu mubiri w’umwana wawe Yesu Kristo mu buryo bw’umwuka. None turagusaba, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: tugere ikirenge mu cy’Abera bawe bashimwa; twigane ingeso zabo nziza zikubahisha; hanyuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuzabone kugera mu byishimo bitavugwa wateguriye abagukunda bataryarya. Tubisabye mu Izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’URWANDIKO               Ibyahishuwe 7: 2-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: MBONA na marayika wundi azamuka ava i burasirazuba, afite ikimenyetso cy'Imana ihoraho, arangurura

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijwi rirenga, abwira ba bamarayika bane bahawe kubabaza isi n'inyanja ati"Ntimubabaze isi cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: inyanja cyangwa ibiti tutaramara gushyira ikimenyetso mu ruhanga rw'imbata z'Imana yacu." Numva

content.speaker: all
content.text: umubare w'abashyizweho ikimenyetso ngo ni agahumbi n'inzovu enye n'ibihumbi bine. Ni bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bashyizweho ikimenyetso bo mu miryango yose y'Abisirayeli. Abo mu muryango wa Yuda bashyizweho

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikimenyetso ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Rubeni ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Gadi ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Asheri ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Nafutali ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Manase ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Simiyoni ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Lewi ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Isakari ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Zebuluni ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Yosefu ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo mu muryango wa Benyamini ni inzovu n'ibihumbi bibiri ;

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma y'ibyo mbona abantu benshi umuntu atabasha kubara, bo mu mahanga yose n'imiryango yose

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'amoko yose n'indimi zose, bahagaze imbere ya ya ntebe n'imbere y'Umwana w'Intama, bambaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibishura byera kandi bafite amashami y'imikindo mu ntoki zabo, bavuga ijwi rirenga bati"Agakiza ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ak'Imana yacu yicaye ku ntebe n'ak'Umwana w'Intama." Nuko abamarayika bose bari bahagaze bagose

content.speaker: all
content.text: ya ntebe na ba bakuru na bya bizima bine, bikubita hasi bubamye imbere y'intebe, baramya Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bati"Amen, amahirwe n'icyubahiro n'ubwenge n'ishimwe, no guhimbazwa n'ubutware n'imbaraga bibe

content.speaker: all
content.text: iby'Imana yacu iteka ryose." Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBUTUMWA BWIZA        Matayo 5 :1-12

content.speaker: all
content.text: YESU abonye abantu benshi azamuka umusozi, maze kwicara abigishwa be baramwegera. Aterura

content.speaker: all
content.text: amagambo ati"Hahirwa abakene mu mitima yabo, Kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru ari ubwabo. Hahirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: abashavura, Kuko ari bo bazahozwa. Hahirwa abagwa neza, Kuko ari bo bazahabwa isi. Hahirwa abafite

content.speaker: all
content.text: inzara n'inyota byo gukiranuka, Kuko ari bo bazahazwa. Hahirwa abanyambabazi, Kuko ari bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazazigirirwa. Hahirwa ab'imitima iboneye, Kuko ari bo bazabona Imana. Hahirwa abakiranura, Kuko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: bo bazitwa abana b'Imana. Hahirwa abarenganyirijwe gukiranuka, Kuko ubwami bwo mu ijuru ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwabo. "Namwe muzahirwa ubwo bazabatuka bakabarenganya, bakababeshyera ibibi byinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: babampora. Muzanezerwe, muzishime cyane kuko ingororano zanyu ari nyinshi mu ijuru, kuko ari ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: barenganyije abahanuzi ba mbere.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: AMAGAMBO Y’IBYO

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IGABURO RYERA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: RY’UMWAMI WACU

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu bashaka guhabwa igaburo ryera, niba harimo uzwi na bose ko ari umunyangeso mbi cyane, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukabije kugirira nabi abaturanyi be mu byo ubu avuga no mu byo akora, bikajya bikoza Itorero isoni,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori abyumvise akwiriye kumuhamagara, avugane na we, amubwire ko atemewe kujya ku Meza

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Umwami wacu atarihana ingeso ze mbi ku mugaragaro, akerekana yuko yemeye kuzireka, kandi si cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyo nyine, ahubwo akwiriye no gusubiza uwo yambuye, cyangwa gusezerana ko azabimusubiza vuba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ab’itorero abari bababaye ku bwe babone kumwakira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Umupastori namenya ko mu Itorero rye harimo abangana, nabo akwiriye kubagenza atyo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abahakanira kujya ku meza kugeza ubwo azamenya ku buzuye. Umwe muri abo banganaga ni yemera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubabarira rwose mugenzi we wamugiriye nabi, cyangwa ubwe yakwemera gusubiza mugenzi we icyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bapfa, ariko mugenzi we akanga kunyurwa nk’umukristo, ahubwo agakomeza kugira agahinda,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori akwiriye kwemera uwo wihannye, ntiyemere wa wundi wanze kwihana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni habaho Guterana ku Meza kwera, aya meza bayashyire hagati mu rusengero, cyangwa ahandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: hakwiriye, cyangwa se aho basanzwe basengera Gusenga kwa mugitondo, babanze bayirambureho

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: umwenda wera ; hanyuma Umupastori ahagaruke ahagarare i ruhande rwayo rw’ibumoso, avuge

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu wenyine, m’irindi rikurikirana na ryo, bapfukanme.

sections.title: Amasakaramento
sections.description: Amasakaramento n'imirimo y'Itorero: Igaburo Ryera, Ubatizo, Gushyingirwa, Guhamba, no Kurobanura.

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe ; Ubwami bwawe buze ; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu Ijuru ; uduhe none infunguro ridutunga uko bukeye ; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko tubabarira ababitugirira ; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, ni wowe uzi ibyo abantu bose bibwira mu mutima n’ibyo bifuza, kandi nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugambi wose uyobewe ; none uduhumekeremo Umwuka wawe Wera, utunganye ibitekerzo byo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutima yacu, tubone kugukunda rwose, duhimbaze Izina ryawe ryera nk’uko bigukwiriye. Tubisabye mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umupastori ahindukirire abantu, abasomere amategeko cumi y’Imana n’ijwi ryumvikana. Ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: itegeko ryose n’amara kurisoma, abantu basabe Imana kubababarira kwica iryo tegeko mu minsi ishize,

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kubafasha kuryumvira mu minsi izaza : ubwo babivuge bapfukamye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana yavuze aya magambo yose iti « Ndi Uwiteka Imana yawe yagukuye mu gihugu cy’Egiputa mu nzu

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’uburetwa. Ntukagire izindi mana umbangikanya na zo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                Nyagasani, utubabarire uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: AMATEGEKO 10

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :       Ntukiremere igshushanyo kibajwe, cyangwa igisa n’ishusho y’ikintu cyose kiri hejuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru, cyangwa mu mazi yo hasi y’ubutaka ; ntukabyikubite imbere, ntukabikorere ; kuko Uwiteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana yawe ndi Imana ifuha, mpora abana gukiranirwa kwa base, nkageza ku buzukuruza n’ubuvivi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’abanyanga, nkababarira abankunda bakitondera amategeko yanjye, nkageza ku buzukuruza babo

content.speaker: all
content.text: b’ibihe igihumbi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :         Ntukavugire ubusa izina ry’uwiteka Imana yawe, kuko Uwiteka atazamubara

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk’utacumuye uvugiye ubusa Izina rye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                  Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :         wibuke kweza umunsi w’isabato. Mu minsi itandatu ujye ukora, abe ari yo ukoreramo

content.speaker: all
content.text: imirimo yawe yose ; ariko uwakarindwi ni wo sabato y’Uwiteka Imana Yawe. Umuhungu wawe, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: itungo ryawe, cyangwa umukobwa wawe, cyangwa umuja wawe, cyangwa itungo ryawe, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: umunyamahanga wawe uri i wanyu ; kuko iminsi itandatu ari yo Uwiteka yaremyemo ijuru n’isi n’inyanja

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibirimo byose, akaruhuka ku wa karindwi ; ni cyo cyatumye Uwiteka aha umugisha umunsi w’isabato,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akaweza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :          Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ngo uramire mu gihugu Uwiteka Imana iguha

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :             Ntukice

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :            Ntugasambane

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :           Ntukice

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :          Ntukashinje mugenzi wawe ibinyoma

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                  Nyagasani, utubabarire, uhugure imitima yacu, twumvire iryo tegeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori :          Ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzi wawe, ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzi wawe, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugaragu we, cyangwa umuja we, cyangwa inka ye, cyangwa indogobe ye, cyangwa ikintu cyose cya

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugenzi wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :                   Nyagasani, turakwinga utubabarire, kandi wandike ayo mategeko yose mu mitima

content.speaker: all
content.text: yacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa Umupastori, mu cyimbo cy’ayo mategeko, asome aya mategeko abiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu Yavuze aciye mu magambo make.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMWAMI wacu Yesu yaravuze ati « Umva, Isirayeli, Uwiteka Imana yacu ni we Mwami wenyine. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: rero, ukundishe Uwiteka Imana yawe umutima wawe wose, n’ubugingo bwawe bwose, n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwawe bwose, n’imbaraga zawe zose. Irya kabiri ngiri ; Ukunde mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda. Nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: rindi tegeko rirusha aya gukomera. Muri ayo mategeko yombi, amategeko yose n’ibyahanuwe ni yo

content.speaker: all
content.text: byuriririraho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu :              Nyagasani, turakwinginga utubabarire, kandi wandike ayo mategeko yose mu mitima

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hakurikiraho Amasengesho yo gusabira abadutegeka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo gusabira Perezida wa Repubulika y’u Rwanda

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, ni wowe utegeka amahanga yose ukayaha amahoro kugira ngo akore ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushaka ; none turakwinginga ngo uhore urebana imbabazi Perezida wa Repubulika y’u Rwanda, umuhe

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukoresha neza ubushobozi wamuhaye, igihugu cyacu kibone kugira amahoro, kugira ngo abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: batagira imidugararo, ahubwo bagubwe neza, bashimwe n’andi mahanga ; kandi ubwo bushobozi ajye

content.speaker: all
content.text: abukoresha uburyo butuma Itorero ryawe rigira amahoro. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo gusabira Abategetsi bo mu gihugu cyacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, ubwami bwawe ntabwo bushira, kandi icyubahiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyawe gikwiriye isi yose. Ni cyo gituma tukwinginga, ngo uhore urebana imbabazi Abaministiri n’abandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bategetsi bahawe ubushobozi bwo gutegeka iki gihugu ; ubahe ubwenge bwo kujya inama neza. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: turasabira, kugira ngo ubafashe gukorera neza abantu bashinzwe bicishijwe bugufi kandi ari abiringirwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi turakwinginga ngo indini no kukubaha, amahoro no kuugirana ubumwe, ukuri no guca imanza

content.speaker: all
content.text: zitabera, bitabura muri twe iminsi yose. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma akurikizeho Isengesho ry’uwo munsi : maze asome Igice cyo mu Nzandiko abantu bicaye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati ; Igice cYo mu Nzandiko cyanditswe mu guce cya……cyo mu Rwandiko rwanditse na……uhereye ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: murongo wa…….

content.speaker: all
content.text: Narangiza, avuge ati « Igice vy’urwandiko kigarukiye aha »

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma asome Igice cyo mu Butumwa bwiza, abantu bahagaze, arange ati « Ubutumwa Bwiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanditswe mu gice cya...cyo u Butumwa bwa…….., uhereye ku murongo wa……Ataragisoma bose

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: bavuge bati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: N’amara kugisoma, bose bavuge bati ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyubahiro kibe icyawe, Mwami Mana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami Mana, tugushimiye ubu butmwa bwawe bwiza.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma bose bavuge ibyo kwemera, bagihagaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: NEMEYE Imana imwe, Data wa twese ushobora byose, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi, kandi w’ibintu bigaragara

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibitagaragara. Kandi nemeye Umwami umwe Yesu Kristo, Umwana w’Imana wahoze ari Umwana wayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: isi n’ibiri mu ijuru bitararemwa ; Imana iva mu Mana, Umucyo uva mu Mucyo, Imana Nyamana, nyamara

content.speaker: all
content.text: yahoze ari Umwana, ntiyaremwe : afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese, kandi ni we waremye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibintu byose. Yavuye mu Ijuru, amanuka ku bwacu abantu ngo dukizwe ; Yambikirwa umubiri n’umubiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umwuka Wera mu Mwari Mariya, aba umuntu ; Arababazwa, arahambwa, amara iminsi itatu, arazuka,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko byari byaranditswe ; Arazamuka, ajya mu ijuru. None ubu yicaye iburyo bwa Data wa twese.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma azagarukana igitinyiro gucira abariho n’abapfuye urubanza ; ubwami bwe ntibuzashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nemeye Umwuka Wera ni we Mwami kandi umugabyi w’ubugingo, ukomoka kuri Data wa twese

content.speaker: all
content.text: no ku Mwana, usengerwa hamwe na Data wa twese n’Umwana, agahimbazanywa na bo, wavugiraga mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijwi ry’abahanuzi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nemeye yuko hariho Itorero rimwe Katolika ry’abakristo bose, rikurikiza intumwa za Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mpamya yuko hariho kubatizwa kumwe ko gukuraho ibyaha ; kandi ntegereje ko hazabaho kuzuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: kw’abapfuye, n’ubugingo bwo mu gihe kizaza. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hakurikiraho kuranga ibizakorwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni birangira, Umupastori ajye ku meza, asome amagambo amwe muri aya akurikira. Maze baturishe

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaturo yo gufasha umurim w’Imana, bayashyire ku nkoko : Umupastori abyakire, abimurikire Imana,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: maze abishyire ku meza yitonze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igaburo Ryera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abe ari ko umucyo wanyu ubonekera imbere y’abantu, kugira ngo babone imirimo yanyu myiza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bahereko bahimbaza so wo mw’Ijuru

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Matayo 5 :16

content.speaker: all
content.text: "Ntimukibikire ubutunzi mu isi, aho inyenzi n'ingese ziburya, kandi abajura bacukura bakabwiba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ahubwo mwibikire ubutunzi mu ijuru, aho inyenzi n'ingese zitaburya, n'abajura ntibacukure ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babwibe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Matayo 6 :19-20.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mukwiriye gukora imirimo ngo mubone uko mufasha abadakomeye, no kwibuka amagambo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu yavuze ati 'Gutanga guhesha umugisha kuruta guhabwa."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ibyakozwe 20 :35.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwigishwa ijambo ry'Imana agabane n'umwigisha ibyiza byose. Ntimuyobe : Imana ntinegurizwa izuru,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko ibyo umuntu abiba ari byo azasarura.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wihanangirize abatunzi bo mu by'iki gihe, kugira ngo be kwibona cyangwa kwiringira ubutunzi butari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo kwizigirwa, ahubwo biringire Imana iduha byose itimana ngo tubinezererwe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abagalatiya 6 : 6-7.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo Kuvuka

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1 Timoteyo 6 :17.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muzi ubuntu bw'Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo uko yari umutunzi, maze agahinduka umukene ku bwanyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo ubukene bwe bubatungishe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 2 Abakorinto 8 :9

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pasika yacu yatambwe, ari we Kristo. Nuko rero tujye tuziririza iminsi mikuru tudafite umusemburo wa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kera, cyangwa umusemburo ari wo gomwa n'ibibi, ahubwo tugire imitsima idasembuwe ari yo kuri no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kutaryarya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzamuka

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1 Abakorinto 5 :7,8.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abafeso 4 :8.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana ni yo yadushyizeho ikimenyetso, iduha Umwuka wayo mu mitima yacu ho ingwate.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wa Pentekote

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi w’ubutatu

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1 Abakorinto 1 : 22

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami nyir'ibihe byose udapfa, kandi utaboneka, ari we Mana imwe yonyine, ihimbazwe kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyubahiro kibe icyayo iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba habayeho Igaburo rYera, Umupastori ahereko ashyire ku Meza umugati na vino ibikwiriye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1Timoteyo 1 :17

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dusabire Itorero rya Kristo rirwana intambara

content.speaker: all
content.text: nziza muri iyi isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ni Wowe wayoboye intumwa yawe kutwigisha gusabira abantu bose no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubingingira no kubashimira. None turakwinga twitonze ku bw’imbabazi ku bw’imbabazi zawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: (kwemera ibyo tugutuye) kumva ibyo tugusaba, Mana y’icyubahiro. Turagusaba ngo uhe Itorero ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: riri mu isi yose umutima w’ukuri no kugirana ubumwe no guhuza inama. Kandi turagusaba ngo abature

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina ryawe bose bahuze kwemera kw’ijambo ryawe ryera, bashyire hamwe, bakundane urukundo ruva

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuri wowe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi turakwinginga ngo ukize abategetsi. Abakristo bose, ujye ubarinda, cyane cyane umugaragu wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Perezida wa Repubilika y’u Rwanda, ngo adutware neza mu mahoro. Kandi uhe abatware be bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutwara neza, bace imanza batabera, bahane abakora nabi, bakomeze idini yawe y’ukuri kandi bakwize

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingeso nziza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wa twese wo mw’ijuru, Abeskopi, abapastori n’abandi bahereza bawe bose ubahe Ubuntu bwawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo berekanishe Ijambo ryawe rizima ingeso zabo nziza n’ibyo bigisha, kandi bajye bahereza

content.speaker: all
content.text: amasakaremento yawe yera nk’uko bikwiriye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ujye uha abantu bawe bose Ubuntu bwawe buva mu ijuru, cyane cyane aba bateraniye hano, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijambo ryawe ryera baryumvane umutima witonze, ukubaha, bagukorere bakiranuka iminsi yose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazamara bakiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Nyagasani Mana, turakwinga twitonze kurebana imbabazi zawe abababaye n’abashavura

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’indushyi n’abarwayi n’abagize ibindi byago bakiri muru iyi si, ubahumurize kandi ubafashe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi turagushima abantu abantu bawe bose bavuye muri ubu bugingo bakwizeye kandi bakubashye;

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwinginga ngo natwe uduhere Ubuntu, kugira ngo dukurikize ingeso zabo nziza, hanyuma tuzabone

content.speaker: all
content.text: gufatanariza na bo mu bwami bwawe bwo mw’ijuru. Uduhe ibyo, Data wa twese, ku bwa Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuhuza wacu kandi Umurengezi wacu wenyine. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abashaka kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu, ni bamara kugera mu myamya, Umupastori abahugura atya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: YEMWE bakundwa cyane mu Mwami wacu, mugashaka guhabwa Igaburo ryera ry’Umubiri n’Amaraso

content.speaker: all
