content.text: by’Umukiza wacu Kristo, mukwiriye kwibuka uko Pawulo wera yahuguraga abantu bose kwisuzumana

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwete, batarahangara guhabwa kurya kuri uwo mugati no kunywera kuri icyo gikombe; kuko tuzi yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugisha duhabwa ari mwinshi, iyo duhabwa iryo Sakaramento tuzanye umutima wihannye by’ukuri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: (kuko, ubwo tuba turya ku Mubiri wa Kristo, tukanywa ku Maraso ye mu buryo bw’Umwuka, ikiva muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo tuguma muri Kristo, nawe akaguma muri twe; tuba umwe na Kristo, na we akaba umwe natwe).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko mumenye yuko ni duhabwa iryo Sakaramento tudakwiriye kurihabwa tuba twishyize mu kaga

content.speaker: all
content.text: gakomeye; kuko ubwo tuba dutsinzw n’urubanza rwo gucumura Umubiri n’Amaraso bya Kristo Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umukiza wacu; tuba tuririye kandi tunywereye gucirwaho iteka, tuzize kutita ku Mubiri w’Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu; tuba duteye Imana kuturakarira, ikaduteza indwara zitari zimwe n’imfu nyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubw’ibyo, Bene Data, mwicire urubanza, Umwami wacu ye kuba ari we urubacira. Mwihane by’ukuri

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha mwakoze; mwemere rwose Kristo Umukiza wacu mudashidikanya, muboneze ingeso zanyu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi mukundane n’abantu bose urukundo rudafite inenge, mubone kuba abakwiriye gusangira iri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gaburo ryera rihesha imigisha ihishwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ikiruta byose mukwiriye gushima Imana Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, muhamana

content.speaker: all
content.text: umutima wicishije bugufi, muyishimiye ko yancungye isi n’urupfu n’imibabaro by’Umukiza wacu Kristo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni we Mana kandi n’Umuntu. Turamushira yuko yicishije bugufi, akemera kudupfira ku Musaraba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: twebwe abanyabyaha b’indembe, abari mu mwijima no mu gicucu cy’urupfu, kugira ngo aduhindire

content.speaker: all
content.text: abana b’Imana, adukuze, atugeze ku bugingo budashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ubwo tumenye yuko yashakaga ko tujya twibuka Urukundo rwinshi cyane Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu kandi Umkiza wacu yatweretse ubwo yadupfiraga, n’imigisha itarondereka yaduhesheje kuvusha

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaraso ye y’igiciro cyinshi, ni cyo cyatumye ashyiraho ibyo bimenyetso byera, kutubera ingwate

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’urukundo adukunda, kandi ngo bihore bitwibutsa urupfu rwe, tubone kugira ihumure ryinshi ridashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko none tumushimire na Data wa twese n’Umwuka Wera, nk’uko dukwiriye, tumuyoboke,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tumugandukire, tubone gukora ibyo ashaka, kandi duhirimbanire kumukorera turi abera bamukiranukira

content.speaker: all
content.text: iminsi yose tuzamara tukiriho, Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Maz’Umupastori abwire abaje guhabwa Isakaremento ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: YEMWE abihana rwose by’ukuri ibyaha byanyu,mugakunda na bagenzi banyu, mukemera kugira ingeso

content.speaker: all
content.text: nshya mwumviye amategeko y’Imana, mukagendere mu nzira yayo yera, mwigire hafi mwizeye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: muhabwe iri Sakaremento ryera ryo kubahumuriza, kandi mwaturire Imana ishobora byose ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byanyu mwicishe bugufi, mupfukamye, mwitonze.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma ibyo Kwatura iyaha kw’abantu bose bivugwe n’Umupastori hamwe n’abaje guhabwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: isakaramento bapfukamye bitonze, bati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Se w’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, Umuremyi w’ibintu byose, uzacira abantu bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: imanza, twemeranye umubabaro ibyaha n’ibicumuro byinshi twakoze nabi rwose hato na hato, mu byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: dutekereza, no mu byo tuvuga, no mu byo dukora, ducumura icyubahiro cyawe, Mana, bituma twizanira

content.speaker: all
content.text: uburakari bwawe. Turihannye rwose; tubabajwe cyane n’ibyo bicumuro byacu; iyo tubyibutse, tugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: agahinda, bitUbera umutwaro uremereye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utubabarire, utubabarire, Data wa twese w’imbabazi zose. Kubw’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu utubabarire ibyo twagakoze byose; kandi uduhe kujya tugukorera neza, tukunezeze, tugire ingeso

content.speaker: all
content.text: nshya nziza, kugira nGo none n’iminsi Yose Izina ryawe ryubahahwe. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori ahagaruke, ahindukirire abantu, avuge ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMANA ishobora byose, Data wa tewse wo mw’ijuru, yasezeranije ku bw’imbabazi zayo nyinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubabarira abayihindukiriye bihannye rwose, bizeye by’ukuri. Ibagirire imbabazi, ibababarire

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha byanyu byose, ibahe imbaraga zo gukora ibyiza byose; hanyuma izabageze mu bugingo

content.speaker: all
content.text: budashira. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimwumve amagambo ahumuriza Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo abwira abamuhindukiriye by’ukuri

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: "Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe, nimuze munsange ndabaruhura.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Kuko Imana itatumye Umwana wayo mu isi gucira abari mu isi ho iteka, ahubwo yabikoreye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo abari mu isi bakizwe na we.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nimwumve ibyo Pawulo wera yavuze ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Iri jambo ni iryo kwizerwa rikwiriye kwemerwa rwose, yuko Kristo Yesu yazanywe mu isi no

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukiza abanyabyaha.”

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nimwumve ibyo Yohana wera yavuze ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Ni hagira umuntu ukora icyaha, dufite Umurengezi kuri Data wa twese, ni we Yesu Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukiranuka. Uwo ni we mpongano y’ibyaha byacu.”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori akurikize avuge ati;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mucurure imitima yanyu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu                       Tuyicururire Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori               Dushime Imana Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu                       Ni byiza, kandi biratunganye ko dukora dutyo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori ahindukirire Ameza, avuga ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, ni byiza rwose, kandi biratunganye, ko tugushimira ahantu hose n’ibihe byose, uri Data wa

content.speaker: all
content.text: twese Wera, Imana ishobora byose ihoraho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ayo magambo uhereye kuri ´Data wa twese´ areke kuvugwa ku munsi w’ubutatu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NI CYO gitumye twebwe hamwe n’abaMarayika bakuru n’abo mu ijuru bose, dushima Izina ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’icubahiro, tuguhimbaza ibihe byose tuti, Nyagasani Mana nyiri ingabo, uru Uwera, uri Uwera, uri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwera; icyubahiro cyawe gikwiriye ijuru n’isi; Wowe Uwiteka usumba byose uhimbazwe. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: AMAGAMBO YO KONGERWAHO KU MINSI MIKURU

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo kuvuka ku minsi irindwi ikurikiraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUKO watanze Umwana wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo kuvuka kubgacu, nk’uko tubyibuka muri iki gihe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko yahinduwe n’Umwuka Wera, akaba umuntu rwose abikomoye mu nda y’Umwari Mariya nyina,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabyarwa adafite inenge rwose, ngo abone kudukuraho ibyaha. Ni cyo gitunye n’ibindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo kuzuka no ku minsi irindwi ikurikiraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: KANDI cyane cyane dukwiriye kuguhimbariza Kuzuka k’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo kw’icyubahiro, kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari we Mwana w’intama wa Pasika yacu wadutangiwe, akamaraho ibyaha by’abari mu isi. Niwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: wahinduje ubusa urupfu gupfa kwe, kandi ku bwo Kuzuka kwe yatugaruriye ubugingo budashira. Nicyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gitumye n’ibindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wo Kuzamuka no ku minsi irindwi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikiraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUBW’Umwana wawe ukunda cyane Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu wiyeretse Intumwa ze zose ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugaragaro, amaze kuzukana icyubahiro cyinshi. Yarazamutse ajya mu ijuru zimureba, ngo adutegurire

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwanya; kandi ngo, aho ari, natwe tuzajyeyo, twimane na wem u cyubahiro cye. Ni cyo gitumye

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibindi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi wa Pentekote no ku minsi irindwi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikurikiraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUBWA Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu wasezeranye gutuma Umwuka Wera, Muri iki gihe turibuka uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yamanutse avuye mu ijuru nk’inkubi y’umuyaga uhuha cyane, ameze nk’indimi z’umuriro zijya ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntumwa. Uwo Mwuka yazanywe no kubigisha no kubayobora mu by’ukuri byose; kandi yabahaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: impano zo kuvuga indimi zitari zimwe; n’ubushizi bw’amanga bwo kubwiriza amahanga yose ubutumwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwiza. Maze natwe yabudukuje mu mwijima no mu myigishirize iyobya, atujyana mu mucyo utangaje,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo tukumenye n’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo. Ni cyo gitumye n’ibindi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ku munsi w’ubutatu

content.speaker: all
content.text: URI Imana imwe kandi Umwami umwe; ariko nturi Peresona umwe wenyine, ahubwo uri abaperesona

content.speaker: all
content.text: batatu, nyamara muri ubumana bumwe. Ni cyo gitumye twebwe hamwe n’abaMarayika n’abaMarayika

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakuru n’abo mu ijuru bose, dushima Izina ryawe ry’icubahiro, tuguhimbaza ibihe byose tuti “Nyagasani

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana nyiri ingabo, uri Uwera, uri Uwera, uri Uwera, icyubahiro cyawe gikwiriye ijuru n’isi; Wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka usumba byose usumba byose uhimbazwe:“ Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori apfukame i ruhande rw’Ameza avuge mu izina ry’abaje guhabwa isakaramento

content.speaker: all
content.text: ati:(Cyangw’ubundi yafatanya n’abandi kubivuga bati:)

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI w’imbabazi; ntiduhangara kwegera aya meza yaw twiringiye gukiranuka kwacu, ahubwo tuje

content.speaker: all
content.text: twiringiye imbabazi zawe nyinshi zikomeye. Ntidukwiriye gutoragura n’ubuvungukira buri munsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Ameza yawe. Ariko uri Umwami udahinduka, imico yawe n’ukugira imbabazi. Mwami w’ibambe uduhe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurya ku Mubiri w’Umwama wawe ukunda Yesu Kristo. No kunywa ku Maraso ye, uburyo butuma imibiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: yacu yandujwe n’ibyaha yezwa n’Umubiri we, n’imitima yacu yezwa n’Amaraso ye y’igiciro cyinshi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo duhore muri we, na we ahore muri twe ibihe byose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori n’amara gutegura umugati na vino, aho ashobora kumanyura neza umugati nogufata

content.speaker: all
content.text: igikombe abantu bamureba, avuga ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mw’ijuru, watanganye imbabazi zawe nyinshi Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe w’ikinege Yesu Kristo gupfira ku musaraba ngo aducungure, kuri wo yitangayeho rimwe kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: igitambo n’ituro n’icyiru byuzuye, bitunganye rwose, birangiriza rimwe gukuraho ibyaha by’abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose. Kandi yashyizeho urwibutso ruhoraho rw’urupfu rwe rw’igiciro cyinshi, adutegekera mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Butumwa bwe bwera ngo duhore turukurikiza kugeza aho azagarukira, None Data wa twese

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’ibambe, turakwinginga twitonze cyane, utwumvire, ni twakira ibi bintu waremye, umugati na vino,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko Umwana wawe Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yategetse, ngo bitwibutse urupfu rwe n’imibabaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: ye, kugira ngo dusangire Umubiri we n’Amaraso by’igiciro cyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijoro yagambaniwemwo, asingira umugati; amaze kuwushimira Imana, arawumanyagura, awuha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigishwa be, arababwira ati <<Mwakire murye uyu ni umubiri wanjye ubatangiwe; mujye mukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutya ngo munyibuke<>>

content.speaker: all
content.text: (afate isahane mu ntoke, awumanyagure, maze ashyire ikiganza ku mugati wose).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi barangije kurya, asingira igikombe; amaze kugishimira Imana agiha abigishwa be,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababwira ati <<Nimunyweho mwese; aya ni yo maraso yanjye y’isezerano rishya avuye ku bwanyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kubw’abandi benshi gukuraho ibyaha; mujye mukora mutya, kugira ngo munyibuke.

content.speaker: all
content.text: (afate igikombe mu ntoke, ashyire ikiganza ku bintu cyose kirimo vino).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori abanze yihe Isakaramento, umugati na vino ku bwe, hanyuma arihe abandi Bapastori

content.speaker: all
content.text: niba bahari; ahereko arihe abantu bapfukamye bitonze agire ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUBIRI w’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo wagutangiwe ukurinde umubiri n’umutima kugeza ubwo uzagera

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bugingo budashira. Akira, urye uyu, wibuke ko ari wowe Kristo yapfiriye, umurishe umutima wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: wizeye, ushima. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nabaha vino avuge ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMARASO y’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yavuye ku bwawe akurinde umubiri n’umutima kugeza ubgo

content.speaker: all
content.text: uzagera mu bugingo budashira. Nywaho, wibuka ko ari wowe Kristo yaviriye amaraso, kandi ushime.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bose ni bamara kugaburinzwa, Umupastori agaruke ku meza y’Umwami wacu, asubizeho umugati na

content.speaker: all
content.text: vino bisigaye, abitwikirize umwenda mwiza wera yitonze.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umupastori avuge Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu, afatanije n’abantu bose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mw‘ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize Umubi; kuko Ubwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe iteka ryose. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori ahereko avuge iri sengeshowenyine.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, twebwe abanu bawe, bitonze turagusaba cyane, kuko uri umubyeyi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwiza, ngo wemere kubw’imbabazi zawe iki gitambo cyacu cyo guhimbaza no gushima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Turakwinginga cyane twitonze ku bwo gukiranuka k’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo no ku bw’urupfu

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwe, kandi kuko twizeye amaraso ye, ibyo biduheshanye Itorero ryawe ryose kubabarirwa gukiranirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwacu, kandi duhabwe indi migisha yose ikomoka mu mibabaro ye. None ubu, Mwami Mana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwihaye, tugutuye imitima n’imibiri yacu, ngo bibe igitambo cycu gikwiriye, cyera, kizima: kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: turisabira, twebwe abasangiye iri Gaburo ryera, kugira ngo tugwizwemo ubuntu bwawe n’imigisha yawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: iva mu ijuru.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nubwo tudakwiriye kuguhongerera igitambo cyose kubw’ibyaha byacu byinshi, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwingize, wemere ibyo tugukoreye none bidukwiriye rwose, utabitewe n’ibyiza twakoze, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: utubabarire ibyaha byacu; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wwacu. Ayi Data wa twese ushobora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, ku bwe no muri we icyubahiro cyose n’igitinyiro cyose bibe ibyawe mu bumwe bw’umwuka Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: iihe byose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, twebwe abahawe iri Gaburo ryera risura iby’ubwiru bw’Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagushimana umutima wose, kuko utugaburiye ifunguro ry’umwuka, ni ryo mubiri n’amaraso

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu by’igiciro cyinshi; kandi ku bw’ibyo turahamya neza ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: udukunda, ukatugirira imbabzi, kandi ukatugirira ingingo z’Umubiri w’Umwana wawe, ni wo mutwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushimwa w’abakwizeye bose.Kandi si byo byonyine; turi n’abaragwwa bafite ibyiringiro byo kuzataha

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bwami budashira, tubuheshejwe n’urupfu rw’Umwama wawe ukundwa cyane no kubabazwa kwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kw’igiciro cyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turakwinginga twitonze cyane kudufashisha ubuntu bwawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: butuma dukomeza kuba mu bumwe bwera dufitanye, tubone gukora imirimo myiza yose waduteguriye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo tuyikomeze. Ibyo tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kugira ngo Wowe hamwe na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we n’Umwuka Wera mugire ishimwe ryose n’icyubahiro cyose iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori akurikizeho gusengana n’abandi aya magambo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MU IJURU icyubahiro kibe Icy’Imana, no mu isi amahoro abe mubo yishimira. Nyagasani Mana, Mwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo mu ijuru, Mana Data wa twese ushobora byose, turaguhimbaza, turagushima, turagusenga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagusingiza, kandi turagushimira icyubahiro cyawe cyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, Yesu Kristo, Mwana n’ikinege wa Data wa twese ukuraho ibyaha by’abari mu isi, utugirire

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbabazi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wowe ukuraho ibyaha b’abari mu isi, utugirire imbabazi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wowe ukuraho ibyaha b’abari mu isi, utugirire imbabazi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wowe wicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data wa twese, utugirire imbabazi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko ari Wowe wenyine wera, ari wowe wenyine wera, ari Wowe Mugabe wenyine. Kristo, ni wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhimbazanywa n’Umwuka wera mu cyubahiro cy’Imana Data wa twese, Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umupastori (cyangwa Umwepiskopi niba ahari), abasabire umugisha n’aya magambo, babone

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugenda, ati;

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibwira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Kandi umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, Umwana, kandi Umwuka wera ube muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwe, kandi ugumane namwe iminsi yose. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni hagira ibisigara ku mugati na vino byarobanuwe, Umupastori na bamwe mu bamaze guherezwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaze gusabira abantu umugisha bahereko barangize ibisigaye bitonze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Andi masengesho yo gusomwa barangije gutura amaturo, nk’uko Umupastori ashaka, niba hatariho

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igaburo ryera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, twebwe abagaragu n’abaja bawe, turakwingize ku bw’imababzi zawe, udufashe mu byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukwingingira no mu byo tugusaba, kandi udutangarize inzira izatugeza ku gakiza kadashira; kandi ubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo muri ubu bugingo bw’abapfa bigenda bihinduka, cyangwa bidutungura, ujye ubiturinda, kuko uhora

content.speaker: all
content.text: witeguye kudufashisha Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: abe ariho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabzi zawe. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: KUBATIZA ABANA BATO

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni byiza kwiteguza ko umunsi ko abana babo bakwiriye kubatirizwaho uzaba uw’icyumweru, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwe wo mu minsi ( mikuru, kuko ari umunsi abantu bakunda guteraniraho ari benshi; abo bantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakwiriye kuba abagabo bo guhamya ko aba bana babatijwe bemewe kwinjira mu mubare w’Itorero rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo. Kandi umuntu wese uri aho akwiriye kwibuka ibyo yasezeraniye mu kubatizwa kwe, nareba

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubatizwa kw’abo bana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo kubatizwa bikwiriye kuvugwa mu rurimi rwa bene gihugu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko ni haramukahabaye ikibuza kubabatiza ku munsi mukuru, babasha kwemerwa kubatizwa ku wundi

content.speaker: all
content.text: munsi wose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mumenye yuko umwana wo kubatizwa, niba ari umuhungu, akwiriye kugira abishingizi batatu, abagabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babiri n’umugore umwe; kandi niba ari umukobwa, akwiriye kugira abagore babiri n’umugabo umwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ababyeyi bemerewe kuba abishingizi b’abana babo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abishingizi bakwiriye kuba Abakristo bashimwa.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Umupastori n’agera ku cyo kubatirizamo kirimo amazi meza, ahagarare aho, abaze ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muri aba bana harimo ababatijwe, cyangwa nta wurabatizwa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba basubiza bati, Ntawurabatizwa, Umupastori akomeze ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, nk’iko abantu bose bavukana kamere ikunda gukora ibyaha, kandi nk’uko Umukiza wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo yavuze ati “Ntawe ushobora kwinjira mu Bwami bw’Imana atabyawe n’amazi n’Umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wera, ndabinginga ngo musabe Imana Data wa twese mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubwo imbabazi zayo nyinshi ihe aba bana icyo btabasha guhabwa na kamere bavukany, babatirishwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: amazi n’Umwuka Wera, binjire mu Itorero rya Kristo ryera, kandi bahinduke ingingo zaryo nzima.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dusenge.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe nyinshi kera winjije Noa n’abo mu rugwe rwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu  nkuge,  urabarokora,  ntibicwa  n’amazi;  hanyuma washoreye  abantu  bawe  Abisirayeli,  ubacisha mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyanja itukura, ni yo yasuraga Kubatiza kwawe kwea; kandi Ubwo Umwana wawe ukunda cyane, Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo, yabatizagwa mu ruzi Yorordani, yejeje amazi ngo abe icyitegererezo cyo gukuraho ibyaha. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: none  turakwinginga  ngo  ku  bw’imbabazi  aba  bana,  uboze  ubeze  n’Umwuka  Wera,  bakire  uburakari

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwawe,  binjire  mu  nkuge,  ni  yo  Torero  rya  Kristo,  babone  guca  mu  biruhanya  by’iyi  si  bakomeje  ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: twemera, banejejwe n’ibyiringiro bafite, kandi bashoye imizi mu rukundo, hanyuma bazajye mu gihugu

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’ubugingo  budashira,  bimane  nawe  ibihe  byose;  tubisabye  mu  Izina  rya  Yesu  Kristo  Umwami  wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana  ishobora  byose  ihoraho,  umutabazi  w’abagutabaze,  umuvunyi  w’abaguhungiraho  bose,  uhesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakwizera ubugingo, kandi uzra abapfuye,  none  dusabiye aba bana kugira ngo, ubwo baje kubatizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubatizwa  kwawe  kwera, bahabwe  isezerano  ryo kubyarwa  ubwa  kabiri  mu  buryo  nw’umwuka,  n’iryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubabarirwa ibyaha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani,  ubakire,  nk’uko  wasezeranije  mu  magambo  yavuzwe  n’Umwana  wawe  ukunda  cyane,  ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Musabe, muzahabwa; mushake, muzabona; mukomanage, muzakingurirwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: None rero twebwe abasabye uduhe, abashatse tubone, abakomanze udukingurire, kugira ngo aba bana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bahabwe  umugisha  wo  kwoza  kwawe  ko  mu  buryo  bw’Umwuka,  babone  kuzinjira  mu  Bwami  bwawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: budashira, nk’uko wadusezeranije muri Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu bose bahaguruke; maze

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimwumve amagambo y’Ubutumwa Bwiza bwanditswe na Mariko Wera, mu gice cya cumi, uhereye ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: murongo wa cumi n’itatu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bamuzanira abana bato ngo abakoreho, abigishwa barabacyaha. Ariko Yesu abibonye ararakara

content.speaker: all
content.text: arababwira ati"Mureke abana bato bansange, ntimubabuze kuko abameze batyo ubwami bw'Imana ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwabo. Ndababwira ukuri yuko utemera ubwami bw'Imana nk'umwana muto, atazabwinjiramo na

content.speaker: all
content.text: hato." Arabakikira, abaha umugisha abarambitseho ibiganza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori, namara gusoma ubutumwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abahuguze aya magambo asobanura

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo asomye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bakundwa, mwumvise muri ubwo Butumwa amagambo Umukiza wacu Kristo yavuze ategeka ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamuzanira abana bato, acyaha abashakaga kubabuza, kandi ahugura abantu bose gukurikiza imico

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’abana batigeze gukora ikibi. Mubonye ko ibyo yakoze byerekanye urukundo yabakundaga, kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabakikiye, akabarambikaho ibiganza bye, akabaha umugisha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero namwe ntimushidikanye, ahubwo mwizere rwose, yuko yemerana imbabazi aba bana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakiriza amaboko ye abafatiye ibambe, kandi ko azabaha umugisha w’ubugingo budashira,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umugabane wo mu Bwami bwe buhoraho. Kubw’ibyo, nk’uko twizeye rwose yuko Data wa twese wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru akunda cyane kugirira neza aba bana, nk’uko Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo yahamije; kandi nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tudashidikanya yuko yemeye uyu murimo wacu w’urukundo w’urukundo wo kuyizanira aba bana ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: babatizwe Kubatiza kwayo kwera, tubanze tuyishime, twizeye kandi tuyubashye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira twicishije bugufi, yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wemeye kuduhamagarira kumenya Ubuntu bwawe, tukakwizera, None turagusaba, utwongerere uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumenya, udukomezemo uko kwizera iminsi yose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi aba bana ubahe Umwuka wawe Wera, kugira ngo babyarwe ubwa kabiri, kandi babe

content.speaker: all
content.text: abaragwa b’agakiza katazashira; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, ugumana nawe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera none n’ibihe byose. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umupastori ahugure Abishingizi bose ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bakundwa cyane, muzanye aba bana kubatizwa, kandi musabye Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo kubakira,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo ababohore ibyaha, abeze n’Umwuka Wera, azabinjize mu Bwami bwo mu ijuru, kandi azabahe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugingo budashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwumvise kandi yuko Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo yasezeranije mu Butumwa bwe bwera gukora ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mumusaba byose, kandi ibyo yasezeranije ntazabura kubisohoza rwose. Nuko rero, ubwo Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yasezeranye atyo, aba bana nabo bakwiriye gusezeranirwa namwe abishingizi babo kugeza aho

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazakurira, bakisezeranira ubwabo, yuko bazimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, bakazakomeza kwizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijambo ryera ry’Imana, bakazitondera amategeko yayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ababyeyi n’abishingizi bahaguruke basezeranire

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abana babo imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Pasitori:    WOWE nk’umwishingizi, usezeranye kwigisha uyu mwana kwimura no kwanga Satani n’ingeso

content.speaker: all
content.text: ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’isi by’ubusa, no kwifuza ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: atazabikurukiza, cyangwa gutegekwa na byo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori   Usezeranye gutoza uyu mwana kwemera Imana data wa twese, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi; Na

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi ko yabyawe n’Umwari Mariya, kandi ko iyo nda yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera; ko yababajwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo Pontiyo Pilato yari umutegetsi; ko yabambwe ku musaraba, agapfa, agahambwa, akamanuka i

content.speaker: all
content.text: kizimu mu bapfuye, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, akajya mu ijuru? Ko ubu yicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data

content.speaker: all
content.text: wa twese ushobora byose, kandi ko azavayo ku mperuka y’isi gucira abariho n’abapfuye urubanza?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi uzamutoza kwemera Umwuka Wera, kwemera ko hariho Itorero ryera Katolika ry’Abakristo bose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Ubumwe bw’Abera, no Kutubabarirwa ibyaha, no Kuzuka kw’umubiri, n’Ubugingo budashira, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: tumara gupfa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori:  Usezeranye gutoza uyu mwana gusenga no kumvira iby’Imana ishaka n’ibyo itegeka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabigenderamo iminsi yose azamara akiraho?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzamutoza kujya mu materaniro kugira ngo yige Ijambo ry’Imana kugeza ubwo azakurikira akisezeranira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwe; kandi uzamutoza gusoma ibyanditswe byera no kuririmbira Imana?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza      Byose ndabyemeye kandi nsezeranye kuzabikora.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori   Namwe mu izina ry’uyu mwana murashaka ko abatizwa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza        Nicyo dushaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori n’amara kubibaza, asenge atya ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana y’ibambe, wemere ko kamere y’Adamu wa kera iri muri aba bana ihambwa, kugira ngo kamere

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’umuntu mushya izurizwe muri bo. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemere ko irari ry’umubiri ryose ripfa muri bo. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemere kubaha ubushobozi n’ububasha bwo kunesha Satani n’iby’iyi si n’ibya kamere. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuntu wese, twebwe mu murimo wacu tuguhaye ubu, wemere kujya umutoza ingeso nziza nk’iz’abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru, akazabihererwa ingororano, Mwami Mana ihimbazwa, ihoraho, kandi itegeka byose iteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira kuko Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ukundwa cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: yavuyebamazi n’amaraso mu rubavu rwe, ngo tubone kubabarirwa ibyaha byacu,agaha abigishwa be

content.speaker: all
content.text: itegeko ryo kujya kwigisha abo mu mahanga yose, bakabatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera ; none turakwinginze wumve ibyo aba bantu bateraniye hano

content.speaker: all
content.text: bagusabye ; robanura aya mazi, ngo abe icyitegerezo cyo kozaho ibyaha ; kandi emera aba bana baje

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyabatirizwamo,ko buzura imbabazi zawe, bakaguma mu mubare w’abana bawe bizerwa b’intore ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori yakire Umwana, abwire abishingizi ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimwite uyu mwana izina.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori avuge izina bamubwiye ´, asuke amazi ku mutwe w’uwo mwana, ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kanaka, ndakubatiza mu izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umupastori avuge ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: Twakiriye uyu mwana mu Iteraniro ry’umukmbi wa Kristo, tumushyizeho ikimenyetso cy’umusaraba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kimuhamiriza ngo uhereye ubu atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wabambwe, kandi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: azagumya arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibindera ye, arwnya ibyaha n’iby’isi na satani, agakomeza kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: intore ya Kristo kandi umugaragu we (umuja we) ukiranuka kugeza ku gupfa. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori akurikizeho aya magambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, ubwo aba bana bahawe ingwate yo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, bagaterwa mu mubiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Itorero rya Kristo nk’ingurukira, dushimire Imana ishobora byose iyo migisha, tuyisenge duhuje

content.speaker: all
content.text: umutima, dusabira aba bana ngo bazamare iminsi isigaye bakiriho bameze neza nk’uko babitangiye ubu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hakurikireho Isengesho ry’umwami ry’Umwami wacu, bose bapfukanye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze: ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; Uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize Umubi. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese w’ibambe, turagushimira yuko wasezeranye kubyarisha ubwa kabiri aba bana Umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe Wera, no kubakira ngo babe abana bawe binjiye mu Itorero ryawe ryera. Kandi ubwo kubatizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kutubera ikimenyetso cyo gupfa ku byaha, no guhambanwa na Kristo mu rupfu rwe, turakwingingira aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bana ngo bazapfe ku byaha, babereho gukiranuka; kandi ngo bahambanwe na Kristo uburyo butuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazazukana nawe. Maze mu gihe cy’imperuka bazaraganwe n’abandi bose bo mu Itorero ryawe ryera

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwami bwawe budashira. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abishingizi babaguruke, Umupastori abahugure ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBWO mwebwe abishingizi b’aba bana mubasezeraniye ko bazimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, bakizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana, bakayikorera, mugomba kwibuka yuko ari Umurimo wanyu kureba aba bana ko bigishwa neza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo bazagera ku gihe cyo gusobanukirwa ko mwabasezeraniye iri sezerano rikomeye, mukabarahirira

content.speaker: all
content.text: iyi ndahiro, mukabahamiriza ibyo muhamije ubu. Kandi kugira ngo babimenye neza, muzajye mureba, ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bajya baza kumva ibibwirizwa; cyane cyan ko bigishwa ibyo Kwemera, n’Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Amategeko cumi mu rurimi rwabo, hamwe n’ibindi byose Umukristo akwiriye kumenya no kwemera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo ubugingo bwabo bumere neza. Kandi muzagire umwete wo kubarera neza, nokubatoza ingeso nziza

content.speaker: all
content.text: za gikristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi mujye mwibuka yuko kubatizwa kutwibutsa ibyo duhamya, niko gukurikiza icyitegererezo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’Umukiza wacu Kristo, tugashushanywa na we; kandi nk’uko yadupfiriye, akatuzukira, natwe ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: dukwiriye gupfa ku byaha, tukazukira gukiranuka, tukabona uko twicisha ingeso zacu mbi zose n’irari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryose, tugakomeza iteka ingeso nziza zo kubaha Imana.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma yongere, avuge ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: TURABAHUGURA ngo mugire umwete kuzazanira Umwepiskopi aba bana ngo abarambikeho ibiganza

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamaze kwigishwa neza ibyo Kwemera kw’Intumwa, n’Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu, n’Amategeko cumi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: hamwe n’ibya Gatekisimu n’ibindi abo gukomezwa bategetswe kwiga.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: KUBATIZWA ABANTU BAKURU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: BAFITE UBWENGE BWO KWISUBIRIZA.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu ni baba bateranye ku Cyumweru cyangwa ku wundi munsi mukuru, abashaka kubatizwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bagasanga bashyitse, abishingizi babo cya kabiri cyo mu byo Gusenga kwa mugitondo cyangwa kwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: nimugoroba, nk’uko Umupastori ashima.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ni bagera aho babatiriza, Umupastori ahagarare, abaze yuko muri bo harimo ababatijwe kera. Ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamuhakanira, avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BAKUNDWA cyane, tuzi yuko abantu bavukana kamere ikunda gukora ibyaha, kandi ko ikibyarwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umubiri na cyo ari umubiri, kandi ko abatwarwa na kamere iyo badashobora kunezeza Imana, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bahora bakora ibyaha mu buryo bwinshi. Kandi tuzi yuko Umukiza wacu Kristo yavuze ati “Umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: utabyawe ubwa kabiri, n’Amazi n’Umwuka, ntabasha kubona Ubwami bw’Imana ; Ni cyo gituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbinginga gusaba Imana Data wa twese mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu, kugira ngo ihe aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bantu ibyo batabasha guheshwa na kamere yabo, babatirishwe Amazi n’Umwuka Wera, binjizwe mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itorero ryera rya Kristo, kandi babe abantu baryo by’ukuri

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori avuge ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dusenge.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abantu bose bapfukame.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe nyinshi kera winjije Nowa n’abo mu rugo rwe mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nkuge, urabarakora, ntibicwa n’amazi ; hanyuma washoreye abantu bawe Abisirayeli, ubacisha mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyanjya itukura niyo yasuraga Kubatizwa kwawe kwera. Kandi ubwo Umwana wawe ukunda cyane Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo yabatizwaga mu ruzi Yorodani, yejeje Amazi ngo abe icyitegererezo cyo gukuraho ibyaha. Nuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: none turakwinginga ngo ku bw’imbabazi zawe zitagira akagero, urebane imbabazi aba bantu bawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uboze, bakire uburakari bwawe, binjire mu nkuge, ni yo Torero rya Kristo, babone guca mu biruhanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’iyi si bakomeje ibyo twemera, banejejwe n’ibyiringiro bafite, kandi bashoye imizi mu rukundo,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: hanyuma bazajye mu gihugu cy’ubugingo budashira, bimane nawe ibihe byose; tubisabye ku bwa Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, umutabazi w’abagutabaza, umuvunyi w’abaguhungiraho bose, uhesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakwizera ubugingo, kandi uzura abapfuye, none dusabiye aba bantu kugira ngo, ubwo baje kubatizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubatiza kwawe kwera, babyarwe ubwa kabiri mu buryo bw’Umwuka, ni ko kubabarirwa ibyaha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, ubakize, nk’uko wasezeraniye mu magambo yavizwe n’Umwana wawe ukunda cyane ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: “Musabe, muzahabwa; mushake muzabona; mukomange, muzakingurirwa”. None rero twebwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: abasabye uduhe, abashatse tubone abakomanze udukingurire, kugira ngo aba bantu bahabwe umugisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo koza kwawe ko mu buryo bw’Umwuka, babone kwinjira mu Bwami bwawe budashira, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: wadusezeranije muri Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu bose bahagaruke; maze Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nimwumve amagambo y’Ubutumwa Bwiza bwanditswe na Yohana Wera mu gice cya gatatu, uhereye ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: murongo wa mbere.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hariho umuntu wo mu Bafarisayo witwaga Nikodemo, umutware wo mu Bayuda. Uwo yasanze Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: nijoro aramubwira ati"Mwigisha, tuzi yuko uri umwigisha wavuye ku Mana, kuko ari nta wubasha gukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibimenyetso ujya ukora, keretse Imana iri kumwe na we." Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe ubwa kabiri, atabasha kubona ubwami bw'Imana." Nikodemo

content.speaker: all
content.text: aramubaza ati"Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kubyarwa akuze? Yakongera agasubira mu nda ya nyina

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabyarwa?" Yesu aramusubiza ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndakubwira yuko umuntu utabyawe n'amazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'Umwuka atabasha kwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana. Ikibyarwa n'umubiri na cyo ni umubiri, n'ikibyarwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'Umwuka na cyo ni umwuka. Witangazwa n'uko nkubwiye yuko bibakwiriye kubyarwa ubwa kabiri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuyaga uhuha aho ushaka, ukumva guhuha kwawo ariko ntumenya aho uva cyangwa aho ujya. Ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwabyawe n'Umwuka wese amera."

content.speaker: all
content.text: Namara kubisoma, avuge aya magambo ahugura, atya ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA, mwumvise muri ubwo Butumwa bwiza, uko umukiza wacu yavuze, yuko umuntu utabyawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Amazi n’Umwuka Wera atabasha kwinjira mu bwami w’Imana. Nuko rero mubona yuko iri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Sakaramento rikwiriye abantu bose bishobotse. Kandi dusoma mu gice giheruka cy’Ubutumwa bwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mariko Wera, yuko Kristo agiye kuzamuka ngo ajye mu ijuru, yategetse abigishwa be ati << mujyye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mubihugu byose, mwigishe abaremwe bose Ubutumwa Bwiza. Uwizera akabatizwa, azakizwa; ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: utizera azacirwaho iteka. Ayo magambo na yo atwigisha umumari mwinshi kubatizwa kutugirira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo cyatumye Petero Wera, agitangira kubwiriza iby’Ubutumwa Bwiza, abantu benshi bacumitwa mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mitima, bamubazanya n’izindi ntumwa bati << Bagabo bene Data, tugire dute? Arabasubiza ati <<

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwihane, umuntu wese muri mwe abatizwe mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo ngo mubone kubabarirwa ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byanyu, maze muhabwe iyo mpano y’Umwuka Wera, kuko isezerano ari iryanyu n’abana banyu, n’abari

content.speaker: all
content.text: kure bose bazahamagarwa n’Umwami Imana yacu. Hanyuma akomeza kubahamiriza n’andi magambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: menshi, arabahugura ati <<Mwikize, mwitandukanye n’ab’iki gihe biyobagiza. Kandi Petero uwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yahamije mu rwandiko rwe rwa mbere yuko Kubatizwa kudukiza na none, icyakora si uko gukuraho ico

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryo ku mubir, ahubwo n’isezerano ku Mana ry’umutima uticira urubanza, ribakirisha Kuzuka kwa Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntimushidikanye rero, ahubwo mwizere rwose, yuko Kristo yemeranye imbabazi aba Bantu bihannye

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’ukuri, bakamusanga bamaze kwizera, kandi yuko ababariye ibyaha byabo; akabaha Umwuka Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umugisha w’ubugingo budashira, akabagabira umugabane w’ubwami bwe butazashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero, ubwo twizeye rwose yuko Data wa twese wo mu Ijuru akunda cyane kugirira neza

content.speaker: all
content.text: aba bantu, nk’uko byahamijwe na Yesu Kristo Umwana we, tumushime twizeye kandi tumwubahsye tuti,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose ihoraho, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira twicidhije bugufi, ko wemeye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuduhamagarira kumenya ubuntu bwawe, ngo tukwizere. Utwongeremo uko kumenya, udukomezemo

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko kwizera iminsi yose; kandi abantu ubahe Umwuka wawe Wera ngo babyarwe ubwa kabiri, baragwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: agakiza gahoraho. Tubisabye ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori ahereko abwire abagiye kubatizwa ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, abaje hano mushaka Kubatizwa kwera, mwumvise uko iri teraniro ribasabiye ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo abakire, abahe umugisha, ababohore ibyaha byanyu, abinjize mu bwami bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ijuru, kandi abahe ubugingo budashira. Kandi mwumvise mu Butumwa bwe bwera, uko yasezeranye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuduha ibyo tumusaba byose; kandi ibyo yasezeranye kuduha ibyo tumusaba byose; kandi ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yasezeranije ntazabura kubisohoza rwose. Nuko rero, nk’uko Kristo yasezeranije atyo, namwe mukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusezeranira by’ukuri imbere y’aya bishingizi banyu, kandi imbere y’iri teraniro ryose, ko muzimura

content.speaker: all
content.text: Satani n’ingeso ze zose, mukazakomeza kwizera Ijambo ry’Imana ryera, mukajya mwitondera amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori ahereko abaze abantu bagiye kubatizwa umwe umwe ibi bibazo, ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wimuye Satani n’ingeso ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si by’ubusa, no kwifuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri, ngo utazabikurikiza, cyangwa ugategekwa na byo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemeye Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Na Yesu Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu? Kandi wemeye ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabyawe n’Umwari Mariya, kandi ko iyo nda yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera; ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yababajwe, ubwo Pontiyo Pilato yari umutegetsi, ko yabambwe ku musaraba, agapfa

content.speaker: all
content.text: agahambwa, akamanuka ikuzimu mu bapfuye, akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu, akajya mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ijuru? Wemeye ko ubu yicaye iburyo bw’Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose, kandi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: azavayo ku mperuka y’isi gucira abakiriho n’abapfuye urubanza?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi wemeye Umwuka Wera, wemeye ko hariho Itorero ryera Katolika

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’Abakristo bose, n’Ubumwe bw’Abera, no Kubabarirwa ibyaha, no kuzuka k’umubiri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Ubugingo budashira, ni tumara gupfa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nawe urashaka kubatizwa wemeye utyo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo nshaka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemeye ko uzajya wumvira ibyo Imana ishaka n’ibyo itegeka ukabigenderamo iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose ukiriho?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzagerageza kubikora, Imana ari yo mufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori namara kubibaza, asenge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana y’ibambe, wemere ko kamere y’Adamu wa kera iri muri aba Bantu ihambwa, kugira ngo kamere

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’umuntu mushya izurizwe muri bo. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemere ko irari ry’umubiri ryose ripfa muri bo, ngo ibyo Umwuka ategeka byose bikurikire muri bo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemere kubaha ubushobozi bwo kunesha Satani n’iby’iyi si n’ibya kamere. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemere ko aba bantu twebwe tuguhaye ubu bahabwa ingeso nziza ziva mu ijuru,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakazagorerwa ingororano zihoraho, ku bw’imbabazi zawe, Mwami Mana ihimbazwa, ihoraho ibihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira kuko Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo ukundwa cyane yavuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: amazi n’amaraso mu rubavu rwe, ngo tubone kubabarirwa ibyaha byacu, agaha abigishwa be iegeko ryo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kujya kwigisha abo mu mahanga yose, bakababatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’iry’Umwuka wera ; none turakwingize wumve ibyo abantu bateraniye hano bagusabye ; robanura aya

content.speaker: all
content.text: mazi, kuyabatirizwamo, ko buzura imbabazi zawe, bakaguma mu mubare w’abana bawe bizerwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: b’intore; tubisabye kubwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori afate ugiye kubatizwa ukuboko kw’iburyo, abaze abishingizi izina rye, amubatize,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kanaka ndakubatiza mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera, Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze akurikizeho kuvuga ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: TWAKIRIYE uyu muntu mu Iteraniro ry’umukumbi wa Kristo, tumushyizeho ikimenyetso cy’umusaraba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kimuhamiriza ngo uhereye ubu atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wabambwe, kandi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: azagumya arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibendera ye, arwanya ibyaha n’iby’iyi si na Satani, kandi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: azahora ari intore kandi umugaragu (umuja) ukiranuka wa Kristo iminsi yose azamara akiriho. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amaze kubabatiza bose, avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bene Data bakundwa, ubwo aba Bantu bamaze kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, kandi bashyizwe mu muryango

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Itorero rya Kristo tubishimire Imana ishobora byose kandi dusabe duhuje imitima, kugira ngo aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bantu bazarinde bapfa bagikomeje kuba abantu bayo, nk’uko batangiye ubu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Bose bapfukame, bavugire hamwe bati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe; Ubwami bwawe buze; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; Uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubabarira ababitugirira; Ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori, avuge ati;

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, tugushimiye ko wemeye kuduhamagarira kumenya Ubuntu bwawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tukakwizera. Utwongereho uko kumenya, udukomezemo uko kwizera iminsi yose. Kandi aba bantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubahe Umwuka wawa Wera, kugira ngo, ubwo babyawe ubwa kabiri ; bakaba abaragwa b’agakiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: gahoraho ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, bazakomeze kuba abantu bawe, hanyuma bagere ku byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wabasezeranije; tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo uwo Umwana wawe kandi Umwami wacu uhoraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: yimanye nawe n’Umwuka Wera iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bose bahaguruke, Umupastori abanze ahugure abishingizi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBWO aba bantu basezeraniye imbere yanyu kwimura Satani n’ingeso ze zose, no kwizera Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakayikorera, namwe mukwiriye kwibuka yuko ari umurimo wanyu kubibutsa izo ndahiro n’ayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: masezerano bahamije imbere y’iri Teraniro, kandi cyane cyane imbere yanyu, abishingizi babo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitoranije, ko bikomeye cyane. Kandi muzajye mubahugura kugira umwete wose wo kwigishwa neza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijambo ryera ry’Imana, kugira ngo bakurire mu buntu bwayo no kumenya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: babe mu isi bubaha Imana, bakiranuka, kandi bitonda.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze abwire abaje kubatizwa ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Namwe abambaye Kristo ubu ku bwo kubatizwa, kandi ubwo mubaye abana b’Imana, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwo mubaye abana b’Imana, kandi abana b’umucyo kuko mwizeye Kristo, mumenye ko ari umurimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wanyu kugenza uko bikwiriye abahamagariwe kuba Abakristo, kandi abana b’umucyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mujye mwibuka yuko Kubatizwa kutwereka ibyo twemeye, ni ko gukurikiza ingeso nziza z’Umwami wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo no kumera nka we; kandi nk’uko yadupfiriye, akazuka ku bwacu, natwe ababatijwe dukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gupfa ku byaha, tukazukira, tubone kujya tunesha kwifuza kwacu kubi kose, kandi dukomeze ingeso

content.speaker: all
content.text: nziza zose zo kubaha Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni byiza umuntu wese ubatijwe ari mukuru ko adatinda, ahubwo atebuke gukomezwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwepiskopi, abone kwemerwa kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: AMAGAMBO YO KWINJIZA MU ITORERO

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UWAVUYE MURI KIRIZIYA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Y’I ROMA

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori, arangije kubatiza abantu, niba hariho urwavuye muri Kiriziya y’I Roma, aze amuhagarare

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere; maze Umupastori amwakire, amubaze ati;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza    Wowe uhagaze hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri Torero, mbese uhakanye ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kirisiya y’I Roma yigisha bidahura n’Ibyanditswe Byera?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byose ndabihakanye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza    Uhereye none umaramaje rwose guhora ukora ibihura n’Ijambo ry’Imana, kandi bihuje

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’imyigishirize y’iri Torero, ari ryo rugingo rw’Itorero ryera rya Kristo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Maramaje rwose ko nzahora nkora ntyo, mfatanije n’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori amufate ukuboko kw’ibburyo, amubaze izina, maze akurikizeho aya amagambo ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndabamenyesha yuko uyu muntu yabatijwe muri Kiriziya y’I Roma, bakamwita izina……..., none

content.speaker: all
content.text: yongeweho irindi……. (cyagwa niryo akomeje) Kandi ndababgira ko twemeye kumwinjiza muri iki gice

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’Umukumbi wa Kristo, ari cyo rugingo rw’Itorero rye, kuko ari cyo uyu muntu yemeye, kandi ahamije

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko uhereye none atazagira isoni zo guhamya ko yizeye Kristo wahambwe, kandi ko azaguma

content.speaker: all
content.text: arwanisha ubutwari munsi y’ibendera ye, arwanya ibyaha n’iby’iyi si na Satani, kandi ko azahora ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: intore kandi umugaragu (umuja) ukiranuka wa Kristo iminsi yose azamara akiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gatekisimu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni amagambo akwiriye kwigishwa bose abashaka kuzanirwa Umwepiskopi ngo bakomezwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndi kanaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bansezeraniye ibintu bitatu, bararahira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikibazo   Izina ryawe uri nde?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igisubizo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza     Ni nde wakwise iryo zina?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza   Abishingizi banjye nibo barinyise mu ibatizwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza      Muri iryo Batizwa, abishingizi bawe bagukoreye iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya mbere, jyewe kwimura ingingo ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si by’ubusa no kwifuza ibyayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kose ; n’irari ry’umubiri.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya kabiri, jyewe kwemera ingingo zose z’indini y’ubukristo ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya gatatu, jyewe kumvira amatageko y’Imana no kujya nkora ibyo ishaka byera, nkabikomeza iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose nkiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza    Ntiwibwira ko ukwiriye kwemera no gukora, nk’uko bagusezeraniye ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza   Ndabyemeye rwose ; kandi ni cyo nzakora Imana ari Umufasha wanjye. Kandi ndashimira Data

content.speaker: all
content.text: wa twese wo mu ijuru, kuko yampamagariye kuguma muri agakiza gaheshwa na Yesu Kristo Umukiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Kandi ndasaba Imana ubuntu buzatuma nkomeza muri ako gakiza kugeza ubgo nzapfa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwigisha Mbwira ingingo z’ibyo twemera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igisubizo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nemeye Imana data wa twese ushobora byose umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nemeye na Yesu Kristo umwana we w’ikinege, umwami wacu, wabyawe n’umwari Mariya ; kandi iyo nda

content.speaker: all
content.text: yasamye yari iy’Umwuka Wera ; yababajwe ubwo pontiyo pilato yari umutegetsi abambwa ku musaraba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arapfa, arahambwa, amanuka ikuzimu mu bapfuye, azuka ku munsi wa gatatu, ajya mu ijuru nine ubu

content.speaker: all
content.text: yicaye  iburyo  bw’imana  data  wa  twese  ushobora  byose,  niho  azava,  aje  gucira  abakiriho  n’abapfuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: urubanza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi  nemeye  Umwuka  Wera,  nemeye  ko  hariho  itorero  ryera  katolika  ry’abakristo  bose,  n’ubumwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’abera, no kubabarirwa ibyaha, no kuzuka k’umubiri, n’ubugingo budashira, Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza   Ni magambo ki makuru wiga muri izo ngingo z’ibyo twemera ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza Icya mbere, niga kwizera Imana Data wa twese,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yandemanye n’ibyo mu isi byose;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya kabiri, niga kwizera Imana Umwana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwanshunguranye n’abantu bose;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya gatanu, niga kwizera Imana Umwuka Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Unyezanya n’abantu b’Imana bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: Batoranijwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza   Uvuze ngo Abashingizi bawe bagusezeraniye ko uzajya witondera amategeko y’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mbwira umubare wayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza Ni icumi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza   Ni ayahe ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza Ni ayo Imana yategetse, tukayasoma mu gice 20 cyo mu Gitabo cyitwa Kuva, itya iti :

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1.  "Ndi Uwiteka Imana yawe yagukuye mu gihugu cya Egiputa, mu nzu y'uburetwa. "Ntukagire izindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: mana mu maso yanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2.  Ntukiremere igishushanyo kibajwe, cyangwa igisa n'ishusho yose iri hejuru mu ijuru, cyangwa hasi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku  butaka  cyangwa  mu  mazi  yo  hepfo  y'ubutaka.  Ntukabyikubite  imbere,  ntukabikorere  kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka  Imana  yawe  ndi  Imana  ifuha,  mpora  abana  gukiranirwa  kwa  ba  se,  nkageza  ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: buzukuruza  n'ubuvivi  bw'abanyanga,  nkababarira  abankunda  bakitondera  amategeko  yanjye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: nkageza ku buzukuruza babo b'ibihe igihumbi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 3.  Ntukavugire  ubusa  izina  ry'Uwiteka  Imana  yawe,  kuko  Uwiteka  atazamubara  nk'utacumuye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uvugiye ubusa izina rye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wibuke kweza umunsi w'isabato. Mu minsi itandatu ujya ukora, abe ari yo ukoreramo imirimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yawe yose,  ariko uwa karindwi  ni wo sabato y'Uwiteka Imana yawe. Ntukagire umurimo wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwukoraho,  wowe  ubwawe,  cyangwa  umuhungu  wawe  cyangwa  umukobwa  wawe,  cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugaragu wawe cyangwa umuja wawe, cyangwa itungo ryawe cyangwa umunyamahanga wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uri iwanyu, kuko iminsi itandatu ari yo Uwiteka yaremeyemo ijuru n'isi n'inyanja n'ibirimo byose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akaruhukira ku wa karindwi. Ni cyo cyatumye Uwiteka aha umugisha umunsi w'isabato, akaweza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 5.  Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ngo uramire mu gihugu Uwiteka Imana yawe iguha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 6.  Ntukice.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 7.  Ntugasambane.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 8.  Ntukibe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 9.  Ntugashinje ibinyoma mugenzi wawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 10. Ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzi wawe, ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzi wawe, cyangwa umugaragu we

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa  umuja  we,  cyangwa  inka  ye  cyangwa  indogobe  ye,  cyangwa  ikindi  kintu  cyose  cya

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugenzi  wawe."  "Ntukifuze  inzu  ya  mugenzi  wawe,  ntukifuze  umugore  wa  mugenzi  wawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa  umugaragu  we  cyangwa  umuja  we,  cyangwa  inka ye  cyangwa  indogobe  ye,  cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikindi kintu cyose cya mugenzi wawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikigukwiriye ku Mana ni iki ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza     Ni magambo ki makuru wiga muri ayo mategeko ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza Niga amagambo abiri, ikinkwiriye ku Mana, kandi ibinkwiriye ku Bantu bose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza   Nkwiriye  kuyizera,  no  kuyubaha,  kandi  no  kuyikundisha  umutima  wanjye  wose  n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanjye bwose n’imbaraga zanjye zose. Nkwiriye kuyiramya, no kuyishima, no kuyishingikirizaho rwose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kuyambaza, no guhesha Izina ryayo n’Ijambo ryayo icyubahiro, kandi no kuyikorerana umurava iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose nkiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikigukwiriye ku muturanyi wawe ni iki ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Nkwiriye  kumukunda  nk’uko  nikunda,  no  kugirira  abantu  bose,  nk’uko  nakunda  kobangirira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nkwiriye gukunda ababyeyi banjye no kububaha no kubafasha. Nkwiriye kubaha Abategetsi bacu bose no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubumvira.  Nkwiriye  kuyoboka  bose  bantegeka  n’abanyigisha  n’abapatori  bantegeka  mu  by’Itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nkwiriye  korohera abanduta  ubukuru  bose  no kububaha.  Nkwiriye  kutagira  umuntu  wese  mbabarisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyo mvuga, cyangwa icyo nkora, no kuba umunyamurava n’umunyakuri mu mico yanjye yose, kutagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: urwango cyangwa igomwa mu mutima wanjye, kubuza ukuboko kwanjye kwenda iby’abandi no kwiba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi  kubuza  ururimi  rwanjye  gushyushya  inkuru  mbi  no  kubeshya,  no  kubeshyera  abandi.  Nkwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurinda umubiri wanjye, ne gusinda cyangwa kwinezeza, haba no gusambana ; ahubwo nige umurimo wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuntunga no kuwukorana umwete, no kujya nkora ibikwiriye urugero Imana yishimiye kungezaho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwigisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwana wanjye mwiza, ukwiriye kumenya neza yuko ibyo nta bwo wabyishoboza, keretse

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufashijwe n’ubuntu bwayo ; kandi ubwo buntu ukwiriye kuyibusaba ibihe byose, uko uenze. Nuko rero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: reka numve yuko ushobora kuvuga Isengesho ry’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wa twese wo mi ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe ; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igisubizo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikorwe mu isi, nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byacu,  nk’uko  natw  tubabarira  ababitugirira;  ntuduhane  mu  bitwoshya,  ahubwo  udukize  umubi;  kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubwami n ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Muri iri sengesho icyo usaba Imana ni iki ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Nsaba  Nyagasani  Imana  yanjye,  ni  we  Data  wa  twese  wo  mu  ijuru,  Umugabyi  w’ibyiza  byose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo angirirane imbabazi n’abantu bose ; tubone uko tumuramya, tukamukorera, tukamwumvira,

content.speaker: all
content.text: imitima yacu n’imibiri yacu bikenye byose, itugirire imbabazi, kandi itubabarire ibyaha. Nyisaba kwemera

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuturinda  no  kudukiza  ibyago  byose  bishaka  kwica  umutima  cyangwa  umubiri,  iturinde  gukora  ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose n’ibindi bibi, iturinde Umwanzi wacu n’urupfu rw’iteka. Kandi ibyo byose niringira yuko izabinkorera

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingiriye  imbabazi  n’ubuntu  ku  bwa  Yesu  Kristo  Umwami  wacu.  Ni  cyo  gituma  mvuga  nti  Amen ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: bisobanurwa ngo bibe bityo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo yahaye Itorero rye Amasakaramento angahe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Ni abiri masa, ni yo ngombwa ku bashaka gukizwa; ni ayo Kubatiza, n’Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iryo jambo Isakaramento risobanurwa rite?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Isakaramento n’ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara cyerekana Ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima

content.speaker: all
content.text: duhabwa. Kristo ubwe ni we wagishyizeho, ngo kibe icyo kuduhesha uwo mugisha, kigahamya ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tuwuhawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isakaramento ririmo ibice bingahe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Ni bibiri, ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara, n’ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Mu ibatizwa ikimenyetso cy’inyuma kigaragara ni iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Ubuntu bw’imbere bwo mu mutima ni iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Ni amazi, ayo umuntu abatirishwa mu Izina rya Data wa twese n’Umwana, n’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Gupfa ku byaha no kubyarwa ubwa kabiri; tukaba abakiranutsi; kuko twavukiye mu byaha muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere yacu, tukaba abo kugirirwa uburakari; ariko none, ku bwo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, turi abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugirirwa imbabazi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Abashaka kubatizwa bakwiriye gukora iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Bakwiriye kwihana bakareka ibyaha byabo, kandi kwizera kubazanira kwishingikiriza ku byo Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabasezeranije muri iryo Sakaramento.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Niba  ari  ko  biri,  niki  gituma  abana  bato  babatizwa,  ubwo  badashoboye  kubwo  ubuto  bwabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gushyitsa ayo masezerano?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Kuko abishingizi babo baba babasezeranira gushyitsa amasezerano yombi, ayo bakazayisohoreza

content.speaker: all
content.text: bageze ku myaka y’ubukuru.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isakaramento ry’Igaburo Ryera ry’Umwami wacu ryashyiriweho iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Ryashyiriweho kugira ngo tujye twibuka gupfa kwa Kristo watubereye igitambo, hamwe n’ibindi

content.speaker: all
content.text: byiza byose kuduhesha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikimenyetso cy’inyuma cy’Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu ni iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Umugati na Vino ibyo Umwami wacu yategetse ko tujya tubihabwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Umugati na Vino nk‘uko bisobanurwa mu buryo bw’Umwuka byerakana iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Byerekana  Umubiri  n’Amaraso  bya  Kristo,  ibyo  abamwizera  bakira,  bakarya  rwose,  iyo  bariye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Muri iryo Gaburo ryera tuboneramo migisha ki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Imitima  Yacu  ikomezwa  kandi  iruhurwa  n’Umubiri  n’Amaraso  bya  Kristo,  nk’uko  imibiri  yacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: igirirwa n’Umugati na Vino.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Baza  Abaza ku Igaburo ryera ry’Umwami wacu bakwiriye gukora iki?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Subiza  Bakwiriye  kwisuzuma,  bakamenya  ko  bihanye  by’ukuri  ibyaha  bakoze;  bakamaramaza  kugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugingo bushya, bakizera rwose Ubuntu bw’Imana bubonerwa muri Kristo, hamwe no kwibuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: urupfu rwe bashima; kandi ikindi bagahorana umutima ukunda abandi.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYO GUKOMEZWA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: CYANGWA IBYO KURAMBIKA IBIGANZA KU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: BABATIJWE BAMAZE KUMENYA UBWENGE.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abo gukomezwa bahagarare imbere y’Umwepiskopi, maze aya magamba asomwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyo  Itorero  rishaka  ni  uko  abarambikwaho  ibiganza  bose  barushaho  gukomezwa  mu  mutima.  Ni  cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyatumye ritegeka ngo nta warambikwah ibiganza atabasha kwivugira ubwe ibyo kwemera kw’Intumwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho  ry’Umwami  wacu,  n’Amategeko  cumi.  Kandi  abashaka  gukomezwa  bakwiriye  kumenya

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusubiza neza amagambo yo muri Gatigisimu babazwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iryo  tegeko  ry’Itorero  rikwiriye  kumvirwa  rwose,  kugira  ngo  abantu  babatijwe  bakiri  bato,  ni  bamara

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukura,  bagasobanukirwa  neza  ibyo  abishingizi  babo  babasezeranije,  ubwo  babatizwaga,  babone  kuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere y’Itorero, bahamye yuko ubwabo babyemeye kandi babikomeje.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi  iryo  tegeko  rikwiriye  kumvirwa  n’ababatijwe  ari  bakuru,  kugira  ngo  na  bo  babone  uburyo  bwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukomezwa  mu  Bukristo,  bakarushaho  gusobanukirwa  imyigishirize  y’Itorero,  bakongera  gusezerana

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwitondera neza ibyo bemeye ubwabo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero mwebwe abifuza kurambikwaho ibiganza; mukwiriye guhamya imbere y’iri teraniro, yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mumaramaje rwose kujya mwizera Kristo no kumvira amategeko y’Imana; mugakurikiza ibyo ishaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, kandi yuko mwemeye gukomeza gusohoza ibyo mwasezeranye gukora, ubwo mwabatizwaga.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umwepiskopi abaze ababatijwe ari bakuru ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndababaza yuko hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro mwongera gusezetana ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwasezeranye, ubwo mwabatizwaga, kandi yuko muzabikomeza rwose?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nongeye kubisezerana cyane,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abaze ababatijwe bakiri bato ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Namwe ababatijwe mukiri bato ndababza. Mbese muremera kongera gusezeranira imbere

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro ibyo abishingizi banyu babasezeraniye, ubwo mwabatizwaga?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwemeye kubyisezeranira ubwanyu, yuko muzakora nk’uko babasezeraniye cya gihe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko ndabyemeye, kandi ndabyisezeraniye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abaze bose ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byose ndabyimuye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: None ndababaza mwese. Mwimuye Satani n’ingeso ze zose, n’ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’iyi si

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’ubusa, no kwifuza ibyayo kose, n’irari ry’umubiri? Mwemeye kutazabikurirkira, cyangwa gutegekwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: na byo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Wemeye Imana Data wa twese ushobora byose, Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi; Wemeye Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo Umwana we w’ikinege Umwami wacu? Wemeye n’Umwuka Wera umufasha wacu?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Wemeye kwitondera amategeko year y’Imana, n’ibyo ikunda? Uzajya ubikurikiza iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose uzaba ukiriho?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzagerageza kubikora, mfatanije n’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byose ndabyemeye rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Gutabarwa kwacu kubonerwa mu Izina cy’Uwiteka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Uwiteka, umva ibyo tugusaba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gutabaza kwacu kukugereho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Waremye ijuru n’isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina ry’Uwiteka nirihimbazwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uhereye none ukageza iteka ryose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi: Dusenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira yuko wemeye kubyarisha ubwa kabiri aba Bantu bawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amazi n’Umwuka Wera, ukabababarira ibyaha byose. Nyagasani, turakwinginga; ubakomereshe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwuka Wera Umufasha, kandi iminsi yose uhore ubagwizamo impano z’ubuntu bwawe nyinshi; ubahe

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwuka w’ubwenge n’uwo kwitegereza, umwuka wo kujya inama neza n’uw’ubushobozi bwo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutima, n’umwuka wo kukumenya no kukubaha by’ukuri. Kandi Nyagasani, ubagwizemo umwuka wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuguhesha icyubahiro kubwo kwera kwawe, uhereye none ukageza iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi ahereko abarambikeho ibiganza bapfukamye imbere ye, nk’uko bakurikiranye,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI Mana, ujye urindisha uyu mugaragu (umuja) wawe Ubuntu bwawe buva mu ijuru, akomeze

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuba uwawe ibihe byose, kandi ajye yunguka Umwuka wawe Wera uko bukeye, kugeza aho azagerera

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu bwami bwawe butazashira. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka abane namwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bakomejwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abane nawe mu mutima.
