content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi n’arangiza avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi yongere avuge ati, Dusenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabariwe ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: natwe tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana ishobora byose ihoraho, turagushimira yuko ari wowe udukundisha gukora ibyiza bigutunganiye;

content.speaker: all
content.text: none turakwingingira aba bagaragu bawe n’abaja bawe barambitsweho ibiganza dukurikije icyitegerezo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’intumwa zawe zera. Turagusaba kugira ngo icyo kimenyetso kibahamirize yuko ubakunda, ukishimira

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubagirira  neza.  Ujye  ubarindisha  amabako yawe,  kuko  uri  umubyeyi.  Emera  ko  Umwuka wawe  Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: abana na bo iminsi yose, abayobore, barusheho kumenya Ijambo ryawe ryera no kuryumvira; hanyuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: babone  kuzahabwa  ubugingo  buhoraho.  Ibyo  tubisabye  ku  bw’Umwami  wacu  Yesu  Kristo  uhoraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: buhoraho. Ibyo tubisabye ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo uhoraho, wimanye nawe n’Umwuka Wera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri Imana imwe iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA  ishobora  byose,  Mana  ihoraho,  turakwinginga  wemere  kuyobora  imitima  n’imibiri  yacu  no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubyeza, kandi no kubitegeka, tubone kugendera mu buryo bw’amategeko yawe, dukore ibyo wategetse,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo ububasha bwawe buturinde imibiri n’imitima iminsi yose. Tubisabye ku bw’Umwami wacu Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo, ni we Mukiza wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze umwepiskopi abasabire umugisha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ugumane namwe iteka ryose. Amen

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ntihagire umuntu ujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu atarakomezwa, keretse umuntu urangije kwigishwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo gukomezwa, akaba yiteguye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYO GUSHYINGIRA KWERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abashaka gushyingirwa bose ni ngombwa ko barangwa ibyumweru bitatu mu gihe cyo gusenga, bamaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusoma igice cya kabiri. Umusengesha avuge ati.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndavuga amagambo yo gushyingira kwera kwa Kanaka w’I Naka na Kanaka w’I Naka. Niba hari uwo muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwe uzi impamvu y’ukuri yabuza aba bantu bombi gufatanywa mu Gushyingiranwa kwera, naze

content.speaker: all
content.text: ayivuge. Uku ni ukubaza kwa mbere (kwa kabiri, cyangwa kwa gatatu).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abashaka gushyingirwa niba badatuye mu Bushumba bumwe, bombi bakwiriye kurangwa mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bushumba bw’iwabo. Kandi Umupastori wo mu Bushumba bw’umwe, ntiyemerwa kubashyingiranya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: atarabona urwandiko rw’Umupastori w’ubundi Bushumba ruhamya yuko baranzwe gatatu.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abagiye gushyingirwa binjire mu rusengero, bahagarare imbere y’Umupastori, Umugeni ari ibumuso

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’umukwe. Umupastori avuge ati.

content.speaker: all
content.text: BAKUNDWA cyane, duteraniye hano imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’iri teraniro gufatanisha uyu mugabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’uyu mugabo n’uyu mugeni gushyingirwa kwera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwo mubano ni uw’icyubahiro wategetswe n’Imana abantu batarakora icyaha; werekana gufatana kwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo yarawushimishije, awubahisha kubayo kwe, ubwo yatahaga ubukwe I Kana y’I Galilaya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: agakorerayo igitangaza cye cya mbere. Kandi Pawulo yawushimye ko ari uwo kubahwa n’abantu bose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo gituma ari nta muntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukwiriye kubikora abiturumbukiye, cyangwa atigiriye inama, cyangwa atigiriye abitewe n’irari ry’umubiri,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge zigenza. Ahubwo abikore yitonze, yigirire inama neza, yirinda,

content.speaker: all
content.text: yubaha Imana kandi atekereza icyatumye uwo mubano wera utegekwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya mbere, wategekewe kubyara abana, ngo batozwe ingeso nziza zo kubaha Imana no

content.speaker: all
content.text: gushimisha Izina ryayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivya kabiri wategekewe kurinda abantu icyaha cy’ubusambanyi, ahubwo bashyingiranwe bahoe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari ingingo z’umubiri wa Kristo zitanduye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya gatatu, wategekewe kugira ngo bombi babane bafatanije, bamarane imibabaro, nk’uko bibakwiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugirirana, bari mu mahoro cyangwa mu byago.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko aba bantu bombi, bazanywe no gufatanywa n’uko gushyingiranwa kwera. Ni cyo gitumye, niba hari

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuntu uzi impavu y’ukuri yababuza gufatanywa hamwe, akwiriye kuyivuga nonaha; ni yanga kuyivuga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhereye ubu ahore acecetse kugeza iteka ryose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Akurikizeho kubwira abagiye gushyingirwa ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: NDABAHUGURA mwembi, ndabihanangiriza, kuko muzi yuko muzabibazwa kuri wa munsi w’amateka

content.speaker: all
content.text: uteye ubwoba, ubwo ibihishwe mu mitima yose bizahishurwa, niba hari umwe uzi impamvu ibabuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: gufatanywa nk’uko amategeko yemera, ni ayivuge nonaha, kuko mukwiriye kumenya neza yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: abafatanijwe n’Imana, kandi gushyingirwa kwabo kuba kunyuranye n’amategeko.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba ari ntawe ufite impamvu ibabuza gushyingirwa. Umupastori abaze umukwe ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kanaka, wemeye uyu mugeni ko aba umugore wawe ushyingiwe, ngo mubane umubano wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’abashyingiwe, mukurikije itegeko ryera ry’Imana? Uzajya umukunda, umukuyakuya kandi umurinda

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari muzima cyangwa arwaye? Uzareka abandi bagore bose, ubane na we wenyine iminsi yose muzamara

content.speaker: all
content.text: mukiriho mwembi?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwemeye ntyo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze abaze umugeni ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kanaka, wemeye uyu mugabo ko aba umugabo wawe mushyingiranywe, ngo mubane umubano wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’abashyingiwe, mukurikije itegeko ryera ry’Imana? Uzajya umwumvira, umukorera, umukunda,

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwubaha kandi uzajya umurinda ari muzima cyangwa arwaye? Uzareka abandi bagabo bose, ubane na

content.speaker: all
content.text: we wenyine iminsi yose muzamara mukiriho mwembi?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwemeye ntyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Akurikizeho kubaza ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni nde ushyingiye uyu mugeni uyu mugabo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umushyingira amuzanire umukwe

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori abwire umugabo kuzana ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo agufatishe ukw’iburyo kw’umugeni,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: avuge amukurikije ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Jyewe Kanaka ndakwemeye Kanaka ko uba umugore wanjye dushyingiranywe, ngo tubane

content.speaker: all
content.text: akaramata uhereye none, mu mahoro no mu byago, mu butunzi no mu bukene, urwaye cyangwa uri

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzima. Nzajya ngukunda, ngukuyakuya, kugeza aho urupfu ruzadutandukaniriza, nkurikije itegeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera ry’Imana Mbikurahiye ntyo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze barekurane; umugeni nawe afatishe ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo ukw’iburyo k’umugabo, avuga

content.speaker: all
content.text: akurikiza umupastori ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Jyewe Kanaka ndakwemeye Kanaka ko uba umugabo wanjye dushyingiranywe, ngo tubane akaramata

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhereye none, mu mahoro no mu byago, mu butunzi no mu bukene, urwaye cyangwa uri muzima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya ngukunda, ngukusha neza, kumvira, kugeza aho urupfu ruzadutandukaniriza, nkurikije itegeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera ry’Imana Mbikurahiye ntyo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze bongere barekurane; Umupastori yakire impeta, ayihe umugabo, kugira ngo ayishyire mu rutoke

content.speaker: all
content.text: rw’umugeni rw’ibumoso rukurikirwa n’agahera, agumye ayifateho, avuge akurikiza Umupastori ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nkwambitse iyi mpeta, nkubahishije umubiri wanjye, nguhaye ibintu byanjye byose; mbivuze mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana, n’iry’Umwuka Wera…Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze bombi bapfukamye, Umupastori avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA y’iteka, Muremyi kandi Murinzi w’abantu bose, turagushimira yuko ari wowe utanga Ubuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwose bw’umwuka, kandi ko ari wowe urema ubugingo buhoraho. Nuko turakwingize wohereze

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugisha wawe aba Bantu bawe, uyu mugabo n’uyu mugore, abo dusabira umugisha mu Izina ryawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo, nk’uko Isaka na Rebeka babanaga batava mu isezerano, abe ari ko n’aba basohoza indahiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: barahiye n’isezerano basezeranye; iyi mpera itanzwe kandi ikemerwa, ni yo kimenyetso kandi umugabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo kubihamya. Bajye babana iteka bafitanye urukundo n’amahoro biboneye rwose, bakurikiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: amategeko yawe. Tubisabye mu Izina ry’Uwami wacu Yesu Kristo. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umupastori abafatanishe ibiganza by’iburyo; avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo Imana yateranije hamwe, ntihakagire umuntu ubatandukanya.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze akurikizeho kubwira abantu bose ati.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko Kanaka na Kanaka bahuje umutima, ngo bashyingirwe gushyingirwa kwera, kandi babihamije

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbere y’Imana n’imbere yanyu, bagasezerana batyo, kandi babyerekanishije gutanga impeta, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyakira, kandi no gufatana mu ntoke, ni cyo gitumye mvuga nti, Aba ni umugabo n’umugore

content.speaker: all
content.text: bashyingiwe; mbivuze mu izina rya Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori akurikizeho kubasabira umugisha ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana Data wa twese, Imana Umwana, Imana Umwuka Wera, ibahe umugisha, ibakize, kandi ibarinde.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka abagirire imbabazi; abarebane urukundo, abagwizemo imigisha yose y’Umwuka n’Ubuntu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo uburyo muzabana mukiri muri ubu bugingo bizatume mu gihe kizaza muhabga ubugingo

content.speaker: all
content.text: budashira. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Umupastori ahagarare I ruhande rw’ameza y’Umwami wacu, basome iyi Zaburi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Zaburi 128

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hahirwa uwubaha Uwiteka wese, Akagenda mu nzira ze. Kuko uzatungwa n'imirimo y'amaboko yawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzajya wishima, uzahirwa. Umugore wawe azaba nk'umuzabibu wera cyane mu kirambi cy'inzu yawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abana bawe bazaba nk'uduti twa elayo, Bagose ameza yawe. Uko ni ko umuntu wubaha Uwiteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: azahirwa. Uwiteka azaguha umugisha uva i Siyoni, Nawe uzabona ibyiza biza kuri Yerusalemu, Iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yose ukiriho. Ni koko uzabona abuzukuru bawe. Amahoro abe mu Bisirayeli.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya Data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana, n’icy’Umwuka Wera, Nk’uko Cyahoze mbere na

content.speaker: all
content.text: mbere, n’ubu ni ko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa Zaburi 67

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMANA itubabarire iduhe umugisha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itumurikishirize mu maso hayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kugira ngo inzira yawe imenywe mu isi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubugingo bwawe bukiza bumenywe mu mahanga yose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, amoko agushime,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amoko yose agushime.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amahanga yishime, aririmbishwe n'ibyishimo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko uzacira amoko imanza z'ukuri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi uzashorerera amahanga mu isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, amoko agushime,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amoko yose agushime.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubutaka bweze umwero wabwo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana ni yo Mana yacu, izaduha umugisha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana izaduha umugisha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi abo ku mpera y'isi hose bazayubaha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya Data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana, n’icy’Umwuka wera,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere, na n’ubu ni ko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma umukwe n’umugeni bapfukame imbere y’ameza year, Umupastori ahagarare bugufi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwayo, abahindukirire, avuge ati,

content.text: Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi.

content.speaker: all

content.speaker: congregation
content.text: Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru, uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabarire ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: natw tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi; kuko ubwami n

content.speaker: all
content.text: ‘ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, kiza uyu mugaragu wawe, n’uyu muja wawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abakwiringiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubatabarishe gutabara kuva Ahera hawe;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi uhore ubarinda iminsi yose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubabere ubuhungiro bukomeye;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bwo gukiriramo abanzi babo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, umva ibyo tugusaba;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi no gutabaza kwacu ukumve.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori

content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA y’Aburahamu, Mana ya Isaka; Mana ya Yakobo, uhe uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugisha, ubihe mu mitima yabo imbuto zizazana ubugingo budashira, kugira ngo ibyo baziga mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ijambo ryawe ryera, bikabagirira akamaro, babisohoreshe ibyo bakora. Mwami wacu, ubarebana

content.speaker: all
content.text: imbabazi uri mu ijuru, ubahe umugisha. Kandi nk’uko wahaye Abarahamu na Sara umugisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukabanezeza cyane, abe ari ko wemera kuwuha uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja wawe, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitondere ibyo ushaka, bahore barindwa neza n’amaboko yawe, bakomeze gukundwa nawe iminsi yose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazamara bakiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umugore ni aba acuze, atakibyara, iri Sengesho barisige.

content.speaker: all
content.text: M  W  A  M  I  w’imbabazi,  Data  wa  twese  wo  mu  ijuru,  tuzi  yuko  ari  impano  yawe  y’ubuntu  ko  abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bagwira.  Turakwinginga,  ufashishe  umugisha  wawe  aba  bantu  bombi,  babyarane  abana,  babane

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakundanye  urukundo  ruva  aho  uri,  ari  abanyakuri,  babone  uko  bazatoza  abana  babo  ingeso  nziza  za

content.speaker: all
content.text: gikristo, bagushimisha kandi bakubahisha. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA, turagushimira ko waranesheje imbaraga zawe zikomeye ibintu byose, ari nta kintu wabiremyemo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi umaze gutunganya ibindi, wategetse ko umugore akomoka ku mugabo waremwe mu ishusho yawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubateranya  hamwe,  wigisha  yuko  kizira  rwose  gutandukanya  abo  wateranishije  hamwe  gushyingirwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mana, turagushimira ko wejeje umubano w’abashyingiwe, ukawuhindura icyitegererezo cy’umubano wa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo n’itorero rye wo mu buryo bw’umwuka. Nuko urebane imbabazi uyu mugaragu wawe n’uyu muja

content.speaker: all
content.text: wawe,  kugira  ngo  uyu  mugabo  akunde  umugore  we  akurikiza  itegeko  ry’Ijambo  ryawe,  nk’uko  Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yakunze  umugeni we mi ryo Torero rye, akaryitangira arikunze,  arikuyakuya nk’umubiri we. Kandi uyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugore  ajye  yerekana  urukundo  n’ineza,  ngo  asohoze  isezerano  yasezeranye  n’umugabo  we,  ajye

content.speaker: all
content.text: amwumvira,  akurikiza  abagore  bera  bubahaga  Imana,  yoroheje,  yitonda,  kandi  ari  umunyamahoro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani,  ubahe  bombi  umugisha,  baragwe  ubwami  bwawe  budashira.  Tubisabye  mu  izina  rya  Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori ahereko avuga ati;

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMANA  ishobora  byose  mbere  yaremye  basogokuruza  Adamu  na  Eve,  irabeza,  ibateranisha  hamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gushyingirwa,  isuke  kuri  mwe  Ubuntu  bwayo  busesekaye,  ibeze,  ibahe  umugisha,  kugira  ngo  ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mukoresha imibiri n’imitima yanyu biyinezeze, kandi mubane mukundana urukundo rwera iminsi yose

content.speaker: all
content.text: muzamarana mukiriho. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Byaba ari byiza, bamaze gushingirwa, guhabwa Igaburo ryera, cyangwa kurihabwa bidatinze.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYO GUSHIMIRA IMANA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: KW’ABAGORE BABYAYE

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Ababyeyi bapfukame, Umusengesha avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUKO Imana yakugiriye imbabazi, ikagutaburura neza mu mibabaro yo Kubyara, ni cyo gitumye ukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyishimira mu magambo yo muri Zaburi 116.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NKUNDIRA Uwiteka, kuko yumvise ijwi ryanjye no kwinginga kwanjye. Kuko yantegeye ugutwi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni cyo gituma nzajya mwambaza nkiriho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingoyi z’urupfu zantaye hagati, uburibwe bw’ikuzimu bwaramfashe; ngira ibyago n’umubabaro.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze nambaza izina ry’Uwiteka, nti, Uwiteka, ndakwingize, kiza ubugingo bwanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka arinda abaswa; nacishujwe bugufi, arankiza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mutima wanjye, subira mu buruhukiro bwawe, kuko Uwiteka yakugiriye neza;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko wakijije ubugingo bwanjye urupfu, amaso yanjye ukayakiza amarira, n’ibirenge byanjye ukabikiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzagendera mu maso y’Uwiteka mu isi y’ababaho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nari nizeye; ubwo navugaga nti, Narababajwe cyane,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nkavugana ubwira nti, abantu bose ni abanyabinyoma.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyiza Uwiteka yangiriye byose, ndabimwitura ki ?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzakira igikombe cy’agakiza, nambaze izina ry’Uwiteka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzahigura Uwiteka umuhigo wanjye, ni koko nzawumuhigurira mu maso y’ubwoko bwebwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Urupfu rw’abakunzi be n’urw’igiciro cyinshi mu maso y’Uwiteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka, ni ukuri ndi umugaragu wawe ; ndi umugaragu wawe, Umwana w’umuja wawe ; wambohoye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingoyi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzagutambira igitambo cy’ishimwe, nambaze izina ry’uwiteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzahigura Uwiteka umuhigo wanjye ; ni koko nzawumuhigurira mu maso y’ubwoko bwe bwose, Mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikari by’inzu y’Uwiteka, hagati muri wowe, Yerusalemu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Haleluya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Na Zaburi 127

content.speaker: all
content.text: UWITEKA iyo atari we wubaka inzu, Abayubaka baba baruhira ubusa. Uwiteka iyo atari we urinda

content.speaker: all
content.text: umudugudu, Umurinzi abera maso ubusa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bibaruhiriza ubusa kuzinduka kare, Mugatinda cyane kuruhuka, Mukarya umutsima w'umuruho. Ni ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: aha uwo akunda ibitotsi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dore abana ni umwandu uturuka ku Uwiteka, Imbuto z'inda ni zo ngororano atanga.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Nk'uko imyambi yo mu ntoki z'intwari iri, Ni ko abana bo mu busore bamera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hahirwa ufite ikirimba kibuzuye, Abameze batyo ntibazakorwa n'isoni,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uko bazavuganira n'abanzi babo mu marembo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icyubahiro kibe icya Data wa twese, n’icy’Umwana n’icy’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Nk’uko cyahoze mbere na mbere, n’ubu niko kiri, kandi ni ko kizahora kiba iteka ryose. Amen.

content.text: Hanyuma Umusengesha avuge ati

content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, Izina ryawe ryubahwe ; Ubwami bwawe buze ; Ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu Ijuru ; uduhe none infunguro ridutunga uko bukeye ; Utubabarire ibyaha byacu,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko tubabarira ababitugirira ; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi ; kuko ubwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: n‘ubushobozi n’icyubahiro ari ibyawe ubu n’iteka ryose. Amen.

content.text: Umusengesha  Nyagasani, emera gukiza uyu umuja wawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndi umuja wawe ukwingira.

content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umubere ubuhungiro bukomeye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umusengesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bwo gukiriramo abanzi be

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umusengesha  Nyagasani, umva ibyo tugusaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi no gutabaza kwanjye ukumve

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umusengesha avuge ati, Dusenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, turagushima cyane twitonze ko wemeye gutaburura uyu muja wawe mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mibibabaro yo kubyara.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo gitumye tukwinginga, Data wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, ujye umufasha kugira ngo abeho ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwizerwa, kandi afite ingeso zigutunganiye akiri muri ubu bugingo, maze hanyuma mu bugingo

content.speaker: all
content.text: zigutunganiye akiri muri ubu bugingo, maze hanyuma mu bungingo buzaza azabe afatanije n’abandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyubahiro kitazashira ; tubisabye mu Izina rya Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA Data wa twese, ni Wowe Mubyeyi mwiza ; tuzi yuko abana ari umwandu ugukomokako ; ni cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gitumye tugushimira, ko wahaye aba babyeyi iyi mpano nziza. Nuko none, Nyagasani turakwingize, ujye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubafasha kurerera uyu mwana mu ngeso nziza abone gukurira muri Kristo ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi umuhe umugisha n’ubuntu bwawe, abone kwakira agakiza kawe akiri muto, kugeza umunsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azagerera mu bwami bwawe. Tubisabye mu izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ababyeyi, iyo baje gushima Imana, bakwiriye kuzana ituro ; kandi niba hariho Igaburo Ryera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakwiriye kurihabwa

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYO GUHAMBA ABAPFU

content.speaker: all
content.text: Aya magambo si ayo gukoreshwa ku muntu upfuye atabatijwe, cyangwa waciwe mu Itorero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa wiyahuye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umupastori (Umusengesha) asanganire intumbi, ayijye imbere, bajye murusengero cyangwa ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: mva. Bakigenda avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMWAMI wacu yaravuze ati, Ni jye kuzuka n'ubugingo, unyizera naho yaba yarapfuye azabaho, kandi

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: umuntu wese ukiriho unyizera ntazapfa iteka ryose Yohana 11 : 25,26

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko jye ubwanjye nzi yuko Umucunguzi wanjye ariho, Kandi ko amaherezo azahagarara mu isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi uruhu rwanjye nirumara kubora, Nzareba Imana mfite umubiri. Nzayireba ubwanjye, Amaso

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanjye azayitegereza si ay'undi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko ari nta cyo twazanye mu isi, ni ko nta cyo tuzayivanamo, Uwiteka ni we wabimpaye, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka ni we ubitwaye ; Izina ry’Uwiteka ni we ubitwaye ; Izina ry’uwiteka rishimwe.   1Timoteyo 6 :7 ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yobu1 :21

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bagera mu rusengero, basome Zaburi imwe muri izi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Zaburi 39

content.speaker: all
content.text: NARIBAGIYE nti, Nzirindira mu nzira zanjye, Kugira ngo ntacumuza ururimi rwanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mfata ururimi rwanjye, Umunyabyaha akiri imbere yanjye." Nabeshejwe nk'ikiragi no kutavuga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: narahoze naho byaba ibyiza sinabivuga,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umubabaro wanjye uragwira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umutima wanjye ungurumana mu nda, Ngitekereza umuriro unyakamo, Maze mvugisha ururimi nti

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka, umenyeshe iherezo ryanjye, N'urugero rw'iminsi yanjye, Menye ko ndi igikenya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dore wahinduye iminsi yanjye nk'intambwe z'intoki,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igihe cy'ubugingo bwanjye kuri wowe kimeze nk'ubusa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese nubwo akomeye, ni umwuka gusa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese agenda nk'igicucu, Ni ukuri bahagarikira umutima ubusa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umuntu arundanya ubutunzi atazi uzabujyana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami, none ntegereje iki ? Ni wowe niringira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Unkize ibicumuro byanjye byose, Ntumpindure uwo gutukwa n'abapfu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Narahoze sinabumbura akanwa, Kuko ari wowe wabikoze. Unkureho inkoni yawe, Mazwe no gukubitwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'ukuboko kwawe. Iyo uhaniye umuntu gukiranirwa kwe umuhanisha ibihano, Unyenzura ubwiza bwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk'inyenzi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni ukuri umuntu wese ni umwuka gusa. Sela. Uwiteka umva gusenga kwanjye, tegera ugutwi gutaka

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwanjye, Ntiwicire amatwi amarira yanjye. Kuko ndi umusuhuke imbere yawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: N'umwimukira nk'uko ba sogokuruza bose bari bari. Rekera aho kundeba igitsure, Mbone uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: nsubizwamo intege, Ntarava hano ntakibaho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Zaburi 90.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI, ibihe byose wahoze uri ubuturo bwacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imisozi itaravuka, Utararamukwa isi n'ubutaka, Uhereye iteka ryose

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukageza iteka ryose, Ni wowe Mana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uhindura abantu umukungugu, Kandi ukavuga uti"Bana b'abantu, musubireyo."

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko imyaka igihumbi mu maso yawe imeze nk'umunsi wejo wahise, Cyangwa nk'igicuku cy'ijoro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubajyana nk'isuri bameze nk'ibitotsi, Bukeye bameze nk'ibyatsi bimera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu gitondo birera bigakura, Nimugoroba bigacibwa bikuma.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Natwe uburakari bwawe bwatumazeho, Umujinya wawe waduhagaritse imitima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Washyize ibyo twakiraniwe imbere yawe, N'ibyaha byacu byahishwe wabishyize mu mucyo wo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: maso hawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuko iminsi yacu yose ishize tukiri mu mujinya wawe, Imyaka yacu tuyirangiza nko gusuhuza umutima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iminsi y'imyaka yacu ni imyaka mirongo irindwi, Ariko kandi nitugira intege nyinshi ikagera kuri mirongo

content.speaker: all
content.text: inani.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyamara ibyiratwa byayo ni imiruho n'umubabaro, Kuko ishira vuba natwe tukaba tugurutse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni nde uzi imbaraga z'uburakari bwawe, Akamenya umujinya wawe uko wowe ukwiriye kubahwa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwigishe kubara iminsi yacu, Uburyo butuma dutunga imitima y'ubwenge.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwiteka garuka, Ko watinze uzageza ryari? Abagaragu bawe uduhindurire umutima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu gitondo uzaduhaze imbabazi zawe, Kugira ngo tuzajye twishima tunezerwe iminsi yacu yose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwishimishe ibyishimo bingana n'iminsi watubabarijemo, N'imyaka twabonyemo ibyago.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umurimo wawe utubonekere abagaragu bawe, Gukomera kwawe kumenyekanire ku bana bacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwiza bw'Uwiteka Imana yacu bube kuri twe, Kandi udukomereze imirimo y'intoki zacu, Nuko imirimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: y'intoki zacu, uyikomeze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umusengesha akurikizeho gusoma 1 Korinto 15:20-58, cyangwa 1 Tesalonike 4:13-15: 11. N’amara

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusoma icyo gice, asenge iri sengesho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI w’ibambe, aba bantu bapfushije uwabo ubahe kukwizera no kwihanganira iby’igihe kizaza, be

content.speaker: all
content.text: gucogozwa n’agahinda gasaze, ahubwo bakomere mu mitima; be guheranwa n’umubabaro nk’abandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: badafite ibyiringiro, ahubwo bajye bibuka ibyiza byose wabagiriye mu bihe byashize, bafite ibyiringiro ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazongera kubonanira mu ijuru.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bacyitegura gushyira intumbi mu mva, Umusengesha avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMUNTU wabyawe n’umugore, amara igihe gito ariho, kandi cyuzuyemwo imiruho. Avuka ameze

content.speaker: all
content.text: nk’ururabyo, maze agacibwa; ahita nk’igicucu, kandi ntarame.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tukiriho turi hagati y’urupfu. Twahungira kuri nde wo kudukiza atari Wowe, Nyagasani, nubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufite impamvu yo kurakarira ibyaha byacu. Ariko, ayi Mwami Mana yera rwose, ayi Nyagasani urusha

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose imbaraga, ayi Mukiza Wera w’imbabazi nyinshi, ntuduhane mu buribwe bwinshi bw’urupfu

content.speaker: all
content.text: rw’iteka ryose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, uzi ibihishwe mu mititma yacu, ntiwice amatwi yawe y’imbabazi, ngo we kumva ibyo dusaba;

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo utubabarire, ayi Mwami wera cyane, Umukiza wera umunyambabazi, Wowe Mucamanza mwiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uhoraho, igihe cyacu cyo gupfa ni gisohora, ntuzakunde ko dutandukanwa nawe n’uburibwe bw’urupfu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bahagaritswe hafi no gushyira igitaka ku ntumbi. Umusengesha avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: TUZI yuko Imana ishobora byose ku bw’imbabazi zayo nyinshi ishase kujyana i wayo mwene Data uyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukundwa, utaashye; ni cyo gitumye dushyira umubiri we mu butaka, igitaka mu butaka, ivu mu ivu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: umukungugu mu mukungugu, dufite ibyiringiro tudashidikanya na hato ko tuzazuka, tugahabwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubugingo buhoraho, tubuhabwa na Yesu Kristo, uzahindura umubiri wacu ugayitse, akawushushanya

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’umubiri we ufite ubwiza, kuko agira imbaraga zo kumubashisha kwigandurira byose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bose bavugire hamwe bati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Numva ijwi rivugira mu ijuru rimbwira riti"Andika uti 'Uhereye none hahirwa abapfa bapfira mu Mwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu.' " Umwuka na we aravuga ati"Yee, ngo baruhuke imihati yabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umusengesha   Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, utugirire imbabazi.

content.speaker: congregation
content.text: Kristo, utugirire imbabazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese wo mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe; ubwami bwawe buze; ibyo ukunda bikorwe mu isi,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko bikorwa mu ijuru; uduhe none ifunguro ridutunga uko bukeye; utubabariwe ibyaha byacu, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: natwe tubabarira ababitugirira; ntuduhane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize umubi. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko aho uri imyuka y’abavuye ino bapfiriye mu Mwami wacu ari ho iri,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ari mizima; kandi duhamya yuko abakwizeye, ni bamara guturwa umutwaro w’uyu mubiri, babana

content.speaker: all
content.text: nawe bishima. Nuko turagushimira ko ushatse gukiza mwene Data uyu mubabaro wo muri iyi si irimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyaha; kandi turakwingingira kwemerana imbabazi zawe gushyitsa rwose umubare w’intore zawe no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kudutebukiriza ubwami bwawe, kugira ngo, ni tugera mu bwiza bwawe budashira, tuzasangire

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abapfuye bizeye by’ukuri Izina ryawe ryera umunezero usohoye w’umubiri n’uw’ubugingo. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA y’ibambe, sew’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, turagushimira yuko ari we Kuzuka n’ubugingo, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko umwizera wese, naho yaba yarapfuye, azabaho, ntazongera gupfa iteka ryose. Kandi, Mana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagushimira yuko watwigishirije mu ijwi ry’Intumwa yawe Pawulo wera kutababazwa n’abasinziriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri Yesu nk’abadafite ibyiringiro. None, Data wa twese turakwingira kutuzura mu rupfu, ni rwo byaha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tugere mu bugingo bwo gukiranuka. Uduhe ibyo kugira ngo, ni tuva muri ubu bugingo, tuzaruhukire mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami Yesu, nk’uko twiringiye yuko mwene data uyu aruhutse, no kugira ngo, ubwo abantu bose

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazazuka ku munsi w’imperuka, tuzemerwe nawe, duhabwe umugisha Umwana wawe ukunda cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: azaha abagukunda bakakubaha bose ati, Nimuze abo Data yahaye umugisha, muragwe ubwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwabatunganirijwe uhereye ku kuremwa kw’isi. Data wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turakwinginze

content.speaker: all
content.text: uduhe ibyo ku bwa Yesu Kristo, Umuhuza kandi Umurengezi wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba upfuye ari umwana muto, bakoresha aya masengesho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWAMI wacu Yesu Kristo, ni wowe wakikiye abana, ukabaha umugisha; none turakwinginga, humura

content.speaker: all
content.text: amaso yacu kugira ngo dusobanukirwe yuko uyu mwana umwakirije amaboko yawe y’urukundo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukamuvana mu isi ataranduzwa cyane n’ibyaha. None ubu ageze mu mahoro. Ni cyo gitumye

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubigushimira, Yesu Kristo Umwungeri mwiza w’abana. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA Se w’Umwami wacu Yesu; Umukunzi w’abana, tuzi yuko nta cyo uremera ubusa, kandi ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukunda icyo waremye cyose; None turakwinga, wurure umubabaro w’aba bantu bawe bapfushije

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwana wabo w’inkora-mutima; ubahe kudahugira mu mubabaro, ahubwo bahuguke, bakomeze

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugukunda no kugukorera bakiri muri ubu bugingo; babone kuzongera kubonana na w, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwambikanwa na we ubwiza bwawe buhebuje mu bwami bwawe, ku bw’Umwama wawe watwitangiye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UBUNTU bw’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo n’urukundo rw’Imana, n’ubumwe bw’Umwuka Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: bibane natwe twese iteka ryose. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ZABURI ZA DAWIDI

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uko zisomwa buri munsi kumara Ukwezi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: izo mugitondo

content.speaker: all
content.text: iza nimugoroba

subsections.title: Uburyo bwo Kurobanura Abadikoni, Abapastori n'Abepiskopi

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ABEPISKOPI N’ABAPASTORI N’ABADIKONI

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko imigenzo y’Itorero iri.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYO GUSOBANURA UBUKURU BWO MU

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ITORERO ICYO ARI CYO.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu bose, abagira umwete wo gusoma Ibyanditswe Byera n’ibindi bitabo byanditswe n’aba kera, bazi

content.speaker: all
content.text: neza ngo, uhereye mu gihe cy’Intumwa, hariho Abakuru bari mu Itorero rya Kristo, Abepiskopi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Abapastori, kandi n’Abadikoni.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwo bukuri bwari bwubashywe cyane. Ni cyo cyatumaga umuntu wese atemererwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubuhabwa, atabanje guhamagarwa, no kugeragezwa, kandi no kubazwa, ngo babone guhamya yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: afite ingeso nziza zikwiriye ubwo bukuru; hanyuma abone kwinjizwa muri uwo murimo n’Abakuru bafite

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware bwabyo, nk’uko amategeko ategeka, bawumuhesha gusenga kw’Abakristo bose bateranye, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumushyiraho ibiganza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko dushaka yuko ubwo bukuru bukomezwa mu Itorero, kandi bukoreshwa neza, bukubahwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: na none nta muntu wemererwa kuba Umwepiskopi, cyangwa Umupastori, cyangwa Umudikoni,

content.speaker: all
content.text: atabanje guhamagarwa, no kugeregezwa, no kubazwa ngo abone kubuhabwa nk’uko iyi migenzo igenza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: keretse niba yari yararobanuriwe ahandi, cyangwa yari yarashyizweho ibiganza n’undi Mwepiskopi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nta muntu wemererwa kuba Umudikoni atarashyitsa imyaka makumyabiri n’itatu avutse,

content.speaker: all
content.text: keretse yaba afite urwandiko rumwemeza; kandi umuntu wese ushaka guhabwa Ubupastori akwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuba ashyikije imyaka makumyabiri n’ine; kandi umuntu wese ugiye kurobanurirwa Ubwepiskopi

content.speaker: all
content.text: akwiriye kuba afite imyaka mirongo itatu rwose avutse.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ABADIKONI

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwiriza abanze asobanure umurimo n’ubuhereza bw’abantu barobanurirwa Ubudikoni uwo ari wo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi uko ubwo buhereza ari ngombwa mu Itorero.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze igisonga cy’Umwepiskopi ajyane abantu bo kurobanurwa, abashyikirize Umwepiskopi yicaye ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntebe ye hafi y’Ameza year, amubwire ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUBYEYI nyakubahwa wo mu Mana, nkuzaniye aba bantu kugira ngo barobanurirwe Ubudikoni.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Wirinde, hatagira umuntu unzanira utabasha guhamya yuko yigishijwe neza, kandi agira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingeso nziza zo kumushoboza guhereza iby’Imana uburyo bukwiriye, kugira ngo Imana yubahwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itorero ryayo rikomezwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igisonga:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nabajije ibyabo, kandi narababajije ubwabo; maze niringira ko ari ko bameze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abwire abantu bose ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE Data, niba hari uwo muri mwe uzi icyaha gikomeye, cyangwa indi mpamvu ku muntu wese wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri aba bantu banzaniye kurobanurirwa uwo murimo, aze imbere yanjye mu Izina ry’Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigaragaze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba hari icyaha gikomeye cyangwa indi mpamvu yaboneka kuri umwe muri abo bantu yamubuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurobanurwa, Umwepiskopi abe amuretse kugeza ubwo azamenya ko nta mpamvu ikwiriye kumubuza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abwire Iteraniro ngo risabire abagiye kurobanura; maze afatanye na ryo gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: amasengesho ya LITANI

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amagambo yose ya Litani avugwe, uretse Isengesho rya Krisostomu Wera ryonyine.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma hakurikireho amagambo y’Igaburo Ryera. Isengesho, Urwandiko, n’Ubutumwa byanditswe

content.speaker: all
content.text: hepfo, abe ari byo bisomwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, kera wategekesheje ubwenge bw’Ubumana bwawe, ko Itorero ryawe rigira

content.speaker: all
content.text: abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; kandi wayoboye Intumwa zawe kurobanura Sitefano wera kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umudikoni, ni na we mfura y’abishwe babahora Yesu None turakwinginga ngo urebane imbabazi aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bagaragu bawe bahamagariwe uwo murimo n’ubwo buhereza. Ubamenyeshe rwose imyigishirize yawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ukuri, ubarimbishishe ingeso nziza kugira ngo ibyo bigisha bifatanije n’ibyo bakora byose bizatume

content.speaker: all
content.text: basohoza neza ubuhereza bahawe, ngo Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igice cyo mu Nzandiko

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1Timoteo 3:8-13

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi n'abadiyakoni na bo ni uko: bakwiriye kuba abitonda, batari intereganya cyangwa abamenyereye

content.speaker: all
content.text: vino nyinshi bakifuza indamu mbi, ahubwo bakomeze ubwiru bwo kwizera bafite imitima itabacira

content.speaker: all
content.text: urubanza. Bakwiriye kubanza kugeragezwa, maze nibatabaho umugayo babone gukora umurimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'ubudiyakoni. N'abadiyakonikazi na bo ni uko: babe abitonda, abatabeshyera abandi, abadakunda

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibisindisha, bakiranuka muri byose. Abadiyakoni babe abagabo b'umugore umwe, bategeka neza abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: babo n'abo mu ngo zabo. Kuko abakora neza uwo murimo w'ubudiyakoni bibonera umwanya

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'icyubahiro mwiza, n'ubushizi bw'amanga bwinshi bwo kwizera Yesu Kristo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Cyangwa Ibyakozwe n’Intumwa 6:2-7.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo cumi na babiri bahamagara abigishwa bose bati"Ntibikwiriye ko turekera kwigisha ijambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry'Imana kwicara ku meza tugabura. Nuko bene Data, mutoranye muri mwe abantu barindwi bashimwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: buzuye Umwuka Wera n'ubwenge, tubashyire kuri uwo murimo. Ariko twebweho tuzakomeza gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kugabura ijambo ry'Imana." Abahateraniye bose bashima ayo magambo, batoranya Sitefano umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: wuzuye kwizera n'Umwuka Wera, na Filipo na Purokoro na Nikanori na Timoni, na Parumena na

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nikolawo wo muri Antiyokiya watoye idini y'Abayuda, babashyira imbere y'intumwa kandi bamaze

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusenga babarambikaho ibiganza. Nuko ijambo ry'Imana rikomeza kwamamara, umubare w'abigishwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ugwira cyane i Yerusalemu, abatambyi benshi bumvira uko kwizera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubutumwa batarasomwa, Umwepiskopi, yicaye ku ntebe ye, abarize imbere y’iteraniro abagiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurobanurwa ibi bibazo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Wiringiye yuko ari Umwuka Wera wakwemeje gukora uyu murimo n’ubu buhereza, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukwize icyubahiro cy’Imana, kandi ukomeze abantu bayo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni byo niringiye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wiringiye yuko wahamagariwe by’ukuri ubu buhereza bw’Itorero, nk’uko Umwami wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yesu Kristo ashaka, kandi nk’uko iri Torero ritegeka?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: nsengero uzaturamwo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi  Nimwumve imirimo y’Umudikoni iyo ari yo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mbibasomera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni byo nibgira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemeye rwose by’ukuri Ibyanditswe Byera byose byo mu Isezerano rya kera n’irishya?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ndabyemeye rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzajya ugira umwete wo gusomera abantu ibyo Byanditswe aho bateranira mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ajye afasha Umupastori gusengesha abantu mu rusengero, cyane cyane amufasha guhereza Igaburo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera; yigisha Gatigisimu; abatiza abana bato n’abantu bakuru Umupastori adahari; kansi akwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubahiriza abarwayi n’abakene n’ibimuga, ngo amenyeshe ab’Itorero, kugira ngo babafashe. Mbese

content.speaker: all
content.text: uzajya ukora utyo ubyishimiye kandi ubikunze?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: b’Itorero, n’abandi bahawe ubutware bwo kukuyobora wemeranije umutima unezerewe ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: baguhuguza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mbikora Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzajya wumvira Umwepiskopi wawe umwubashye, hamwe n’abandi bahereza bakuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mbikora Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi arambike ibiganza ku mutwe w’umuntu wese wo muri bo umupfukamiye imbere,

content.speaker: all
content.text: amubwire ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHABWE, ubutware bwo gukora umurimo w’umudikoni mu Itorero ry’Imana. Ndabuguhaye mu Izina rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umwepiskopi amuhereze Isezerano rishya, avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHABWE: ubutware bwo gusomera Ubutumwa Bwiza mu rusengero, no kubwiriza, uko Umwepiskopi

content.speaker: all
content.text: azakwemerera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwe wo muri bo utoranijwe n’Umwepiskopi asome igice cyo mu Butumwa bwiza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUHORE mukenyeye kandi amatabaza yanyu yake, mumere nk'abantu bategereza shebuja aho

content.speaker: all
content.text: agarukira ava mu bukwe, kugira ngo ubwo azaza nakomanga bamukingurire vuba. Hahirwa abagaragu

content.speaker: all
content.text: shebuja azaza agasanga bari maso. Ndababwira ukuri yuko azakenyera, akabicaza akabahereza. Naza mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: gicuku cyangwa mu nkoko agasanga bameze batyo, bazaba bahirwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kuvuga ibyo twemera n’amagambo y’Igaburo ryera aheruka,

content.speaker: all
content.text: abarobanuwe bose barihabwe n’Umwepiskopi uwo munsi. Nibarangiza iby’Igaburo ryera, hanyuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Isengesho riheruka, batarasaba amahoro, aya masengesho abe ari yo avugwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, turagushimira Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi butumye

content.speaker: all
content.text: wemera kwakira aba bagaragu bawe, ukabinjiza mu murimo w’ubudikoni mu Itorero ryawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nyagasani, turakwingingira kugira ngo ubahe kuba inyangamugayo bicisha bugufi, ari abizerwa

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: mu murimo wabo, kani bakuyobokane umutima ukunze muri byose, kugira ngo bahagarare bashikamye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Mwana wawe Yesu Kristo, bafite umutima utabarega ikibi. Kandi ubahe kuyoboka bakiri muri uru

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwego rwo hasi, kugira ngo baboneke ko bakwiriye kuzahamagarirwa kujya mu rundi rwo hejuru mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Buhereza bw’Itorero ryawe. Ibyo tubisabye mu Izina ry’Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo Umukiza wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitumen duhesha Izina

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryawe ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabazi zawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibgira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umudikoni akwiriye kubwirwa ko azamara umwaka wose muri uwo murimo w’Ubudikoni (keretse

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abonye impamvu ituma awugabanya), kugira ngo awushyitse neza, kandi abe umuhanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu byerekeye umurimo w’Itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwo mwaka ushize, niba aboneka ari umwizerwa kandi umunyamwete, yashobora kwinjizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Bupastori imbere y’Itorero, bakurikije uburyo bwo kurobanura. Abapastori mu magambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: akurikiraho.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ABAPASTORI

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umunsi Umwepiskopi yatoranije n’ushyika, hanyuma yo Gusenga kwa gitondo, habeho kubwiriza

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa guhugura abantu ku by’umurimo n’ubukuru by’abashaka kurobanurwa kuba Abapastori, ko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngombwa mu Itorero rya Kristo, kandi ko abantu bakwiriye kubaha abarobanurirwa uwo murimo kubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubukuru bahawe.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Igisonga cy’umwepiskopi ajyane abantu kurobanurwa, abashyikirize, Umwepiskopi yicaye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku ntebe ye amubwire ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUBYEYI nyakubahwa wo mu Mana, nkuzaniye aba bantu kugira ngo barobanuriwe Ubupastori.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wirinde, hatagira umuntu unzanira, utabasha guhamya yuko yigishijwe neza, kandi agira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ingeso nziza zo kumushoboza guhereza iby’Imana uburyo bukwiriye, kugira ngo Imana yubahwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itorero ryayo rikomezwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igisonga: Nabajije ibyabo, kandi narabajije ubwabo; maze niringira ko ari ko bameze.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umwepiskopi abwire abantu ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA bakundwa, aba bantu nibo nemeye kwinjiza mu mirimo wera w’ubupastori, Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: nibishaka; kuko, tumaze kubabaza, duhamya ko aria bantu bahamagariwe uwo murimo, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: amategeko yemera, kandi ko ari abantu bawukwiriye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko, niba hari uwo muri mwe uzi icyaha gikomeye, cyangwa indi mpamvu ku muntu wese wo muri aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bantu banzaniye kurobanurirwa Ubupastori, bikwiriye kumubaza guhabwa uwoaze imbere yanjye mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina ry’Imana, abigaragaze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba hari icyaha gikomeye cyangwa indi mpamvu yaboneka kuri umwe muri abo bantu yamubuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurobanurwa, Umwepiskopi abe amuretse kugeza ubwo azamenya ko nta mpamvu ikwiriye kumubuza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi abwire Iteraniro ngo risabire abagiye kurobanurwa; maze afatanye na ryo gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: amasengesho ya Litani, nk’uko biri mu byo Kurobanura Abadikoni.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amagambo y’Igaburo Ryera akurikireho; Isengesho, Urwandiko, n’Ubutumwa byanditswe hepfo, abe ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: byo bisomwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, kera wategekesheje Umwuka Wera, ko Itorero ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: rigira abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; none turakwinginze urebane imbabazi aba bagaragu bawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: bahamagariwe kuba Abapastori. Ubamenyeshe rwose imyigishirize yawe y’ukuri, ubarimbishishe ingezo

content.speaker: all
content.text: nziza kugira ngo ibyo bigisha bifatanije n’ibyo bakora byose bizatume basohoza neza ubuhereza bahawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo Izina ryawe ryubahwe, n’Itorero ryawe rikomezwe. Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: URWANDIKO  Abefeso 4:7-13

content.speaker: all
content.text: ARIKO umuntu wese muri twe yahawe ubuntu nk'uko urugero rw'impano ya Kristo ruri. Ni cyo gituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: ivuga iti"Amaze kuzamuka mu ijuru, Ajyana iminyago myinshi, Aha abantu impano." Ariko iryo jambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo"Yazamutse mu ijuru" risobanurwa rite? Ntirigaragaza yuko yabanje kumanuka ikuzimu?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uwamanutse ni we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose, kugira ngo asohoze byose. Nuko aha bamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuba intumwa ze, n'abandi kuba abahanuzi, n'abandi kuba ababwirizabutumwa bwiza, n'abandi kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: abungeri n'abigisha, kugira ngo abera batunganirizwe rwose gukora umurimo wo kugabura iby'Imana no

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukomeza umubiri wa Kristo, kugeza ubwo twese tuzasohora kugira ubumwe bwo kwizera no kumenya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwana w'Imana, kandi kugeza ubwo tuzasohora kuba abantu bashyitse bageze ku rugero rushyitse

content.speaker: all
content.text: rw'igihagararo cya Kristo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma hasomwe Ubutumwa bwa Matayo igice cya 9.36-38

content.speaker: all
content.text: ABONYE abantu uko ari benshi arabababarira, kuko bari barushye cyane basandaye nk'intama zitagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwungeri. Maze abwira abigishwa be ati"Ibisarurwa ni byinshi, ariko abasaruzi ni bake. Nuko rero

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwinginge nyir'ibisarurwa, yohereze abasaruzi mu bisarurwa bye."

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Cyangwa Ubutumwa bwa Yohana igice cya 10:1-16

content.speaker: all
content.text: NI UKURI, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko uwinjira mu rugo rw'intama atanyuze mu irembo, ahubwo akuririra

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahandi, uwo aba ari umujura n'umunyazi. Ariko unyura mu irembo ni we mwungeri w'intama. Umurinzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: w'irembo aramwugururira, kandi intama zumva ijwi rye. Ahamagara intama ze mu mazina yazo

content.speaker: all
content.text: akazahura. Iyo amaze kwahura ize zose azijya imbere, intama zikamukurikira kuko zizi ijwi rye. Undi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntizamukurikira, ahubwo zamuhunga kuko zitazi amajwi y'abandi." Yesu abacira uwo mugani, ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntibamenya ibyo yababwiye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko Yesu arongera arababwira ati"Ni ukuri, ni ukuri, ndababwira yuko ari jye rembo ry'intama.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abambanjirije bose bari abajura n'abanyazi, ariko intama ntizabumvise. Ni jye rembo, umuntu niyinjira

content.speaker: all
content.text: muri jye azakizwa, azinjira asohoke kandi azabona urwuri. Umujura ntazanwa n'ikindi keretse kwiba no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwica no kurimbura, ariko jyeweho nazanywe no kugira ngo zibone ubugingo, ndetse ngo zibone

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwinshi. "Ni jye mwungeri mwiza. Umwungeri mwiza apfira intama ze, ariko uragirira ibihembo, utari

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwungeri bwite kandi n'intama atari ize, iyo abonye isega rije asiga intama agahunga, isega rikazifata

content.speaker: all
content.text: rikazitatanya. Kuko ari uw'ibihembo, arahunga ntiyite ku ntama. Ni jye mwungeri mwiza kandi menya

content.speaker: all
content.text: izanjye, izanjye zikamenya nk'uko Data amenya nanjye nkamumenya, kandi mpfira intama zanjye. Mfite

content.speaker: all
content.text: n'izindi ntama zitari izo muri uru rugo, na zo nkwiriye kuzizana. Zizumva ijwi ryanjye kandi zizaba

content.speaker: all
content.text: umukumbi umwe, zigire umwungeri umwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bamaze kumva Ubutumwa Bwiza, Umwepiskopi yicare ku ntebe ye, abwire abagiye kurobanura ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA; mwumvis ibyo twababwiye, ubwo twababazaga wihereye, byo kubigisha iby’icyubahiro

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’uyu murimo mwahamagariwe no gukomera kwawo kwinshi. Kandi ibyo ni ibyo mwigishijwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: mukabibwirizwa uyu munsi, kandi n’Igice cyo mu butumwa bwiza n’icyo mu Nzandiko z’Intumwa na byo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bibibigishije. None ubu turababwira mu Izina ry’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo, ko mujya mwibuka Ubukuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: muhawe uko ari ubw’icyubahiro, kandi uyu murimo muhamagarirwa ko ukomeye cyane. Uyu murimo ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukuba Intumwa z’Umwami Imana, n’abarinzi b’abantu bayo, n’Ibisonga byayo. Kandi n’umuriro wo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwigisha abantu bayo, n’Ibisonga byayo. Kandi n’umurimo wo kwigisha abantu b’Umwami wacu, no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubahugura, no kubagaburira, no kubatunga, kuko ari umukumbi wa Kristo muzaragira; kandi hamwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibyo umurimo wanyu n’ugushaka intama za Kristo zatanye, n’abana be bari muri iyi sim bi, ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakizwe na Kristo iteka ryose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye kujya mwibuka ubudasiba, yuko abo muragijwe ari ab’igiciro cyinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyane, kuko ari intama za Kristo yacunguje urupfu rwe akabavira amaraso. Itorero mukwiriye gukorera ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: umugeni we kandi umubiri we. Kandi umwete wanyu muke watuma iryo Torero cyangwa umuntu umwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: wo muri ryo agira icy’aba, cyangwa abuzwa guca mu nzira y’Imana, muzi yuko mwaba mukoze icyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: gikomeye mukazacirwa urubanza rukomeye ruteye ubwoba. Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye kwibwira cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyo muherwa kugabura kwanyu kugaburira abana b’Imana, ni bo mugeni wa Kristo, kandi umubiri we;

content.speaker: all
content.text: bibatere gukomeza imihati yanyu n’umwete wanyu, ntimurorere na hato, mutarakora ibyo mushobora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose ngo mutunganye abo muragijwe bose, bateranirizwe hamwe bizera kumwe, bamenya kumwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana. Kandi ntimurorere, bataragera bose kuba abantu bakuru no ku rugero rw’ubwinshi bwo kuzura

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwa Kristo, kandi batarakurwaho ubuyobe mu by’Imana bwose n’ingeso mbi zose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubwo umurimo wanyu ari mwiza utyo, ariko kandi ukarushya, numenye yuko mukwiriye kujya

content.speaker: all
content.text: muhirimbanira cyane kwerekana ishimwe mushimira Umwami wacu, yuko yabahaye umurimo ukomeye

content.speaker: all
content.text: utyo, kandi muhirimbanire kwirinda gucumura ku Mana ubwanyu cyangwa gutera abanda

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyicumuraho. Ariko ubwanyu ntimuzabasha gukundisha umutima wanyu kugira umwete ungana utyo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuko Imana yonyine ari yo itanga umutima ubishaka n’imbaraga zibishobora. Ni cyo gituma mukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira umwete mwinshi wo kuyisaba Umwuka wayo Wera. Kandi ubwo umurimo wanyu ukomeye ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwo kuyobora abantu inzira y’agakiza kadashira, ntimwawubasha na hato mudakura kwigisha kwanyu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Byanditswe Byera, kandi mutagira ingeso zihura na byo. Nuko mukwiriye kujya mugira umwete

content.speaker: all
content.text: mwinshi wo kubisoma no kubyiga, kandi n’ingezo zanyu n’iz’abanyu mukwiriye guhirimbanira cyane

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuzihuza n’ibitegekwa n’ibyo Byanditswe. Kandi ku bw’iyo mpamvu, uko mushobora, mukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwitandukanya n’iby’iyi si hamwe n’ubwenge bwayo, byatuma umuntu ahagaruka umutima.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Twiringiye yuko mwarangije kera gutekereza kuri ibyo byose, mukabyibwira cyane gutekereza kuri ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, mukabyibwira cyane, kandi yuko mwagambiriye guhugukira mu murimo Imana yabahamagariye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukora ku bw’ubuntu bwayo. Twiringiye yuko iyo migambi yanyu izatuma muwuhirimbanira wonyine,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akaba ari wo muruhira, ibyabafasha kuwukora bikaba ari byo byonyine mushaka kwiga. Kandi twiringiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko muzajya musaba Imana Data wa twese mu Izina ry’Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ni we Muhuza

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Imana n’abantu, ngo ibahe Umwuka Wera, abafashe, abahe imbaraga ze ziva mu ijuru, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kujya musoma mwitegereza Ibyanditswe Byera, uko bukeye, gutume muhinduka abahanga b’ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: guhereza kwanyu, mukazihuza n’amategeko ya Kristo n’imyigishirize ye, bitume muhinduka

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyitegererezo byiza bishimwa n’Imana byo gukurikizwa n’abo mwigisha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Noneho ndashaka ko imigambi yanyu myiza yo kujya mukora ibyo igaragarira iri teraniro

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’abakundwa na Kristo riteraniye hano, namwe mukarushaho gukundishwa kubikora n’isezerano

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugiye gusezerana none. Ni cyo gitumye mbategeka gusubirisha amagambo yeruye ibyo ngiye kubabaza

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina ry’Imana no mu ry’Itorero ryayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni byo nibwira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Wemeye rwose yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo kwigisha kose gukwiriyye kwemerwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:  Wibwira yuko wahamagiriwe by’ukuri umurimo n’ubuhereza bw’Ubupastori mu Itorero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uko Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo ashaka, kandi uko Itorero ryacu ryategetse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abashaka agakiza kadashira gaheshwa no kwizera Yesu Kristo, kandi yuko ari ntakundi umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: akwiriye guhatwa kwemera, ngo atabyemeye ntiyakira? Ugambiriye rwose kwigisha abo uragijwe ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Byanditswe? Kandi wemeye kutagira ikindi cyose kidahamywa na byo wakwigisha ugahamya ko ari

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngombwa ku muntu ushaka gukizwa, keretse ibihamirizwa muri byo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mbikora, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzitegura kujya ugira umwete rwose wo kubuza imyigishirize yose y’inzaduka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nemeye ntyo, kandi ngambiriye ntyo, niringiye Ubuntu bw’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero uzajya ugira umwete rwose wo kwigisha imyigishirize ya Kristo, gutanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amasakaramento ye no gutoza abantu amategeko ye, nk’uko yategetse ubwe, kandi nk’uko iri Torero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryemera, kugira ngo wigishe abo uragijwe kugira umwete wo kubyitondera?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’iy’ibinyoma inyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana? Kandi uzitegura kujya uhana ugahugura abazima n’abarwayi

content.speaker: all
content.text: na bo, mwiherereye no ku mugaragaro, uko uzabona ko bikwiriye, ukabona uburyo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya mbikora, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzagira umwete wo gusenga no gusoma Ibyanditwe Byera, no kwiga ibigufasha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwitegereza ibyo Byanditswe, uretse guhirimbanira iby’iyi si n’iby’umubiri?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo yigishije, kugira ngo mufatanije mubere umukumbi wa Kristo icyitegererezo cyiza nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: mushoboye rwose?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya ngerageza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzagira umwete wo gutunganya ingeso zawe ubwawe n’iz’abo mu rugo rwawe, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzahirimbanira kugenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzajya ushyira imbere, nk’uko ushoboye rwose, umubano mwiza n’amahoro n’urukundo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Bakristo bose, cyane cyane mu bo uragijwe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubaza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubukuru bwo kugutegeka, wemeye ko bakuyobora mu by’Imana unezerewe kandi udahatwa?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami Imana ari Umufasha wanjye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uzajya wubaha Umwepiskopi wawe, kandi umwumvira n’abandi Bahereza bakuru bafite

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi ahaguruke, avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMANA ishobora byose, yabakundishije gukora ibyo byose, ibahe n’imbaraga zibabashisha kubikora,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugira ngo isohoze umurimo yatangiye muri mwe. Mbisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bakurikizeho gusaba Imana, kugira ngo ibyo byose Imana ibisohoze, bayisabishe imitima yabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi kugira ngo bayisabe batyo, bamare umwanya bacecetse.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze abagiye kurobanurwa bagipfukamye, Umwepiskopi avuge iyi ndirimbo, cyangwa ayiririmbe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ayifatanije n’Abakuru n’abandi bahari.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: NGWINO, MWUKA WERA.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1  Ngwino, Mwuka Wera, ngwino

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umurimo wawe utuvugutire

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni wowe ukunda guha abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bagusabye impano zawe nyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni Wowe utanga ubugingo, ni wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utanga gukundana kwiza kwinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: N’amahoro n’ibyishimo byinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2  Amaso yacu atareba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mugabyi w’umucyo uyahwejeshe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abandujwe n’ibyaha utweze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwogeshe Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uturinde ababisha ubwo ari Wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muyobora wacu, dushire ubwoba ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nta kibi cyatugeraho rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 3  Data wa twese n’Umwana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nawe, Mwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwigishe ibyo kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tujye turirimba iteka ryose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tuti, Ubwiza butagira akagero

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bw’Ubutatu bwera, turabushima;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bwo Mana Rurema dusenga.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kuvuga atya ati :

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dusenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, turagushimira yuko urukundo rwawe rutagira

content.speaker: all
content.text: akagero no kugira neza kwawe kwinshi cyane byatuye uduha Yesu Kristo Umwana wawe w’ikinege

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukunda cyane, kugira ngo atubere Umucunguzi kandi Umuremyi w’ubugingo buhoraho. Kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: gucungurwa kwacu yarangirishije urupfu rwe si ko konyine tugushimira ariko kandi, Mwami Mana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagushimira yuko, amaze kuzamuka ajya mu ijuru, yohereje mu isi intumwa ze n’abahanuzi be

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abungeri be n’ababwiriza b’ubutumwa bwe n’abigisha n’abungeri be, agateranisha hamwe imiruho

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabo umukumbi mwinshi cyane wo kogeza ishimwe ridashira ry’Izina ryawe ryera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi nk’uko abantu baguhindukiriye ahandi benshi mu isi, niko n’ino I Rwanda hari umukumbi wawe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo byiza byose watugiriye ku bwo kugira neza kwawe kudashira, turabiguhimbariza ; kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: turagushimira yuko wemeye guhamagarira n’aba bagaragu bawe, kugira ngo basangire na ba bandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: umurimo wategekeye gukiza abari mu isi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi turakwingize, ku bw’uwo Mwana wawe ushimwa kuduha twese kwerekanisha ingeso zacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ishimwe tugushimira ibyo byiza n’ibindi watugiriye byose, tukagwiza iminsi yose kukumenya no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kukwizera, tubiheshwa n’Umwuka wawe Wera. Tubisabye kugira ngo aba bahereza b’ibyawe n’abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bazategekwa guhereza bafatanye gushimisha Izina ryawe ryera no kwagurisha Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amaze kuvuga atyo, Umwepiskopi n’Abapastori bahari bafatanye kurambika ibiganza byabo ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: mutwe w’umuntu wese urobanurirwa Ubupastori, apfukamye ; akiri aho, Umwepiskopi ahereko avuge

content.speaker: all
content.text: atya, ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHABWE Umwuka Wera wo kukubashisha Ubukuru n’umurimo by’Ubupastori mu Itorero ry’Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubiguhesheje kukurambikaho ibiganza byacu. Abo uzababarira ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe, abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: utazabibabarira bazaba batabibabariwe. Kandi ujye uba umugabura wizerwa w’Ijambo ry’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Amasakaramento yayo yera. Mbivuze mu Izina Data wa twese n’iry’Umwana n’iry’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi akurikizeho kubahereza umwe-umwe Igitabo cy’Imana, amubwire atya ati

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHABWE ubushobozi bwo kubwiriza Ijambo ry’Imana, n’ubwo kugabura Amasakaramento yera mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bupastori uzaba utumwemo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma y’ibyo bavuge Kwemera kwo mu Igaburo ryera ; Umwepiskopi akurikizeho ibindi byaryo ;

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: abarobanuwe bakomeze bapfukame aho bari, kugeza ubwo barangiza kugaburirwa. Ni barangiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: amasengesho yose, bakurikireho aya :

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma duhabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imbabazi zawe. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina ryawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibgira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Niba hariho kurobanura Abadikoni n’Abapaastori ku munsi umwe, Abadikoni abe ari bo babanza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuzanwa, maze Abapastori bakurikireho; gusoma Litani rimwe biba birangirije bose. Amasengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: yambi avugwe, irya mbere n’iry’Abadikoni, irya kabiri n’iry’Abapastori. Urwandiko rwo gusomwa rube

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: mu Befeso 4:7-13, nk’uko rurri mu byo kurobanura Abapastori. Ni bamara kurusoma, abagiye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurobanurirwa Ubudikoni abe ari bo babazwa, barobanurwe bakurikije ibyanditswe haruguru. Hanyuma

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ibyo umwe muri bo n’amara gusoma Ubutumwa bwo muri Matayo 9:36-38, nk’uko biri mu kurobanura

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Abapastori, cyangwa ubwo muri Luka 12:35-38, nk’uko biri mu byo kurobanura Abadikoni, abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurobanurirwa Ubupastori abe ari bo babazwa, bakurikije ibyanditswe haruguru.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: UBURYO BWO KUROBANURA

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: ABEPISKOPI

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uko Kurobanura gukwiriye gukorwa ku munsi w’icyumweru, cyangwa ku wundi munsi mukuru

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibintu byose ni bimara gutegurwa mu rusengero, nyuma yo Gusenga kwa mugitondo, Umwepiskopi

content.speaker: all
content.text: utegeka abanda, cyangwa undi utoranijwe, abanze asome iby’Igaburo ryera, birimo iri sengesho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isengesho

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, tuzi yuko kera wahaye Intumwa zawe zera impano nyinshi kandi nziza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubizihesha Umwana wawe Yesu Kristo, ukazihanangiriza kuragira umukumbi wawe; none

content.speaker: all
content.text: turakwingingira Abepiskopi abaragira Itorero ryawe, ngo ubahe imbabazi zituma bashishikarira

content.speaker: all
content.text: kubwiriza Ijambo ryawe, no gutegeka neza Itorero, rikuyoboke kandi rikubahe. Kandi abantu bose ubahe

content.speaker: all
content.text: kumvira amategeko yawe, ngo hanyuma bazahabwe ikamba ry’icyubahiro kitazashira. Tubisabye mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma undi Mwepiskopi asome ibyo mu Nzandiko.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: 1TIMOTEO 3:1-7

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa iki gice mu cyimbo cy’Urwandiko.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: IBYAKOZWE N’INTUMWA 20:17-35

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma undi Mwepiskopi asome icyo mu Butumwa

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: YOHANA 21:15-17

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa iki-

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyangwa iki-

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: YOHANA 20:19-23

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: MATAYO 28:18-20

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bamara gusoma Ubutumwa, bakavuga ibyo kKwemera kw’I Nike, no kubwiriza, Utoranijwe kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi azanwe n’Abepiskopi abiri, bamushyire Umwepiskopi mukuru w’icyo gihugu, (cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: undi Mwepiskopi utoranirijwe uwo murimo, nk’uko amategeko ategeka), yicaye kuntebe ye hafi y’Ameza

content.speaker: all
