content.text: yera; hanyuma Abepiskopi bamuzanye bavuge bati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: MUBYEYI wubahwa wo mu Mana, tukuzanie uyu muntu wubaha Imana kandi wigishijwe neza, kugira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo umurobanurire kuba Umwepiskopi.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru yake urwandiko rumuha uburenganzira bwo kurobanura uwo muntu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ategeke ku rusomwa. Ni bamara kurusoma, barahize uwo muntu indahiro yo guhora yumvira

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi mukuru.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INDAHIRO YO KUMVIRA UMWEPISKOPI MUKURU

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu izina ry’Imana. Amen. Jyewe Kanaka uwatoranijwe kuba Umwepiskopi w’Itorero Angilikani mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Rwanda, nemeye kandi nsezeranye guhora nubaha kandi numvira Umwepiskopi mukuru w’iki gihugu

content.speaker: all
content.text: kanaka n’abazamuzungura, nk’uko bikwiriye. Imana imfashe kubisohoza, ku bwa Yesu Kristo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru abwire abantu bateraniye aho gusenga ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE DATA, mu Butumwa bwa Luka wera handitswe ngo, Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ataratoranya

content.speaker: all
content.text: intumwa ze cumi n’ebyiri kuzituma, yakesheje ijoro asenga. Kandi handitswe mu Byakozwe n’Intumwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngo, Abigishwa bo muri Antiyokiya, batarashyira ibiganza kuri Pawulo na Barunaba kubatuma, biyirije

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubusa basenga. None natwe dukurikize icyitegererezo cy’Umukiza wacu Kristo n’Intumwa ze, tubanze

content.speaker: all
content.text: dusenge, tutararobanura uyu muntu batuzaniye, tukamutuma gukora umurimo, twiringira yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwuka Wera ari we wawumuhamagariye.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma basome Litani, nk’uko byanditswe mu byo Kurobanura Abadikoni; ariko ni bamara gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: bati, “Emera kumurikishiriza Abepiskopi n’ibindi”, mu cimbo cyo gusabira Abapastori n’Abadikoni,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: bavuge iri sengesho:

content.speaker: all
content.text: EMERA guha umugisha mwene Data uyu utoranijwe, no kumwambika imbabazi zawe, zitume akora

content.speaker: all
content.text: neza umurimo wamuhamagariye, ngo Itorero ryawe ryubakwe, n’Izina ryawe risingizwe rishimwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: rihabwe icyubahiro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu: Mwami mwiza, turakwinginze, utwumvire.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bamara kuvuga Litani, basenge iri sengesho:

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Umugabyi w’ibyiza byose, wategekesheje Umwuka wawe Wera kugabira Itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryawe Abahereza b’uburyo butari bumwe; none turakwingize, urebane imbabazi uyu mugaragu wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uhamagariwe umurimo n’ubuhereza by’Umwepiskopi, ugwize muri we imyigishirize yawe y’Ukuri, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: umurimbishishe ingeso nziza zitagira inenge, bizatume ajya aguhereza muri ubu Buhereza

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ubunyangamugayo mu byo avuga no mu byo akora, ngo Izina ryawe rihabwe icyubahiro, n’Itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryawe ryubakwe kandi ritegekwe neza; ribiheshwe n’ubwiza bw’Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo, ubana nawe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera ibihe bidashira. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru, yicaye mu ntebe ye, abwire uwo muntu ugiye kurobanura ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: MWENE Data, uzi yuko Ibyanditswe Byera na za Kanoni za kera bidutegeka kutihutira kurambika ibiganza

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku muntu wese ushaka guhabwa Ubutegetsi mu Itorero rya Krist, kandi uzi ko igiciro yatanze kurigura

content.speaker: all
content.text: Atari gito, ahubwo ari kinini cyane, ndetse n’amaraso ye yavuye. Ni cyo gitumye nshaka kubanza

content.speaker: all
content.text: kukubaza amagambo amwe, ntarakugabira uwo murimo, ngo abantu bateraniye aha babone kumva uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: umaramaje kugenza mu Itorero ry’Imana, bakaba abagabo bo kubihamya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:    Wemeye neza yuko wahamagariwe ubu Buhereza nyakuri, nk’uko Umwami wacu Yesu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo ashaka?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:   Nemeye ntyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye neza yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo imyigishirize yose ishobora kurangiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: rimwe gukiza umuntu, agaheshwa agakiza kadashira no kwizera Yesu Kristo? Kandi umaramaje rwose

content.speaker: all
content.text: kujya wigisha abantu uzaragizwa ibyo Byanditswe Byera, no kutagira ikindi cyose wigisha ugahamya ko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ari ngombwa guhesha abantu agakiza gahoraho, keretse ibihamywa n’ibyo Byanditswe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:  Ni byo nemeye, kandi maramaje gukora ntyo kubw’ubuntu bw’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi: Wemeye gushishikarira gusoma ibyo Byanditswe Byera no kudacogora, ugasaba Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: iyo usenze, kugufasha kubisobanukirwa neza, bitume ushobozwa na byo kwigisha abantu imyigishirize

content.speaker: all
content.text: myiza no kubihanangiriza no kubitsindisha ababihakanya, ndetse ukabibemeze?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:      Nemeye gukora ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:   Witeguye kuba umwiringirwa, ukagira umwete wose wo gutsemba imyigishirize yose

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ubuyobe kandi y’inzaduka inyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana; no kubwira abantu mu mubonano no ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: mugaragaro kwanga iyo myigishirize, no kubahugura kugira ngo bayigenze nkawe?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:     Niteguye gukora ntyo, Umwami wacu ari Umufasha wanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:      Wemeye kwanga kutubaha Imana kose, n’irari ryose ry’iyi si, ngo ubone kumara iminsi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ukiri muri iyi si wirinda, ukiranuka, kandi wubaha Imana; maze ubere abanda icyitegererezo mu ngeso

content.speaker: all
content.text: zawe nziza, ukwanze wese afatwe n’isoni, abure urwitwazo rwo kukurega?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza      Nzajya ngenza ntyo, Umwami wacu ari Umufasha wanjye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye kurinda no kugwiza mu bantu gutuza no gukundana n’amahoro, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ushoboye; kandi abo mu Bwepiskopi bwawe, abatera imivurungano n’abatayumvira n’abanyangeso mbi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: wemeye kubacyaha no kubahana, nk’uko ububasha buri uhabwa n’Ijambo ry’Imana n’Amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Itorero?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:   Nemeye gukora ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:   Wemeye kuba inyangamugayo, iyo urobanura abantu, n’iyo ubatuma, kandi iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubashyiraho ibiganza?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:   Ni ko nzajya mba, mfashijwe n’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi:  Wemeye kwerekana ubugwaneza, no gufata neza abakene n’indushyi, n’abanyamahanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: badafite gifasha, ukabagirira imbabazi ku bwa Kristo?

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza:    Nemeye kwiyerekana ntyo, mfashijwe n’Imana.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru ahaguruke, avuge ati:

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese wo mu ijuru, waguhaye umutima mwiza wemeye gusohoza ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, ajye aguha imbaraga n’ububasha byo kubishyitsa rwose, abone kurangiriza muri wowe umurimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yatangiye, kugira ngo ku munsi w’imperuka uzaboneke utunganye rwose, kandi utabonetseho umugayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tubisabye mu Izina rya Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Urobanurwa kuba Umwepiskopi asubire mu cyumba hirya, yambare indi myambaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Umwepiskopi isigaye:  n’amara kuyambara, asubire ku Mwepiskopi mukuru, amupfukamire imbere,

content.speaker: all
content.text: uwo Mwepiskopi n’abandi bari kumwe bavuge indirimbo yitwa” Veni Creator”

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: NGWINO, MWUKA WERA.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1.  Ngwino, Mwuka Wera, ngwino

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umurimo wawe utuvugutire

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni wowe ukunda guha abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bagusabye impano zawe nyinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni Wowe utanga ubugingo, ni wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utanga gukundana kwiza kwinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: N’amahoro n’ibyishimo byinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2.  Amaso yacu atareba,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mugabyi w’umucyo uyahwejeshe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abandujwe n’ibyaha utweze,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwogeshe Ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Uturinde ababisha ubwo ari Wowe

content.speaker: all
content.text: Muyobora wacu, dushire ubwoba ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nta kibi cyatugeraho rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 3.  Data wa twese n’Umwana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nawe, Mwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Utwigishe ibyo kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tujye turirimba iteka ryose,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tuti, Ubwiza butagira akagero

content.speaker: all
content.text: Bw’Ubutatu bwera, turabushima;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bwo Mana Rurema dusenga.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni bamara kuyirirmba, Umwepiskopi mukuru avuge ati :

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mwami wacu, umva ibyo tugusaba ;

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gusubiza :  Kandi no gutabaza kwacu ukumve.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi :

content.speaker: all
content.text: Dusenge.

content.speaker: all
content.text: MANA ishobora byose, Data wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turagushimiye kuko, ku bw’urukundo rwawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: rutagira akagero, waduhaye Umwana wawe w’ikinege ukunda cyane, Yesu Kristo, katubera

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umucungunzi, kandi Umuhesha w’ubugingo budashira ; kandi arangije kuducunguza rwose urupfu rwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: arazamuka, ajya mu ijuru ; agezeyo, asesekaza ku bantu impano ze, bamwe abagira intumwa, abandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: abahanuzi, abandi ababwiriza b’ubutumwa, n’abandi abapastori n’abigisha, ngo abone kubaka Itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: rye no kuritunganya rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: None turakwinginga ngo uhe uyu mugaragu wawe imbabazi, zitume ahora yiteguye gukwiza hose

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubutumwa bwawe bwiza, ni bwo magambo anezeza cyane, ahamya ibyo kuzura nawe, kandi akoreshe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware umuhaye gukiza abantu si ukubarimbura, kubafasha si ukubababaza, kandi ajye agaburira abo

content.speaker: all
content.text: muryango wawe ibibakwiriye ; hanyuma ku munsi w’imperuka azabone kwakirwa, atahe mu munezero

content.speaker: all
content.text: udashira, ku bwa Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu ubana nawe, kandi utegekana nawe n’Umwuka Wera ibihe

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose. Amen.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru n’abandi Bepiskopi bahari barambike ibiganza ku mutwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Umwepiskopi mushya ubapfukamiye imbere, Umukuru avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHABWE Umwuka Wera, ubone guhabwa Ubukuru n’Umurimo by’Umwepiskopi mu Itorero ry’Imana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo uheshejwe no kurambikwaho ibiganza byacu, mu Izina rya Data wa twese, n’iry’Umwana,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’iry’Umwuka Wera. Kandi ujye wibuka kwenyegeza imbabazi z’Imana uheshejwe no kurambikwaho

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibiganza byacu ; kuko Imana itaduhaye umwuka w’ubwoba, ahubwo yaduhaye uw’imbaraga n’urukundo

content.speaker: all
content.text: no kwirinda.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Maze Umwepiskopi mukuru amuhe Bibiliya, avuge ati,

content.speaker: all
content.text: UJYE ushyiraho umwete gusoma iby’Imana, no guhugura abantu, no kubigisha imyigishirize y’idini yacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ujye utekereza ku byanditswemo ; ubigirire umwete, kugira ngo ibyo wungukamo bigaragarire abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose. Wirinde, kandi ushyire umwete ku myigishirize yacu, maze ushishikarire kuyishyitsa ; kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ugenza utyo, uzikizanya n’abazakumva. Ujye ubera umukumbi wa Kriato umwungeri, si isega ; intama

content.speaker: all
content.text: ze uziragire, ntuziconcomere. Ramira abanyantegenke, kiza abarwayi, abavunitse ubunge, garura

content.speaker: all
content.text: abaciwe, kandi abazimiye ubashake. Tegekesha imbaraga, ariko ntiwibagirwe imbabazi ; maze

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwungeri mukuru niyerekanwa, uzahabwe ikamba ry’icyubahiro ritangirika. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma Umwepiskopi mukuru akomeze iby’Igaburo ryera, Umwepiskopi mushya agaburirwa ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: kurya by’Umwami wacu hamwe n’abandi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mu cyimbo cy’Isengesho riheruka basenge aya:

content.speaker: all
content.text: DATA wa twese w’imbabazi nyinshi, turakwinginze usuke kuri uyu mugaragu wawe umugisha wawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uvuye mu ijuru, kandi umwuzuze Umwuka wawe Wera, kugira ngo, iyo abwiriza Ijambo ryawe, agire

content.speaker: all
content.text: umwete wo gucyaha abantu no kubihanangariza, no kubahana, kandi no kubigisha imyigishirize

content.speaker: all
content.text: abihanganisha rwose, Kandi si cyo cyo nyine, abere abizera icyitegererezo cyiza mu byo avuga no mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ngeso ze nziza, no mu rukundo, no mu byo twizera, no ku kwirinda, kandi no gutungana rwose.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Hanyuma n’arangiza neza urugendo rwe, ku munsi w’imperuka abone kuzahabwa ikamba

content.speaker: all
content.text: ry’Ubukiranutsi, aryambitswe n’Umuca-manza ukiranuka, ubana nawe, kandi utegekana nawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwuka Wera, muri Imana imwe, ibihe bitazashira. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NYAGASANI, turagusaba kugira ngo urukundo rwawe n’ubuntu bwawe bidushorere mu byo dukora

content.speaker: all
content.text: byose, kandi udufashe kujya twunguka mu byo tugukorera, kugira ngo muri Wowe umurimo wacu wose

content.speaker: all
content.text: abe ari ho utangirira, abe ari ho ukomerezwa, kandi abe ari ho urangirizwa, bitume duhesha Izina ryawe

content.speaker: all
content.text: ryera icyubahiro, kandi natwe hanyuma tuzahabwe ubugingo buhoraho ku bw’imabazi zawe. Tubisabye

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu Izina ryawe Yesu Kristo Umwami wacu. Amen.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMAHORO Imana itanga, aruta ayo umuntu wese yakwibwira, ajye arinda imitima yanyu n’ubwenge

content.speaker: all
content.text: bwanyu, kugira ngo mukomeze kumenya no gukunda Imana n’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo Umwami

content.speaker: all
content.text: wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi Umugisha w’Imana ishobora byose, Data wa twese, n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera, ube muri mwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ugumane namwe Iminsi yose. Amen

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: INGINGO Z’IBYO TWIZERA

content.speaker: all
content.text: Izi Ngingo z’ibyo twizera zemewe n’Abepiskopi b’Itorero ry’I Bwongereza mu mwaka 1562, ubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umugabekazi Elisabeti ari ku ngoma y’I Bwongereza. (reba Ingingo 36)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 1

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo kwizera Ubutatu bwera

sections.title: Ingingo z'Ibyo Twizera
sections.description: Ingingo makumyabiri n'cumi n'icyenda z'Ibyo Twizera, zemewe n'Itorero mu 1562.

content.speaker: all
content.text: HARIHO Imana imwe yonyine, ibaho kandi y’ukuri, ihoraho idafite umubiri cyangwa ingingo, haba no

content.speaker: all
content.text: gutegekwa na kamere y’abantu. Ubushobozi bwayo, n’ubwenge bwayo, no kugira-neza kwayo ntibigira

content.speaker: all
content.text: akagero. Niyo Muremyi w’ibintu byose, bigaragara n’ibitagaragara, kandi umurinzi wabyo. Mu bumwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’ubwo Bumana harimo Abaperisona batatu, basangiye akamero kamwe n’ubushobozi bumwe, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: bose uko ari batatu ntabwo bazashira. Abo Baperisona ni Data wa twese n’Umwana n’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 2

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga Ijambo ry’Imana, niryo Mwana wayo wahindutse umuntu nyamuntu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMWANA w’Imana, ni we Jambo rya Data wa twese, yahoze ari Umwana wayo uhereye kera kose, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana nyamana idashira; yari afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese, Yishyiriyeho kamere y’umuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu nda yaw a Mwari ushimwa, ayikuye mu kamero ke. Ni cyo cyatumye kamer ebyiri, nizo Bumana

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Ubuntu, zifatanira muri Perisona umwe, zitazatandukanywa ukundi, zigahinduka Kristo umwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufatanije kuba Imana nyamana, kandi Umuntu nyamuntu. Kristo uwo yababarijwe by’ukuri, abambirwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: apfira kugira ngo atwuzuze na Se, kandi ngo abe igitambo kitatambiwe ibyaha abantu bavukanye gusa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ariko kandi cyatambiwe n’ibyo bakoze ubwabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 3

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo Kumanuka kwa Kristo, ajya I Kizimu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NKUKO twemeye yuko Kristo yadupfriye, agahambwa, niko dukwiriye no kwemera yuko yamanutse,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akajya I Kuzimu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 4

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo Kuzuka kwa Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: NI UKURI koko Kristo yarazutse, asubirana umubiri we ufite inyama n’amagufa n’ibindi byose ibikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere y’umuntu ishyitse; arabizamukana, abijyana mu ijuru, aho yicaye, kugeza aho azagarukira, aje

content.speaker: all
content.text: gucira abantu imanza ku munsi w’imperuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 5

content.speaker: all
content.text: Vuga iby’Umwuka Wera

content.speaker: all
content.text: UMWUKA Wera ukomoka kuri Data wa twese no ku Mwana, afite akamero kamwe n’aka Data wa twese

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umwana, afite icyubahiro n’ubwiza bimwe n’ibyabo; kandi ari Imana nyamana ihoraho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 6

content.speaker: all
content.text: Vuga yuko Ibyanditswe Byera birimo byose bikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kwemerwa ngo dukizwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyanditswe Byea birimo amagambo yose dukwiriye kwemera ngo dukwize. Ni cyo gituma ari nta kintu

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuntu akwiriye guhatwa kwemera ko ari ngombwa kumuhesha agakiza, kitaboneka muri byo; cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitagihamya. Iyo tuvuze Ibyanditswe Byera, tuba tuvuze ibitabo byemewe muri Canoni z’Itorero byo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isezerano rya kera n’irishya, Itorero ritigeze gushidikanya ko bidafite ubutware bw’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amazina n’umubare by’ibitabo byo mu isezerano rya kera byemewe n’ibi:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itangiriro

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kuva

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abalevi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubara

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2 Ibyo ku Ngoma

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ezira

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nehemiya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Esiteri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gutegeka kwa kabiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yosuwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abacamanza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Rusi

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1 Samweli

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2 Samweli

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1 Abami

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2 Abami

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1 Ibyo ku ngoma

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yobu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Zaburi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imigani

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umubgiriza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Indirimbo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abahanuzi bakuru (Yesaya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Yeremiya, Ezekiyeli na Daniyeli)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abahanuzi bato cumi na babiri

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibitabo byo muri Kanoni n’ibitabo byemewe na Sinode nkuru y’Itorero yabayeho mu mwaka 397 A.D.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Hariho n’ibindi bitabo Itorero risoma, nk’uko Hieronumo yavuze, kugira ngo bibeshe abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyitegererezo b’ibyo bakwiriye gukora, bibigishe ingeso nziza; ariko Itorero ntiribikuramo icyo ryigisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kigaragazwa na byo byonyine. Ibitabo tuvuze n’ibi:

content.speaker: all
content.text: Icya Ezera 3 na 4; Icya Tobiti; Icya Yuditi; Ibice byongewe ku gitabo; Icya Baruki umuhanuzi; Indirimbo ya

content.speaker: all
content.text: ba bana batatu; Igitekerezo cya Susana; Icya Belu n’Ikiyoka; Gusenga kwa Manase; Igitabo

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’Abamakabayo 1 na 2.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibitabo byo mu Isezerano rishya byemewe n’abandi Bakristo bose, tubyemera byose, twemera

content.speaker: all
content.text: ko bifite ubutware bw’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 7

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’isezerano rya kera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ISEZERANO rya Kera ntirinyurana n’Irishya, kuko ayo Masezerano yombi ahamya yuko Kristo abwira

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu ko yemeye kubaha Ubugingo buhoraho, kandi ni we Muhuza wenyine w’Imana n’abantu, kuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: asangiye kuba Imana n’Umuntu. Ni cyo gituma tudakwiriye kumvira abatubeshya ngo basogokuruza bo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu gihe cy’Isezerano rya kera bategerezaga amasezerano y’igihe gito gusa. Twemeye yuko mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: mategeko Mose yahawe n’Imana gushyiraho, amategeko avuga iby’ibitambo n’iby’uburyo bwo gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibisa bityo adategeka Abakristo; kandi ko amategeko ya Mose ategeka iby’ubwami n’iby’imanza n’ibisa

content.speaker: all
content.text: bityo adakwiriye rwose kwemerwa n’ubwami bwose bw’Abakristo. Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: Mukristo n’umwe udakwiriye kumvira amategeko ya Mose avuga iby’ingeso z’abantu n’ibyo bakwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ku Mana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 8

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ku byo Kwemera k’uburyo butatu

content.speaker: all
content.text: KWEMERA kwacu ko mu buryo butatu, ukw’I Nike, ukwa Atanasiyo, n’ukw’Intumwa, gukwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwemerwa rwose, kuko guhamirishijwe amagambo yo mu Byanditswe Byera, ari ntawe ugushidikanya.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 9

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’Ibyaha bya Kavukire

content.speaker: all
content.text: IBYAHA bya kavukire si ugukurikiza Adamu (nk’uko abantu ba kera bitwa Abapelagiyo babeshyaga),

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo n’inenge no kwandura bya kamere y’umuntu wese avukana, kuko ari uw’urubyaro rwa Adamu;

content.speaker: all
content.text: bituma abantu baba kure cyane yo gukiranuka kwa kavukire Adamu na Eva bari bafite batarakora icyaha,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi ku bwa kamere yabo ubwayo bashaka gukora ibyaha, kameree iyo igahora yifuza ibyo Umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: yanga. Ni cyo gituma ibyaha bya kavukire byo mu muntu wese uvukira muri iyi si ari uwo kurakarirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Imana, akazacirwaho iteka. Kandi uko kwandura kwa kemere guhora no mu babyawe ubwa kabiri;

content.speaker: all
content.text: nicyo gituma kwifuza k’umuntu wa kamere kudategekwa n’amategeko y’Imana. Kandi nubwo abizera

content.speaker: all
content.text: bakabatizwa batazacirwaho iteka, Intumwa Pawulo yahamije yuko kwifuza ibibi n’irari ryabyo birimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: akarande k’ibyaha.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 10

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ihamya ko umuntu atabasha guhitamo ibyiza adafashijwe n’ubuntu bw’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHEREYE igihe Adamu yakoreye icyaha cya mbere, abantu bose bagira kamere ituma umutima

content.speaker: all
content.text: bavukanye, naho washaka gukora imirimo myiza, utabasha kubahindura ukabemeza kwizera Imana no

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyambaza. Ni cyo gituma tutabasha gukora imirimo myiza ikundwa, igashimwa n’Imana, keretse

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubuntu bwayo buheshwa na Kristo bwabanza kudufasha, ngo dukunde ibyiza, bugakorana natwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: tumaze kubikunda

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 11

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga uko abantu batsindishirizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: KWIZERA ni ko kuduhesha kubarwaho gukiranuka, tugatsindira urubanza imbere y’Imana ku bw’imirimo

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’Umwami wacu kandi Umukiza wacu Yesu Kristo yonyine, Atari ku bw’iyacu na hato. Ni cyo gituma

content.speaker: all
content.text: abigisha ko dutsindishirizwa no kwizera gusa, baba bigishije ibyiza cyane, bigira umumaro mwinshi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bigahumuriza abantu cyane (nk’uko bivugwa mu magambo menshi mu bibwirizwa b’ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Gutsindishirizwa).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 12

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’Imirimo myiza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nta MIRIMO myiza ibasha kudukuzaho ibyaha, kandi yo ntiyabura kuzagawa ku munsi w’urubanza, yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: ifite inenge imbere y’Imana. Ariko niba ari imbuto zo kwizera igakurikira gutsindishirizwa, iba ishimwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Imana ku bwa Kristo, ikayinezeza, kandi kwizera nyakuri kuzima ntiyabura kugukomakaho. Ni cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gituma ari yo igaragaza kwizera k’ukuri, nk’uko igiti kimenyekanira ku mbuto zacyo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 13

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’imirimo ikorwa n’abataratsindishirizwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMIRIMO ikorwa n’umuntu utarahabwa Ubuntu bwa Kristo kandi atarahumekerwaho Umwuka we Wera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntinezeza Imana, kuko idakomoka ku kwizera Yesu Kristo; kandi ntituma abantu baba bakwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: guhabwa Ubuntu bw’Imana. Ahubwo turahamya yuko irimo akarande k’ibyaha, kuko idakorwa uburyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Imana yashatse, igategeka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 14

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’imirimo irenze ibikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: KWIGISHA yuko umuntu yabasha gukora ibirenze amategeko y’Imana abikoreshwa n’umutima ukunze

content.speaker: all
content.text: (nibyo bita imirimo irenze ibikwiriye), kurimo kwibona no kutubaha Imana; kuko abigisha batyo baba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bavuze yuko badakorera Imana ibyo bakwiriye rwose gukora. Ariko Kristo yavuze yeruye ati, Nimumara

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: gukora ibyo mwategetswe byose, muvuge muti, turi abagaragu batagira umumaro. (Luka 17:10)

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 15

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ihamya yuko Kristo wenyine atigeze gukora icyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUGIRANGO Kristo agire kamere y’umuntu nyakuri, yashushanijwe natwe muri byose, keretse ibyaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: byonyine; kandi ibyo ntiyari abifite na hato mu mubiri we haba no mu mutima. Yazanywe mu isi no kuba

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwana w’intama utagira inenge cyangwa ibara, no kugira ngo akuzeho ibyaha by’abari mu isi

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwitamba rimwe, kandi nk’uko Yohanawera yavuze atya ati “Ntacyaha kimurimo” (1 Yoh 3:5). Ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanda twese, naho twabatijwe tukabyarirwa ubwa kabiri muri Kristo, ducumura muri byinshi; kandi ni

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: tuba tuvuze yuko ari nta cyaha dufite, turiyobya, ukuri ntikuri muri twe (1 Yoh 1:8).

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 16

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’ibyaha byakozwe n’umuntu nyuma yo kubatizwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ICYAHA gikomeye cy’icyitumano cyose gikorwa n’uwabatijwe, ntidukwiriye kukibara ko ari icyaha cyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: gucumura ku Mwuka Wera kitabasha kubabarirwa. Ni cyo gituma tudakwiriye kuvuga yuko abagushijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibyaha bamaze kubatizwa batakibasha guhabwa kwihana. Tumaze guhabwa Umwuka Wera,

content.speaker: all
content.text: byashoboka ko tuva mu buntu twahawe, tugashukwa n’ibyaha, kandi hanyuma tugaheshwa n’ubuntu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bw’Imana kubyuka, tugahaguruka, tukagendana ingezo nshya nziza. Ni cyo gituma abavuga yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: batabaha gukora icyaha ukundi bakiri muri iyi si ari abo gutsindwa n’urubanza; kandi abigisha yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: abihannye by’ukuri batabasha kubabarirwa na bo nuko bwakwiriye gutsindwa n’urubanza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 17

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo Imana yagambiriye ku bw’umuntu wese,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikabimutoraniriza atarabaho.

content.speaker: all
content.text: UHEREYE kera kose Imana yagambiriye gutegurira abantu ubugingo buhoraho. Ni cyo cyatumye yigira

content.speaker: all
content.text: inama duhishwa, isi itararemwa, gukiza abo yatoranirije mu bantu muri Kristo, ngo abavaneho

content.speaker: all
content.text: umuvumo no gucirwaho iteka, ikibazana guheshwa na Kristo agakiza kadashira nk’inzabya zabumbiwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: icyubahiro. Nuko abahawe iyi mpano iruta izindi y’Imana bahamagarwa n’Umwuka wayo, ubakoreramo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu gihe gikwiriye, nk’uko Imana yabigambiriye; bagaheshwa n’ubuntu bwayi kwitaba; bagashushanywa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ishusho y’Umwana wayo Yesu Kristo; bahubahisha Imana gukora imirimo myiza; nyuma bagaheshwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’imbabazi z’Imana ibyishimo bidashira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abo bantu, abubaha Imana, bakumva Umwuka wa Kristo abakoreramo, ababiciramo imirimo ya

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere n’iy’ingingo zabo z’umubiri, kandi agahesha imitima yabo gucururuka; ikibwira ibyo mu ijuru, ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: batekereza ku by’Imana yagambiriye ubwo yabatoranyaga muri Kristo, bagira ihumure ryinshi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ritarondoreka ku mpamvu ebyiri iya mbere, n’uko ibyo bibakomereza cyane kwizera agakiza kadashira

content.speaker: all
content.text: gaheshwa na Kristo; iya kabiri, ni uko urukundo bakunda Imana rugwira cyane muri bo.

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: Nk’uko kwibwira ibyo kuzanira abeza ibyiza byinshi, niko abantu ba kamere, abadafite Umwuka wa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo, ni bahora bumva yuko Imana yabahamirije gutsindwa n’urubanza, bibagusha mu kaga gakomeye,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bituma Satani abona urwitwazo rwo kubihebesha rwose, cyangwa urwo kubatera kwirekura mu byaha

content.speaker: all
content.text: biteye isoni bikabije, bibashyira mu kaga ko kurimbuka kangana n’akazanwa n’ubwihebe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko dukwiriye kwemera ibyo Imana yasezeranye, nk’uko tubisoma mu Byanditswe Byera;

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi mu byo dukora dukwiriye gukurikira ibyo Imana ishaka, nk’uko byanditswe mu Ijambo ryayo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 18

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga yuko duheshwa agakiza kadashira n’izina rya

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo ryonyine.

content.speaker: all
content.text: BENE aba n’ibivume, abahangara kuvuga bati, Umuntu azakirishwa n’amategeko cyangwa imyigishirize

content.speaker: all
content.text: yatura, niba agira umwete wo guhwanya ingezo ze n’ayo mategeko n’ibyo mategeko n’ibyo yigishwa na

content.speaker: all
content.text: kamere ye; kuko Ibyanditswe Byera bitubwira yuko Izina rya Kristo ari ryo ryonyine ribasha gukirisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 19

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: ITORERO RYA KRISTO rigaragara ni iteraniro ry’abizera, ryigishirizwamo Ijambo ry’Imana ritavanzwe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi nigaburirwamo Amasakaramento neza, uburyo buhura n’amategeko ya Kristo, kandi bagakora

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibikwiriye kuyashyitsa byose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nkuko Itorero ry’I Yerusalemu n’iryo mu Alekisandeniya, n’iryo mu Antiyokiya, ryajijwe muri

content.speaker: all
content.text: bimwe, niko n’iry’I Roma ryajijwe, si mu by’imico yabo n’imisengere yabo gusa, ariko no mu byo bizera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 20

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’Ubutware bw’Itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ITORERO rifite ubutware bwo gutegeka uburyo abantu basengera mu rusengero n’imihango y’idini,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kandi n’ubwo gukiranuka abantu bagize impaka ku byo twizera. Ariko Itorero ntirikwiriye gushyiraho

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibinyurana n’ijambo ry’Imana ryanditswe, haba no gusobanura amagambo amwe yo mu Byanditswe

content.speaker: all
content.text: uburyo bunyurana n’uko risobanura ayandi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko ubwo twemeye yuko Itorero ari umugabo ubuhamya Ibyanditswe Byera kandi umurinzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: wabyo, ntirikwiriye gutegeka ibinyurana na byo, nk’uko tuvuze haruguru; kandi ntirikwiriye guhata

content.speaker: all
content.text: abantu kwemera ikitari muri ibyo Byanditswe cyose, nk’aho batabasha gukizwa batacyemeye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 21

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’Ubutware bw’inkiko z’Abakristo bo mu isi yose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NTA RUKIKO rw’Abakristo bo mu isi yose rubasha guteranywa, abami batabitegetse, kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: batabyemeye. Abo muri izo nkiko, iyo bateranye, babasha kujijwa, kandi rimwe na rimwe barajijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: koko, ndetse no mu by’Imana, kuko ari iteraniro ry’abantu-bantu, kandi si bose bayoborwa n’Umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: w’Imana n’Ijambo ryayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Nuko rero ibyategetswe na zo ngo ni ngombwa ku bashaka gukizwa, ntibifite ubutware na buke,

content.speaker: all
content.text: keretse bihamijwe ko byakuwe mu Byanditswe Byera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 22

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibya Purigatori

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMYIGISHIRIZE y’Itorero ry’I Roma y’ibya Purigatori, n’iyo kubabarirwa ibyaha na papa, n’iyo gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibishushanyo n’ibintu by’abera ba kera, no kubasaba ngo badusabire, iyo yose ni amagambo y’ubupfu

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibihimbano bitagira umumaro, bidashinze ku magambo yo mu Byanditswe Byera yabasha kubihamya,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahubwo binyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 23

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo Kugabura iby’Imana mu Iteraniro ryayo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMATEGEKO ntiyemera ko umuntu wese yishyiraho umurimo wo kubwiriza abantu mu rusengero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa uwo kugaburira Amasakaramento mu Iteraniro ry’Imana, ataratoranywa nk’uko amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yategetse, agatumwa ngo abikore. Kandi dukwiriye gutekeeza yuko abatoranywa nk’uko amategeko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yategetse, ari bo bantu batoranywa, bagahamagarirwa uwo murimo n’abaherewe mu Iteraniro ry’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware bugaragara bwo gutoranya abagabura b’iby’Umwami wacu, bakabatuma mu ruzabibu rwe.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 24

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo kuvugira mu iteraniro ry’Imana mu rurimi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abantu bumva.

content.speaker: all
content.text: GUSENGERA mu rusengero cyangwa kugabura Amasakaramento mu rurimi rutumvikana, biragaragara

content.speaker: all
content.text: yuko binyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana n’imihango y’Itorero mu gihe cya mbere,

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 25

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’Amasakaramento.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMASAKARAMENTO yategetswe na Kristo si ibimenyetso by’ibyo Abakristo bahamya gusa, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ibintu bidashidikanywa biduhamiriza Ubuntu bw’Imana n’urukundo idukunda, kandi bifite akamaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: kenshi. Kandi ibyo bimenyetso Imana ibikoreshereza muri twe imirimo igaragara, ikabikomeresha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuyizera kwacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amasakaramento Kristo Umwami wacu yategetse mu Butumwa bwiza ni abiri, ni iryo Kubatiza,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iyo abanda bita Amasakaramento, Kurambikaho ibiganza, no Kwibabaza, no Kurobanura

content.speaker: all
content.text: Abapastori, no Gushyingira, kandi no Gusiga abari hafi gupfa, ntibikwiriye kwitwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amasakaremtoy’Ubutumwa Bwiza; kuko bimwe muri byo byazanywe n’abakurikiza nabi Intumwa za

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo; ibindi bikaba imibanire y’abantu ishimwa n’Ibyanditswe Byera, ariko atari Amasakaramento

content.speaker: all
content.text: ahwanye no Kubatiza cyangwa umuhango wabyo utegetswe n’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amasakaramento ntiyategekewe na Kristo kuyahangako amaso, cyangwa kuzereranwa; ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: yategekewe kugira ngo tuyakoreshe neza. Abayahabwa babikwiriye nibo bonyine agirira akamaro; ariko

content.speaker: all
content.text: abayahabwa batayakwiriye, baba bizanira gucirwaho iteka, nk’uko Pawulo wera yavuze.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 26

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga yuko naho Abagabura b’iby’Imana baba abanyangeso mbi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitabuza Amasakaramento guhesha abantu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ubuntu bw’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: NUBWO mu Itorero rigaragara abanyangeso mbi bavangwa n’abanyangeso nziza iteka, kandi ubundi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ubundi ababi bagira ubutware bukuru bwo kugabura Ijambo ry’Imana n’Amasakaramento yayo,

content.speaker: all
content.text: ntibabikora mu ryabo zina, ahubwo babikora mu izina rya Kristo, bagaheshwa kubigaburo n’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabatumye akabaha ubutware. Ni cyo gituma twemererwa kubumvana Ijambo ry’Imana, no kwakira

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amasakaramento bagabura.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kandi abakira neza bizeye Amasakaramento bagaburirwa nabo, ntibakuzwaho n’ingeso mbi za ba bandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyiza biheshwa n’ibyo Kristo yategetse; kandi ntizituma Ubuntu buheshwa n’impano z’Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bubagabanukaho; kuko igituma Amasakaramento ahesha ibyiza ari uko Kristo ari we wayategetse,

content.speaker: all
content.text: agasezeranya ibyo byiza, naho abayagabura baba abanyangeso mbi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, ku bwo gushaka ngo Itorerp ritegekwa neza, bikwiriye ko aba

content.speaker: all
content.text: bagabura b’iby’Imana babibazwa, bakaburanywa n’abazi ibicumuro byabo; maze batsindwa, bagakurwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu murimo wabo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 27

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo Kubatizwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: KUBATIZWA si ikimenyetsocy’ibyo twemera gusa, kandi si cyo gusa gitandukanya Abakristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’abatarabatizwa; ariko kandi ni ikimenyetso cyo kubyarwa ubwa kabiri, gihesha abakabiri, gihesha

content.speaker: all
content.text: abakira kubatizwa mu buryo bukwiriye guterwa nk’ingurukira mu Itorero. Kandi Kubatizwa ni

content.speaker: all
content.text: ikimenyetso kigaragara gikomeza amasezerano y’Imana, yuko itubabarira ibyaha, ikaduhindurisha abana

content.speaker: all
content.text: bayo Umwuka Wera; kandi kudukomereza kwizera, kukatugwiriza Ubuntu bw’Imana kubwo kuyisenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: kwacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kubatiza abana bato ni umuhango ukwiriye rwose kudahanguka mu Itorero, kuko uhuye rwose n’ibyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Kristo yategetse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 28

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivugwa iby’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IGABURO ry’umwami wacu si ikimenyetso gusa cy’urukundo Abakristo bakwiriye gukundana, ariko kandi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ni Isakaramento ryo gucungurwa kwacu n’urupfu rwa Kristo. Ni cyo gituma ku bakira neza iryo Gaburo

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu mitima itunganye yizera, umutsima dusatagura ari ugufatana n’umubiri wa Kristo, kandi n’igikombe

content.speaker: all
content.text: cy’Umugisha, kikaba gufatana n’amaraso ya Kristo. Imyigishirize ivuga yuko umutsima na vino ubwabyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bihinduka rwose umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo, ntibasha guhamywa n’Ibyanditswe Byera, ahubwo

content.speaker: all
content.text: inyurana n’amagambo yabyo yeruye, yangiza akamero k’Isakaramento, kandi yakomotsweho n’imihango

content.speaker: all
content.text: mibi myinshi n’ibyo bizera by’ibihimbano bidafite akamaro.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umubiri wa Kristo utangirwa muri iryo Gaburo, wakirwa kandi usangirwa mu buryo bw’Umwuka

content.speaker: all
content.text: gusa. Kandi ikiduhesha kwakirira umubiri wa Kristo muri iryo Gaburo, tukawusangira, ni ukwizera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isakaramento ry’Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu, Kristo si we wategetse ko ribikwa, cyangwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: rizereranwa, cyangwa risengwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 29

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivugwa yuko abanyabyaha batihannye batarira umubiri wa Kristo mu

content.speaker: all
content.text: Igaburo ry’Umwami wacu

content.speaker: all
content.text: ABANYABYAHA batihannye n’abadafite kwizera nyakuri, nubwo bw’umubiri bagaragara batapfuna

content.speaker: all
content.text: Isakaramento ry’umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo, nk’uko Augustini wera yavuze, ntibahabwa Kristo na

content.speaker: all
content.text: hato, ahubwo bararya bakanywa ikimenyetso cyangwa isakaramento cy’ibyo bikomeye, bakizanira

content.speaker: all
content.text: gucirwaho iteka.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 30

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga yuko Abakristo bose bakwiriye kugaburirwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umugati na Vino byombi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ABATARI abagabura b’iby’Imana ntibakwiriye kwimwa Igikombe cy’Umwami wacu , kuko ibice byombi

content.speaker: all
content.text: by’iryo Sakaramento y’Umwami wacu bikwiriye kugaburirwa Abakristo bose, nk’uko Kristo yategetse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 31

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’igitambo cya Kristo

content.speaker: all
content.text: Cyarangijwe ku musaraba.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IGITAMBO cya Kristo cyatambwe rimwe ni cyo nshungu n’impongano n’icyiru bitagira inenge, bibasha

content.speaker: all
content.text: gukuraho ibyaha byose by’abari mu isi bose, ibyakavukire n’ibyo bakoze ubwabo. Nicyo gituma ibitambo

content.speaker: all
content.text: bya Misa, bavuga yuko umusaseredoti abitambiramo Kristo abazima n’abapfuye, ari ibihimbano

content.speaker: all
content.text: bitukisha Imana, n’uburiganya buzanira abantu akaga.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 32

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo gushyingirwa kw’Abakuru b’Itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: ABEPISKOPI, n’Abapastori n’Abadikoni ntibategetswe n’amategeko y’Imana kurahira yuko

content.speaker: all
content.text: batazarongorana. Ni cyo gituma abo batabuzwa gushyingirwa, bahwanye n’abandi Bakristo bose, niba

content.speaker: all
content.text: babikunda, bakibwira yuko bizabafasha kurushaho kubaha Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 33

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga yuko dukwiriye kuzibukira abirukanywe ku

content.speaker: all
content.text: Meza y’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IYO ITORERO riciriye umuntu urubanza rumukwiriye ku mugaragaro, agakurwa mu bumwe bw’Itorero,

content.speaker: all
content.text: akabuzwa kujya ku Meza y’Umwami wacu, abizera Kristo bose bakwiriye kumuhwanya n’umupagani,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kugeza aho azihanira, akuzurira n’Itorero ku mugaragaro, akagarurwa muri ryo n’umucamanza ufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware bwo kumugaruramo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 34

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’imihango Itorero ryahawe n’aba kera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IMIHANGO Itorero ryahawe n’aba kera n’uburyo bwose bwo gusengera mu rusengero, ntibikwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: rwose kuba bimwe mu bihugu byose, cyangwa bihwana rwose; kuko mu bihe byose iyo mihango

content.speaker: all
content.text: yaratandukanye, kandi yahindurwa, nk’uko ibihugu n’ibihe n’imigenzo y’abantu bitandukana, niba gusa

content.speaker: all
content.text: hatagira igitegekwa kinyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana. Nuk niba umuntu ku bw’icyo akunze ku bwe, kandi azi

content.speaker: all
content.text: ibyo akora, azirurira iyo mihango ku mugarago itanyurana n’Ijambo ry’Imana, ahubwo yategetswe,

content.speaker: all
content.text: igashimwa n’ubutware bwemerwa na bose, uwo muntu akwiriye guhanirwa ku mugaragaro, kugira ngo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abanda batinye kugenza batyo; kuko aba yishe gahunda y’Itorero yemerwa na bose, akaba acumuye

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware bw’Abakuru, kandi akaba akomerekeje imitima ya bene Data badakomeye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Itorero ryose rya bene gihugu rifite ubutware bwo gutegeka, no guhindura no gukora imihango

content.speaker: all
content.text: yashyizweho n’ab’Itorero ubwabo, gusa bikorewe gukomeza Itorero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 35

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo kubwirizwa mu rusengero.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IGITABO cya kabiri cy’Ibyo kubwirizwa mu rusengero, twanditse hepfo amazina yabyo, kirimo kwigisha

content.speaker: all
content.text: kuzima kubahisha Imana, gukwiriye ibihe byacu. Kandi n’igitabo cya mbere cy’ibyo kubwirizwa,

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyanditswe ku ngoma ya Eduwadi wa gatandatu (ni we wimye 1547-1553) na cyo kirimo kwigisha kwiza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ni cyo gituma dutegeka ko abagabura b’iby’Imana babisomera mu nsengero, babishyizeho umwete

content.speaker: all
content.text: babisoma neza, kugira ngo abantu babyumve cyane.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amazina y’Ibyo kubwirizwa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 1 Ibyo Gukoresha neza Urusengero

content.speaker: all
content.text: 2 Iby’Akaga kazanywe no gusenga ibishushanyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: 3 Ibyo Guhindura insengero no kuziboneza

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iby’Imirimo myiza, uwa mbere ni ukwiyiriza ubusa.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo Kubuza uburura n’ubusinzi

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ikitubuza gukabya kwirimbisha, cyane cyane imyambaro

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ibyo Gusenga

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iby’Imyanya yo gusengeramo, n’igihe cyako.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Iby’Amasengesho yo mu rusengero n’Amasakaramento bikwiriye kuvugwa mu rurimi rwumvikana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 10  Ikivuga yuko Ijambo ry’Imana rikwiriye kubahwa

content.speaker: all
content.text: 11  Ibyo Gufasha abakene.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 12  Ibyo Kuvuka kwa Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 13  Iby’Urupfu rwa Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 14  Ibyo Kuzuka kwa Kristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 15  Ibyo Kwakira Isakaramento ry’umubiri n’amaraso bya Kristo uburyo bukwiriye.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 16  Iby’Impano z’Umwuka Wera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 17  Ibyo Kubwirizwa mu minsi ibanziriza Kuzamuka k’Umwami wacu.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 18  Ibyo Gushyingira kwera.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 19  Ibyo Kwihana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 20  Ikitubuza kugira Ubute.

content.speaker: all
content.text: 21  Ikitubuza Kugomera Abategetsi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 36

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga ibyo Kurobanura Abepiskopi

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Abagabura b’iby’Imana.

content.speaker: all
content.text: IGITABO kirimo amagambo yo kurobanura Abepiskopi batwara abandi, n’Abepiskopi bandi,

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’ayo kurobanura Abapastori n’Abadiyakoni, cyanditswe ku ngoma ya Eduwadi wa gatandatu,

content.speaker: all
content.text: kigakomezwa n’Urukiko rw’Abongereza rukuru kuri iyo ngoma, kirimo ibikwiriye byose gushyitsa

content.speaker: all
content.text: neza uko kurobanura, uko ari bitatu. Kandi ntikirimo Ijambo ryose ry’ikizira kidafite akamaro,

content.speaker: all
content.text: haba no kunyurana no kubaha Imana. Ni cyo gituma abarobanuwe bose mu buryo bwose

content.speaker: all
content.text: butegekwa kuri ubu, kandi abazarobanurwa neza nk’uko bikwiye, nk’uko amategeko yategetse.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 37

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivugwa iby’Abategetsi b’igihugu

content.speaker: all
content.text: IBWONGEREZA no mu bindi bihugu bitwarwa n’Abongereza, Umwami w’Abongereza ni we ufite

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubutware busumba ubundi, ni we utwara abo mu bihugu bye bose, naho baba ab’Itorero

content.speaker: all
content.text: cyangwa abakora imirimo y’iby’iyi si, ni we uca imanza zabo zose, kandi nta munyamahanga

content.speaker: all
content.text: ufite ubutware bwo gutegeka ibyo na hato, nta wukwiriye kubugira.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Tumenye yuko iryo jambo ngo, Umwami afite ubutware busumba ubundi mu bihugu

content.speaker: all
content.text: bye, rigawa n’abakunda kutubeshyera bamwe. Ni cyo gitumye dusobanura yuko tudaha abami

content.speaker: all
content.text: bacu kugabura Ijambo ry’Imana cyangwa Amasakaramento, nk’uko amategeko yandikishijwe

content.speaker: all
content.text: n’Umugabekazi wacu Elizabeti 1 abihamya mu magambo yeruye rwose.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ahubwo tubaha ubutware, Imana yajyaga iha abami b’Abayunda bayubahaga bose, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: tubisoma mu Byanditswe Byera. Nibwo butware bwo gutegeka abantu b’uburyo bwose, Imana

content.speaker: all
content.text: yabaragije, naho baba ab’Itorero cyangwa bakora imirimo y’iby’iyi si, n’ubwo guhanisha inkota

content.speaker: all
content.text: y’ubwami abadakurwa ku ijambo n’inkozi z’ibibi; ubwo butware ni bwo duha abami bacu, nta

content.speaker: all
content.text: bundi.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Umwepiskopi w’i Roma nta butware afite i Bungereza.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amategeko y’ubwai ntabuzwa n’ay’Imana guhanisha Abakristo urupfu, babahora ibicumuro

content.speaker: all
content.text: bikomeye cyane.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Amategeko y’Imana yemera ko Abakristo, iyo babitegetswe n’umutware, batwara intwaro, bagatabara

content.speaker: all
content.text: mu ntambara.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 38

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’amatungo n’ibintu by’Abakristo ko Atari

content.speaker: all
content.text: Urusange, ahubwo ari ibyabo bwite.

content.speaker: all
content.text: AMATUNGO n’ibintu by’Abakristo si urusange, ngo abandi Bakristo babikoreshe ibyo bashaka, nk’uko

content.speaker: all
content.text: bamwe mu babatiza abantu ubwa kabiri babeshya. Ariko nubwo bimeze bityo, umuntu wese akwiriye

content.speaker: all
content.text: gufasha abakene cyane mu byo afite, uko abishobora.

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ingingo 39

content.speaker: all
content.text: Ivuga iby’indahiro z’Abakristo.

content.speaker: all
content.text: TWEMERA yuko Umwami wacu Yesu na Yakobo intumwa ye babujije Abakristo kwihutira gupfa kurahira

content.speaker: all
content.text: ubusa. Ariko tuvuga yuko idini y’Ubukristo itabuza Umukristo kurahira ku bw’umurava n’Urukundo, iyo

content.speaker: all
content.text: abitegetswe n’Umucamanza, niba gusa arahira indahiro ihura n’ukuri, ikazana urubanza rwiza rukwiriye,

content.speaker: narrator
content.text: nk’uko wa muhanuzi yategetse (Yeremiya 4:2).
